Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Lang Sun, Ronghao Fu, Zhuoran Duan, Haoran Liu, Xueyan Liu, Bo Yang

Towards Unified Multimodal Interleaved Generation via Group Relative Policy Optimization

Abstract (English): Unified vision-language models have made significant progress in multimodal understanding and generation, yet they largely fall short in producing multimodal interleaved outputs, which is a crucial capability for tasks like visual storytelling and step-by-step visual reasoning. In this work, we propose a reinforcement learning-based post-training strategy to unlock this capability in existing unified models, without relying on large-scale multimodal interleaved datasets. We begin with a warm-up stage using a hybrid dataset comprising curated interleaved sequences and limited data for multimodal understanding and text-to-image generation, which exposes the model to interleaved generation patterns while preserving its pretrained capabilities. To further refine interleaved generation, we propose a unified policy optimization framework that extends Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to the multimodal setting. Our approach jointly models text and image generation within a single decoding trajectory and optimizes it with our novel hybrid rewards covering textual relevance, visual-text alignment, and structural fidelity. Additionally, we incorporate process-level rewards to provide step-wise guidance, enhancing training efficiency in complex multimodal tasks. Experiments on MMIE and InterleavedBench demonstrate that our approach significantly enhances the quality and coherence of multimodal interleaved generation.

摘要（中文）: 统一的视觉-语言模型在多模态理解和生成方面取得了显著进展，但它们在生成多模态交错输出方面仍然存在不足，而这对于诸如视觉故事讲述以及逐步视觉推理之类的任务至关重要。本文中，我们提出了一种基于强化学习的后训练策略，以在现有统一模型中解锁此能力，而无需依赖大规模多模态交错数据集。我们首先使用一个混合数据集进行热身阶段，该数据集包含精心策划的交错序列以及用于多模态理解和文本到图像生成的有限数据，这使得模型能够接触到交错生成模式，同时保留其预训练的能力。为了进一步优化交错生成，我们提出了一个统一的策略优化框架，将组相对策略优化（GRPO）扩展到多模态设置。我们的方法在单个解码轨迹中联合建模文本和图像生成，并利用我们新颖的混合奖励对其进行优化，该奖励涵盖文本相关性、视觉-文本对齐以及结构保真度。此外，我们融入了过程级别的奖励，以提供逐步指导，从而提高复杂多模态任务的训练效率。在MMIE和InterleavedBench上的实验表明，我们的方法显著提高了多模态交错生成的质量和连贯性。

TLDR: The paper presents a reinforcement learning-based approach, Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), to improve multimodal interleaved generation in unified vision-language models, particularly for tasks requiring step-by-step visual reasoning.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的方法，即组相对策略优化（GRPO），以提高统一视觉语言模型中的多模态交错生成能力，尤其是在需要逐步视觉推理的任务中。

Relevance: (9/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (8/10)
Overall: (8/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Ming Nie, Chunwei Wang, Jianhua Han, Hang Xu, Li Zhang

RESBev: Making BEV Perception More Robust

Abstract (English): Bird's-eye-view (BEV) perception has emerged as a cornerstone of autonomous driving systems, providing a structured, ego-centric representation critical for downstream planning and control. However, real-world deployment faces challenges from sensor degradation and adversarial attacks, which can cause severe perceptual anomalies and ultimately compromise the safety of autonomous driving systems. To address this, we propose a resilient and plug-and-play BEV perception method, RESBev, which can be easily applied to existing BEV perception methods to enhance their robustness to diverse disturbances. Specifically, we reframe perception robustness as a latent semantic prediction problem. A latent world model is constructed to extract spatiotemporal correlations across sequential BEV observations, thereby learning the underlying BEV state transitions to predict clean BEV features for reconstructing corrupted observations. The proposed framework operates at the semantic feature level of the Lift-Splat-Shoot pipeline, enabling recovery that generalizes across both natural disturbances and adversarial attacks without modifying the underlying backbone. Extensive experiments on the nuScenes dataset demonstrate that, with few-shot fine-tuning, RESBev significantly improves the robustness of existing BEV perception models against various external disturbances and adversarial attacks.

摘要（中文）: 鸟瞰图(BEV)感知已成为自动驾驶系统的基石，它提供了一种结构化的、以自我为中心的表示，对于下游的规划和控制至关重要。然而，实际部署面临着传感器退化和对抗攻击带来的挑战，这些挑战可能导致严重的感知异常，并最终危及自动驾驶系统的安全。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种具有弹性和即插即用的BEV感知方法RESBev，该方法可以很容易地应用于现有的BEV感知方法，以增强其对各种干扰的鲁棒性。具体来说，我们将感知鲁棒性重新定义为一个潜在语义预测问题。构建一个潜在世界模型来提取跨越连续BEV观测的时空相关性，从而学习潜在的BEV状态转换，以预测干净的BEV特征，用于重建被破坏的观测。所提出的框架在Lift-Splat-Shoot流程的语义特征层面上运行，能够实现针对自然干扰和对抗攻击的泛化恢复，而无需修改底层骨干网络。在nuScenes数据集上的大量实验表明，通过少量样本的微调，RESBev显著提高了现有BEV感知模型对各种外部干扰和对抗攻击的鲁棒性。

TLDR: The paper introduces RESBev, a plug-and-play method to enhance the robustness of BEV perception models against disturbances and adversarial attacks by learning latent BEV state transitions and predicting clean features for reconstruction.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了RESBev，一种即插即用的方法，通过学习潜在的BEV状态转换并预测干净的特征进行重建，从而增强BEV感知模型对干扰和对抗攻击的鲁棒性。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (8/10)
Overall: (8/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Lifeng Zhuo, Kefan Jin, Zhe Liu, Hesheng Wang

Probing the Reliability of Driving VLMs: From Inconsistent Responses to Grounded Temporal Reasoning

Abstract (English): A reliable driving assistant should provide consistent responses based on temporally grounded reasoning derived from observed information. In this work, we investigate whether Vision-Language Models (VLMs), when applied as driving assistants, can response consistantly and understand how present observations shape future outcomes, or whether their outputs merely reflect patterns memorized during training without temporally grounded reasoning. While recent efforts have integrated VLMs into autonomous driving, prior studies typically emphasize scene understanding and instruction generation, implicitly assuming that strong visual interpretation naturally enables consistant future reasoning and thus ensures reliable decision-making, a claim we critically examine. We focus on two major challenges limiting VLM reliability in this setting: response inconsistency, where minor input perturbations yield different answers or, in some cases, responses degenerate toward near-random guessing, and limited temporal reasoning, in which models fail to reason and align sequential events from current observations, often resulting in incorrect or even contradictory responses. Moreover, we find that models with strong visual understanding do not necessarily perform best on tasks requiring temporal reasoning, indicating a tendency to over-rely on pretrained patterns rather than modeling temporal dynamics. To address these issues, we adopt existing evaluation methods and introduce FutureVQA, a human-annotated benchmark dataset specifically designed to assess future scene reasoning. In addition, we propose a simple yet effective self-supervised tuning approach with chain-of-thought reasoning that improves both consistency and temporal reasoning without requiring temporal labels.

摘要（中文）: 一个可靠的驾驶辅助系统应当基于从观测信息中推导出的、具有时间基础的推理，提供一致的响应。在这项工作中，我们研究了当视觉语言模型 (VLMs) 被用作驾驶辅助时，是否能够保持响应一致性，并理解当前观测如何塑造未来结果，或者它们的输出仅仅反映了训练期间记忆的模式，而没有基于时间基础的推理。虽然最近的研究已将 VLM 集成到自动驾驶中，但先前的研究通常强调场景理解和指令生成，隐含地假设了强大的视觉解释能力自然能够实现一致的未来推理，从而确保可靠的决策，我们对这一说法进行了批判性审查。我们重点关注了限制 VLM 在此设置中可靠性的两个主要挑战：响应不一致性，即微小的输入扰动会导致不同的答案，或者在某些情况下，响应退化为接近随机猜测；以及有限的时间推理能力，即模型无法根据当前观测推理并对齐连续事件，从而经常导致不正确甚至矛盾的响应。此外，我们发现具有强大视觉理解能力的模型，在需要时间推理的任务上并不一定表现最佳，这表明模型倾向于过度依赖预训练的模式，而不是建模时间动态。为了解决这些问题，我们采用了现有的评估方法，并引入了 FutureVQA，这是一个人工标注的基准数据集，专门用于评估未来场景推理能力。此外，我们提出了一种简单而有效的自监督调优方法，结合思维链推理，无需时间标签即可提高一致性和时间推理能力。

TLDR: This paper investigates the reliability of driving VLMs, identifying issues with response consistency and temporal reasoning, and introduces a new benchmark dataset (FutureVQA) and a self-supervised tuning approach to address these limitations.

简要说明: 本文研究了驾驶视觉语言模型（VLMs）的可靠性，指出了响应一致性和时间推理方面的问题，并引入了一个新的基准数据集（FutureVQA）和一个自监督调整方法来解决这些限制。

Relevance: (9/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (8/10)
Overall: (8/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Chun-Peng Chang, Chen-Yu Wang, Holger Caesar, Alain Pagani

Prune Redundancy, Preserve Essence: Vision Token Compression in VLMs via Synergistic Importance-Diversity

Abstract (English): Vision-language models (VLMs) face significant computational inefficiencies caused by excessive generation of visual tokens. While prior work shows that a large fraction of visual tokens are redundant, existing compression methods struggle to balance importance preservation and information diversity. To address this, we propose PruneSID, a training-free Synergistic Importance-Diversity approach featuring a two-stage pipeline: (1) Principal Semantic Components Analysis (PSCA) for clustering tokens into semantically coherent groups, ensuring comprehensive concept coverage, and (2) Intra-group Non-Maximum Suppression (NMS) for pruning redundant tokens while preserving key representative tokens within each group. Additionally, PruneSID incorporates an information-aware dynamic compression ratio mechanism that optimizes token compression rates based on image complexity, enabling more effective average information preservation across diverse scenes. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, achieving 96.3% accuracy on LLaVA-1.5 with only 11.1% token retention, and 92.8% accuracy at extreme compression rates (5.6%) on LLaVA-NeXT, outperforming prior methods by 2.5% with 7.8 $\times$ faster prefilling speed compared to the original model. Our framework generalizes across diverse VLMs and both image and video modalities, showcasing strong cross-modal versatility. Code is available at https://github.com/ZhengyaoFang/PruneSID.

摘要（中文）: 视觉-语言模型（VLMs）面临由过多生成视觉令牌导致的显著计算效率低下问题。虽然先前的工作表明大部分视觉令牌是冗余的，但现有的压缩方法难以平衡重要性保留和信息多样性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种无需训练的协同重要性-多样性方法PruneSID，它具有一个两阶段的流程：（1）主语义成分分析（PSCA），用于将令牌聚类成语义连贯的组，以确保全面的概念覆盖；（2）组内非极大值抑制（NMS），用于剪枝冗余令牌，同时保留每个组内的关键代表性令牌。此外，PruneSID还融入了一种信息感知动态压缩率机制，该机制基于图像复杂性优化令牌压缩率，从而在不同的场景中实现更有效的平均信息保持。大量的实验表明了最先进的性能，仅保留11.1%的令牌的情况下，在LLaVA-1.5上实现了96.3%的准确率，并且在LLaVA-NeXT上以极高的压缩率（5.6%）实现了92.8%的准确率，优于先前方法2.5%，与原始模型相比，预填充速度快7.8倍。我们的框架可以推广到不同的VLMs以及图像和视频模态，展示了强大的跨模态通用性。代码可在https://github.com/ZhengyaoFang/PruneSID获取。

TLDR: The paper introduces PruneSID, a training-free approach for compressing visual tokens in VLMs using synergistic importance and diversity, achieving state-of-the-art performance and significant speedups with high compression rates.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了PruneSID，一种无需训练的方法，通过协同重要性和多样性来压缩视觉语言模型中的视觉tokens，实现了最先进的性能，并在高压缩率下实现了显著的加速。

Relevance: (9/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (8/10)
Overall: (8/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Zhengyao Fang, Pengyuan Lyu, Chengquan Zhang, Guangming Lu, Jun Yu, Wenjie Pei

TopoOR: A Unified Topological Scene Representation for the Operating Room

Abstract (English): Surgical Scene Graphs abstract the complexity of surgical operating rooms (OR) into a structure of entities and their relations, but existing paradigms suffer from strictly dyadic structural limitations. Frameworks that predominantly rely on pairwise message passing or tokenized sequences flatten the manifold geometry inherent to relational structures and lose structure in the process. We introduce TopoOR, a new paradigm that models multimodal operating rooms as a higher-order structure, innately preserving pairwise and group relationships. By lifting interactions between entities into higher-order topological cells, TopoOR natively models complex dynamics and multimodality present in the OR. This topological representation subsumes traditional scene graphs, thereby offering strictly greater expressivity. We also propose a higher-order attention mechanism that explicitly preserves manifold structure and modality-specific features throughout hierarchical relational attention. In this way, we circumvent combining 3D geometry, audio, and robot kinematics into a single joint latent representation, preserving the precise multimodal structure required for safety-critical reasoning, unlike existing methods. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach outperforms traditional graph and LLM-based baselines across sterility breach detection, robot phase prediction, and next-action anticipation

摘要（中文）: 手术场景图将手术室（OR）的复杂性抽象为实体及其关系的一种结构，但现有的范式受到严格的二元结构限制。主要依赖于成对消息传递或标记化序列的框架会扁平化关系结构固有的流形几何，并在过程中丢失结构信息。我们引入TopoOR，这是一种新的范式，它将多模态手术室建模为更高阶的结构，自然地保留成对和群体关系。通过将实体间的交互提升到更高阶的拓扑单元，TopoOR原生建模手术室中存在的复杂动力学和多模态信息。这种拓扑表示包含了传统的场景图，从而提供了严格的更高的表达能力。我们还提出了一种更高阶的注意力机制，它在分层关系注意力中显式地保留流形结构和模态特定的特征。通过这种方式，我们避免将3D几何、音频和机器人运动学合并到单个联合潜在表示中，与现有方法不同，我们保留了安全关键推理所需的精确多模态结构。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在无菌操作违规检测、机器人阶段预测和下一步动作预测方面优于传统的基于图和基于LLM的基线方法。

TLDR: The paper introduces TopoOR, a novel topological scene representation method for operating rooms that captures higher-order relationships between entities, outperforming traditional graph-based and LLM-based approaches in surgical task prediction.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一种名为TopoOR的新型拓扑场景表示方法，用于手术室环境，它能捕获实体之间的高阶关系，并在手术任务预测方面优于传统的基于图和基于LLM的方法。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (9/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (8/10)
Overall: (8/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Tony Danjun Wang, Ka Young Kim, Tolga Birdal, Nassir Navab, Lennart Bastian

OddGridBench: Exposing the Lack of Fine-Grained Visual Discrepancy Sensitivity in Multimodal Large Language Models

Abstract (English): Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable performance across a wide range of vision language tasks. However, their ability in low-level visual perception, particularly in detecting fine-grained visual discrepancies, remains underexplored and lacks systematic analysis. In this work, we introduce OddGridBench, a controllable benchmark for evaluating the visual discrepancy sensitivity of MLLMs. OddGridBench comprises over 1,400 grid-based images, where a single element differs from all others by one or multiple visual attributes such as color, size, rotation, or position. Experiments reveal that all evaluated MLLMs, including open-source families such as Qwen3-VL and InternVL3.5, and proprietary systems like Gemini-2.5-Pro and GPT-5, perform far below human levels in visual discrepancy detection. We further propose OddGrid-GRPO, a reinforcement learning framework that integrates curriculum learning and distance-aware reward. By progressively controlling the difficulty of training samples and incorporating spatial proximity constraints into the reward design, OddGrid-GRPO significantly enhances the model's fine-grained visual discrimination ability. We hope OddGridBench and OddGrid-GRPO will lay the groundwork for advancing perceptual grounding and visual discrepancy sensitivity in multimodal intelligence. Code and dataset are available at https://wwwtttjjj.github.io/OddGridBench/.

摘要（中文）: 多模态大型语言模型(MLLM)在广泛的视觉语言任务中取得了显著的性能。然而，它们在低级视觉感知方面的能力，尤其是在检测细粒度视觉差异方面的能力，仍未得到充分探索，且缺乏系统分析。在这项工作中，我们引入了OddGridBench，这是一个可控的基准，用于评估MLLM的视觉差异敏感性。OddGridBench包含1400多个基于网格的图像，其中单个元素通过颜色、尺寸、旋转或位置等一个或多个视觉属性与其他所有元素不同。实验表明，所有评估的MLLM，包括Qwen3-VL和InternVL3.5等开源模型，以及Gemini-2.5-Pro和GPT-5等专有系统，在视觉差异检测方面的表现都远低于人类水平。我们进一步提出了OddGrid-GRPO，这是一个强化学习框架，整合了课程学习和距离感知奖励。通过逐步控制训练样本的难度，并将空间邻近约束纳入奖励设计中，OddGrid-GRPO显著增强了模型的细粒度视觉区分能力。我们希望OddGridBench和OddGrid-GRPO将为推进多模态智能中的感知基础和视觉差异敏感性奠定基础。代码和数据集可在https://wwwtttjjj.github.io/OddGridBench/获取。

TLDR: The paper introduces OddGridBench, a benchmark to evaluate the fine-grained visual discrepancy sensitivity of MLLMs, finding that current models perform poorly, and proposes OddGrid-GRPO, a reinforcement learning framework to improve this sensitivity.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了OddGridBench，一个用于评估多模态大语言模型细粒度视觉差异敏感度的基准。研究发现现有模型的表现不佳，并提出了OddGrid-GRPO，一个强化学习框架来提高这种敏感性。

Relevance: (8/10)

Authors: Tengjin Weng, Wenhao Jiang, Jingyi Wang, Ming Li, Lin Ma, Zhong Ming

MM-Zero: Self-Evolving Multi-Model Vision Language Models From Zero Data

Abstract (English): Self-evolving has emerged as a key paradigm for improving foundational models such as Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision Language Models (VLMs) with minimal human intervention. While recent approaches have demonstrated that LLM agents can self-evolve from scratch with little to no data, VLMs introduce an additional visual modality that typically requires at least some seed data, such as images, to bootstrap the self-evolution process. In this work, we present Multi-model Multimodal Zero (MM-Zero), the first RL-based framework to achieve zero-data self-evolution for VLM reasoning. Moving beyond prior dual-role (Proposer and Solver) setups, MM-Zero introduces a multi-role self-evolving training framework comprising three specialized roles: a Proposer that generates abstract visual concepts and formulates questions; a Coder that translates these concepts into executable code (e.g., Python, SVG) to render visual images; and a Solver that performs multimodal reasoning over the generated visual content. All three roles are initialized from the same base model and trained using Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), with carefully designed reward mechanisms that integrate execution feedback, visual verification, and difficulty balancing. Our experiments show that MM-Zero improves VLM reasoning performance across a wide range of multimodal benchmarks. MM-Zero establishes a scalable path toward self-evolving multi-model systems for multimodal models, extending the frontier of self-improvement beyond the conventional two-model paradigm.

摘要（中文）: 自演化已经成为一种关键范式，用于在最少人工干预的情况下改进诸如大型语言模型（LLM）和视觉语言模型（VLM）等基础模型。虽然最近的方法已经证明，LLM Agent 可以通过少量甚至零数据从头开始自演化，但 VLM 引入了一个额外的视觉模态，该模态通常需要至少一些种子数据，例如图像，来引导自演化过程。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Multi-model Multimodal Zero (MM-Zero)，这是第一个基于强化学习的框架，可实现 VLM 推理的零数据自演化。MM-Zero 突破了先前的双重角色（提议者和求解者）设置，引入了一个多角色自演化训练框架，该框架包含三个专门的角色：一个提议者，用于生成抽象的视觉概念并提出问题；一个编码器，用于将这些概念转换为可执行代码（例如，Python、SVG）以渲染视觉图像；以及一个求解器，用于对生成的视觉内容执行多模态推理。所有三个角色都从同一个基础模型初始化，并使用组相对策略优化（GRPO）进行训练，并结合精心设计的奖励机制，该机制集成了执行反馈、视觉验证和难度平衡。我们的实验表明，MM-Zero 提高了 VLM 在各种多模态基准测试中的推理性能。MM-Zero 为多模态模型的自演化多模型系统建立了一条可扩展的路径，将自我改进的前沿扩展到了传统的双模型范式之外。

TLDR: The paper introduces MM-Zero, a reinforcement learning-based framework that enables Vision Language Models to self-evolve from zero data by using a multi-role (Proposer, Coder, Solver) setup, showing improved performance on multimodal reasoning benchmarks.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了 MM-Zero，一个基于强化学习的框架，它使视觉语言模型能够在零数据的情况下自我进化，通过使用多角色（提议者、编码者、求解者）设置，并在多模态推理基准测试中表现出改进的性能。

Relevance: (9/10)
Novelty: (9/10)

Authors: Zongxia Li, Hongyang Du, Chengsong Huang, Xiyang Wu, Lantao Yu, Yicheng He, Jing Xie, Xiaomin Wu, Zhichao Liu, Jiarui Zhang, Fuxiao Liu

Comparative Analysis of Patch Attack on VLM-Based Autonomous Driving Architectures

Abstract (English): Vision-language models are emerging for autonomous driving, yet their robustness to physical adversarial attacks remains unexplored. This paper presents a systematic framework for comparative adversarial evaluation across three VLM architectures: Dolphins, OmniDrive (Omni-L), and LeapVAD. Using black-box optimization with semantic homogenization for fair comparison, we evaluate physically realizable patch attacks in CARLA simulation. Results reveal severe vulnerabilities across all architectures, sustained multi-frame failures, and critical object detection degradation. Our analysis exposes distinct architectural vulnerability patterns, demonstrating that current VLM designs inadequately address adversarial threats in safety-critical autonomous driving applications.

摘要（中文）: 视觉-语言模型正在崛起并应用于自动驾驶领域，然而，它们对物理对抗攻击的鲁棒性尚未得到探索。本文提出了一个系统的框架，用于对三种视觉-语言模型架构进行对比对抗评估：Dolphins、OmniDrive (Omni-L) 和 LeapVAD。我们采用基于语义同质化的黑盒优化方法以实现公平比较，并在CARLA模拟环境中评估了物理可实现的补丁攻击。结果显示，所有架构都存在严重的漏洞，可持续产生多帧失效，并造成关键目标检测的性能下降。我们的分析揭示了不同的架构脆弱性模式，表明当前的视觉-语言模型设计未能充分应对安全攸关型自动驾驶应用中的对抗威胁。

TLDR: This paper investigates the vulnerability of VLM-based autonomous driving architectures to patch attacks, revealing significant weaknesses across multiple models in CARLA simulations.

简要说明: 该论文研究了基于VLM的自动驾驶架构对补丁攻击的脆弱性，揭示了CARLA模拟中多个模型的重大弱点。

Relevance: (9/10)
Novelty: (7/10)

Authors: David Fernandez, Pedram MohajerAnsari, Amir Salarpour, Long Cheng, Abolfazl Razi, Mert D. Pesé

VisionCreator-R1: A Reflection-Enhanced Native Visual-Generation Agentic Model

Abstract (English): Visual content generation has advanced from single-image to multi-image workflows, yet existing agents remain largely plan-driven and lack systematic reflection mechanisms to correct mid-trajectory visual errors. To address this limitation, we propose VisionCreator-R1, a native visual generation agent with explicit reflection, together with a Reflection-Plan Co-Optimization (RPCO) training methodology. Through extensive experiments and trajectory-level analysis, we uncover reflection-plan optimization asymmetry in reinforcement learning (RL): planning can be reliably optimized via plan rewards, while reflection learning is hindered by noisy credit assignment. Guided by this insight, our RPCO first trains on the self-constructed VCR-SFT dataset with reflection-strong single-image trajectories and planning-strong multi-image trajectories, then co-optimization on VCR-RL dataset via RL. This yields our unified VisionCreator-R1 agent, which consistently outperforms Gemini2.5Pro on existing benchmarks and our VCR-bench covering single-image and multi-image tasks.

摘要（中文）: 视觉内容生成技术已从单图工作流发展到多图工作流，但现有智能体主要仍然是计划驱动的，缺乏系统的反思机制来纠正路径中的视觉错误。为了解决这一局限性，我们提出了具有显式反思的原生视觉生成智能体VisionCreator-R1，以及一种反思-计划协同优化（RPCO）训练方法。通过大量的实验和轨迹级分析，我们揭示了强化学习（RL）中反思-计划优化不对称性：计划可以通过计划奖励进行可靠的优化，而反思学习受到噪声信用分配的阻碍。基于这一洞见，我们的RPCO首先在自构建的VCR-SFT数据集上进行训练，该数据集包含反思性强的单图轨迹和计划性强的多图轨迹，然后通过RL在VCR-RL数据集上进行协同优化。这产生了我们的统一VisionCreator-R1智能体，在现有基准测试和我们涵盖单图和多图任务的VCR-bench上，性能始终优于Gemini2.5Pro。

TLDR: The paper introduces VisionCreator-R1, a visual generation agent that uses explicit reflection mechanisms to correct errors in multi-image workflows, trained with a Reflection-Plan Co-Optimization (RPCO) method which outperforms Gemini2.5Pro.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了 VisionCreator-R1，一种视觉生成代理，它使用显式反射机制来纠正多图像工作流程中的错误，并使用反射-计划协同优化 (RPCO) 方法进行训练，其性能优于 Gemini2.5Pro。

Relevance: (8/10)
Novelty: (9/10)
Clarity: (8/10)

Authors: Jinxiang Lai, Wenzhe Zhao, Zexin Lu, Hualei Zhang, Qinyu Yang, Rongwei Quan, Zhimin Li, Shuai Shao, Song Guo, Qinglin Lu

Good Reasoning Makes Good Demonstrations: Implicit Reasoning Quality Supervision via In-Context Reinforcement Learning

Abstract (English): Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) improves reasoning in large language models but treats all correct solutions equally, potentially reinforcing flawed traces that get correct answers by chance. We observe that better reasoning are better teachers: high-quality solutions serve as more effective demonstrations than low-quality ones. We term this teaching ability Demonstration Utility, and show that the policy model's own in-context learning ability provides an efficient way to measure it, yielding a quality signal termed Evidence Gain. To employ this signal during training, we introduce In-Context RLVR. By Bayesian analysis, we show that this objective implicitly reweights rewards by Evidence Gain, assigning higher weights to high-quality traces and lower weights to low-quality ones, without requiring costly computation or external evaluators. Experiments on mathematical benchmarks show improvements in both accuracy and reasoning quality over standard RLVR.

摘要（中文）: 具有可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）能够提升大型语言模型的推理能力，但它平等对待所有正确的解，可能会强化通过偶然巧合获得正确答案的有缺陷的推理过程。我们观察到，更好的推理过程是更好的教师：高质量的解能够比低质量的解提供更有效的示范。我们将这种教学能力称为示范效用（Demonstration Utility），并证明策略模型自身的上下文学习能力提供了一种衡量它的有效方法，从而产生一个质量信号，称为证据增益（Evidence Gain）。为了在训练过程中利用这种信号，我们引入了上下文强化学习（In-Context RLVR）。通过贝叶斯分析，我们表明该目标隐式地根据证据增益重新加权奖励，从而为高质量的推理过程分配更高的权重，为低质量的推理过程分配更低的权重，而无需昂贵的计算或外部评估器。在数学基准测试上的实验表明，与标准RLVR相比，在准确性和推理质量方面都有所提高。

TLDR: The paper introduces In-Context RLVR, a method that improves reasoning in LLMs by implicitly weighting rewards based on the quality of reasoning traces, measured by their teaching ability (Evidence Gain), leading to improved accuracy and reasoning quality in mathematical benchmarks.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了上下文强化学习奖励验证（In-Context RLVR）方法，通过根据推理轨迹的质量（由其教学能力"证据增益"衡量）隐式地权重奖励，从而提高大型语言模型的推理能力， 并在数学基准测试中提高了准确性和推理质量。

Relevance: (9/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (8/10)
Overall: (8/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Tiehua Mei, Minxuan Lv, Leiyu Pan, Zhenpeng Su, Hongru Hou, Hengrui Chen, Ao Xu, Deqing Yang

Impact of Markov Decision Process Design on Sim-to-Real Reinforcement Learning

Abstract (English): Reinforcement Learning (RL) has demonstrated strong potential for industrial process control, yet policies trained in simulation often suffer from a significant sim-to-real gap when deployed on physical hardware. This work systematically analyzes how core Markov Decision Process (MDP) design choices -- state composition, target inclusion, reward formulation, termination criteria, and environment dynamics models -- affect this transfer. Using a color mixing task, we evaluate different MDP configurations and mixing dynamics across simulation and real-world experiments. We validate our findings on physical hardware, demonstrating that physics-based dynamics models achieve up to 50% real-world success under strict precision constraints where simplified models fail entirely. Our results provide practical MDP design guidelines for deploying RL in industrial process control.

摘要（中文）: 强化学习（RL）已展现出在工业过程控制中的巨大潜力，但仿真环境中训练的策略在部署到物理硬件时，常常会受到显著的仿真到真实（sim-to-real）差距影响。本文系统性地分析了核心马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）设计选择——状态组成、目标包含、奖励函数构建、终止条件以及环境动力学模型——如何影响这种迁移。以颜色混合任务为例，我们在仿真和真实世界的实验中评估了不同的MDP配置和混合动力学。我们在物理硬件上验证了我们的发现，结果表明，在简化模型完全失效的情况下，基于物理学的动力学模型在严格的精度约束下，实现了高达50%的真实世界成功率。我们的研究结果为在工业过程控制中部署强化学习提供了实用的MDP设计指南。

TLDR: This paper investigates the impact of MDP design choices on sim-to-real transfer in reinforcement learning for industrial process control, providing practical guidelines for improved real-world performance.

简要说明: 该论文研究了MDP设计选择对工业过程控制中强化学习的模拟到真实转换的影响，并为改进现实世界性能提供了实用指南。

Relevance: (8/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (8/10)
Overall: (8/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Tatjana Krau, Jorge Mandlmaier, Tobias Damm, Frieder Heieck

Reward-Zero: Language Embedding Driven Implicit Reward Mechanisms for Reinforcement Learning

Abstract (English): We introduce Reward-Zero, a general-purpose implicit reward mechanism that transforms natural-language task descriptions into dense, semantically grounded progress signals for reinforcement learning (RL). Reward-Zero serves as a simple yet sophisticated universal reward function that leverages language embeddings for efficient RL training. By comparing the embedding of a task specification with embeddings derived from an agent's interaction experience, Reward-Zero produces a continuous, semantically aligned sense-of-completion signal. This reward supplements sparse or delayed environmental feedback without requiring task-specific engineering. When integrated into standard RL frameworks, it accelerates exploration, stabilizes training, and enhances generalization across diverse tasks. Empirically, agents trained with Reward-Zero converge faster and achieve higher final success rates than conventional methods such as PPO with common reward-shaping baselines, successfully solving tasks that hand-designed rewards could not in some complex tasks. In addition, we develop a mini benchmark for the evaluation of completion sense during task execution via language embeddings. These results highlight the promise of language-driven implicit reward functions as a practical path toward more sample-efficient, generalizable, and scalable RL for embodied agents. Code will be released after peer review.

摘要（中文）: 我们引入了“零奖励机制”（Reward-Zero），这是一种通用的隐式奖励机制，它将自然语言的任务描述转化为密集的、语义对齐的进度信号，用于强化学习（RL）。零奖励机制是一种简单而精巧的通用奖励函数，它利用语言嵌入进行高效的强化学习训练。通过比较任务规范的嵌入与从智能体交互经验中导出的嵌入，零奖励机制产生一个连续的、语义对齐的完成感信号。这种奖励在不需要进行特定于任务的工程设计的情况下，补充了稀疏的或延迟的环境反馈。当集成到标准强化学习框架中时，它可以加速探索、稳定训练并增强在各种任务中的泛化能力。经验表明，使用零奖励机制训练的智能体比使用常见奖励塑造基线（例如PPO）的传统方法收敛更快，并且获得了更高的最终成功率，成功解决了某些复杂任务中手动设计的奖励无法解决的任务。此外，我们开发了一个小型基准测试，用于通过语言嵌入评估任务执行期间的完成感。这些结果突出了语言驱动的隐式奖励函数作为一种实用途径的潜力，可以实现更具样本效率、更具泛化性和可扩展性的具身智能体强化学习。代码将在同行评审后发布。

TLDR: The paper introduces Reward-Zero, an implicit reward mechanism that uses language embeddings to provide dense, semantically-grounded progress signals for RL, improving sample efficiency, generalization, and success rates in complex tasks.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了 Reward-Zero，一种隐式奖励机制，它使用语言嵌入为强化学习提供密集的、语义相关的进度信号，从而提高复杂任务中的样本效率、泛化性和成功率。

Relevance: (9/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (8/10)
Overall: (8/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Heng Zhang, Haddy Alchaer, Arash Ajoudani, Yu She

Beyond Test-Time Training: Learning to Reason via Hardware-Efficient Optimal Control

Abstract (English): Associative memory has long underpinned the design of sequential models. Beyond recall, humans reason by projecting future states and selecting goal-directed actions, a capability that modern language models increasingly require but do not natively encode. While prior work uses reinforcement learning or test-time training, planning remains external to the model architecture. We formulate reasoning as optimal control and introduce the Test-Time Control (TTC) layer, which performs finite-horizon LQR planning over latent states at inference time, represents a value function within neural architectures, and leverages it as the nested objective to enable planning before prediction. To ensure scalability, we derive a hardware-efficient LQR solver based on a symplectic formulation and implement it as a fused CUDA kernel, enabling parallel execution with minimal overhead. Integrated as an adapter into pretrained LLMs, TTC layers improve mathematical reasoning performance by up to +27.8% on MATH-500 and 2-3x Pass@8 improvements on AMC and AIME, demonstrating that embedding optimal control as an architectural component provides an effective and scalable mechanism for reasoning beyond test-time training.

摘要（中文）: 联想记忆长期以来支撑着序列模型的设计。除了回忆之外，人类通过预测未来状态并选择目标导向的行动来进行推理，现代语言模型越来越需要这种能力，但其本身并不具备。虽然先前的工作采用了强化学习或测试时训练，但规划仍然位于模型架构之外。我们将推理形式化为最优控制，并引入测试时控制（TTC）层，该层在推理时对潜在状态执行有限时域LQR规划，在神经架构中表示价值函数，并利用它作为嵌套目标来实现预测之前的规划。为了确保可扩展性，我们推导出一种基于辛形式的硬件高效LQR求解器，并将其实现为融合的CUDA内核，从而以最小的开销实现并行执行。作为适配器集成到预训练的LLM中，TTC层在MATH-500上将数学推理性能提高高达+27.8%，在AMC和AIME上将Pass@8指标提高2-3倍，表明将最优控制嵌入为架构组件提供了一种有效且可扩展的机制，用于超越测试时训练的推理。

TLDR: The paper introduces a Test-Time Control (TTC) layer based on optimal control for improving reasoning in LLMs, demonstrating significant performance gains on mathematical problem-solving tasks with a hardware-efficient LQR solver.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一种基于最优控制的测试时控制(TTC)层，用于提高大型语言模型的推理能力，并通过硬件高效的LQR求解器，在数学问题求解任务上表现出显著的性能提升。

Relevance: (8/10)
Novelty: (9/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (8/10)
Overall: (8/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Peihao Wang, Shan Yang, Xijun Wang, Tesi Xiao, Xin Liu, Changlong Yu, Yu Lou, Pan Li, Zhangyang Wang, Ming Lin, René Vidal

Improving Search Agent with One Line of Code

Abstract (English): Tool-based Agentic Reinforcement Learning (TARL) has emerged as a promising paradigm for training search agents to interact with external tools for a multi-turn information-seeking process autonomously. However, we identify a critical training instability that leads to catastrophic model collapse: Importance Sampling Distribution Drift(ISDD). In Group Relative Policy Optimization(GRPO), a widely adopted TARL algorithm, ISDD manifests as a precipitous decline in the importance sampling ratios, which nullifies gradient updates and triggers irreversible training failure. To address this, we propose \textbf{S}earch \textbf{A}gent \textbf{P}olicy \textbf{O}ptimization (\textbf{SAPO}), which stabilizes training via a conditional token-level KL constraint. Unlike hard clipping, which ignores distributional divergence, SAPO selectively penalizes the KL divergence between the current and old policies. Crucially, this penalty is applied only to positive tokens with low probabilities where the policy has shifted excessively, thereby preventing distribution drift while preserving gradient flow. Remarkably, SAPO requires only one-line code modification to standard GRPO, ensuring immediate deployability. Extensive experiments across seven QA benchmarks demonstrate that SAPO achieves \textbf{+10.6\% absolute improvement} (+31.5\% relative) over Search-R1, yielding consistent gains across varying model scales (1.5B, 14B) and families (Qwen, LLaMA).

摘要（中文）: 基于工具的智能体强化学习 (TARL) 已成为训练搜索智能体自主地与外部工具交互以进行多轮信息搜索过程的一种有前景的范式。然而，我们发现了一个导致灾难性模型崩溃的关键训练不稳定性：重要性采样分布漂移 (ISDD)。在被广泛采用的 TARL 算法——群体相对策略优化 (GRPO) 中，ISDD 表现为重要性采样比率的急剧下降，这会使梯度更新失效并引发不可逆转的训练失败。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 \textbf{S}earch \textbf{A}gent \textbf{P}olicy \textbf{O}ptimization (\textbf{SAPO)，即\textbf{搜索智能体策略优化}}，它通过条件令牌级 KL 约束来稳定训练。与忽略分布差异的硬裁剪不同，SAPO 选择性地惩罚当前策略和旧策略之间的 KL 散度。至关重要的是，这种惩罚仅应用于具有低概率的正向令牌，在这些令牌中，策略已经过度偏移，从而防止了分布漂移，同时保留了梯度流。值得注意的是，SAPO 仅需对标准 GRPO 进行单行代码修改，从而确保了其即时部署能力。在七个 QA 基准测试中进行的大量实验表明，SAPO 相对于 Search-R1 实现了 \textbf{+10.6\% 的绝对改进}（+31.5\% 的相对改进），并在不同的模型规模（1.5B、14B）和系列（Qwen、LLaMA）中获得了持续的收益。

TLDR: The paper introduces SAPO, a one-line code modification to the GRPO algorithm within Tool-based Agentic Reinforcement Learning (TARL) that addresses the issue of Importance Sampling Distribution Drift (ISDD) and achieves significant performance improvements in search agents across various QA benchmarks.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了SAPO，一种对基于工具的Agentic强化学习（TARL）中GRPO算法的单行代码修改，旨在解决重要性采样分布漂移（ISDD）问题，并在各种QA基准测试中显著提高了搜索代理的性能。

Relevance: (8/10)
Novelty: (9/10)
Clarity: (8/10)

Authors: Jian Li, Dongsheng Chen, Zhenhua Xu, Yizhang Jin, Jiafu Wu, Chengjie Wang, Xiaotong Yuan, Yabiao Wang

Overcoming Valid Action Suppression in Unmasked Policy Gradient Algorithms

Abstract (English): In reinforcement learning environments with state-dependent action validity, action masking consistently outperforms penalty-based handling of invalid actions, yet existing theory only shows that masking preserves the policy gradient theorem. We identify a distinct failure mode of unmasked training: it systematically suppresses valid actions at states the agent has not yet visited. This occurs because gradients pushing down invalid actions at visited states propagate through shared network parameters to unvisited states where those actions are valid. We prove that for softmax policies with shared features, when an action is invalid at visited states but valid at an unvisited state $s^*$, the probability $π(a \mid s^*)$ is bounded by exponential decay due to parameter sharing and the zero-sum identity of softmax logits. This bound reveals that entropy regularization trades off between protecting valid actions and sample efficiency, a tradeoff that masking eliminates. We validate empirically that deep networks exhibit the feature alignment condition required for suppression, and experiments on Craftax, Craftax-Classic, and MiniHack confirm the predicted exponential suppression and demonstrate that feasibility classification enables deployment without oracle masks.

摘要（中文）: 在具有状态依赖性动作有效性的强化学习环境中，动作掩码始终优于基于惩罚处理无效动作的方法，然而现有的理论仅证明掩码保留了策略梯度定理。我们识别出未掩码训练的一种独特失效模式：它系统性地抑制了智能体尚未访问状态中的有效动作。 这种现象的发生是由于在已访问状态下降低无效动作的梯度通过共享网络参数传播到那些动作有效的未访问状态。 我们证明，对于具有共享特征的 softmax 策略，当一个动作在已访问状态下无效但在一个未访问状态 $s^*$ 下有效时，由于参数共享和 softmax logits 的零和恒等式，概率 $π(a \mid s^*)$ 受指数衰减限制。这个界限表明，熵正则化在保护有效动作和样本效率之间进行权衡，而掩码消除了这种权衡。我们通过实验验证了深度网络表现出抑制所需的特征对齐条件，并且在 Craftax、Craftax-Classic 和 MiniHack 上的实验证实了预测的指数抑制，并证明了可行性分类能够实现无需预言机掩码的部署。

TLDR: This paper identifies and proves a failure mode in unmasked policy gradient methods where valid actions are suppressed due to gradient propagation from invalid actions in visited states, and proposes a solution using feasibility classification.

简要说明: 本文指出并证明了未使用掩码的策略梯度方法中的一种失效模式：由于已访问状态下无效动作的梯度传播，导致有效动作被抑制。文章提出了一种通过可行性分类来解决该问题的方法。

Authors: Renos Zabounidis, Roy Siegelmann, Mohamad Qadri, Woojun Kim, Simon Stepputtis, Katia P. Sycara

SCALAR: Learning and Composing Skills through LLM Guided Symbolic Planning and Deep RL Grounding

Abstract (English): LM-based agents excel when given high-level action APIs but struggle to ground language into low-level control. Prior work has LLMs generate skills or reward functions for RL, but these one-shot approaches lack feedback to correct specification errors. We introduce SCALAR, a bidirectional framework coupling LLM planning with RL through a learned skill library. The LLM proposes skills with preconditions and effects; RL trains policies for each skill and feeds back execution results to iteratively refine specifications, improving robustness to initial errors. Pivotal Trajectory Analysis corrects LLM priors by analyzing RL trajectories; Frontier Checkpointing optionally saves environment states at skill boundaries to improve sample efficiency. On Craftax, SCALAR achieves 88.2% diamond collection, a 1.9x improvement over the best baseline, and reaches the Gnomish Mines 9.1% of the time where prior methods fail entirely.

摘要（中文）: 基于语言模型（LM）的智能体在高层动作API下表现出色，但在将语言扎根于底层控制方面举步维艰。先前的工作让大型语言模型（LLM）为强化学习（RL）生成技能或奖励函数，但这些一次性方法缺乏反馈来纠正规范错误。我们引入了一种双向框架SCALAR，它通过学习到的技能库将LLM规划与RL结合起来。LLM提出具有前提条件和效果的技能；RL训练每个技能的策略，并将执行结果反馈回去，以迭代地细化规范，从而提高对初始错误的鲁棒性。关键轨迹分析(Pivotal Trajectory Analysis)通过分析RL轨迹来纠正LLM先验；前沿检查点(Frontier Checkpointing)选择性地保存技能边界处的环境状态，以提高样本效率。在Craftax上，SCALAR实现了88.2%的钻石收集率，比最佳基线提高了1.9倍，并且有9.1%的时间到达Gnomish Mines，而先前的方法完全失败。

TLDR: SCALAR is a framework that combines LLM planning with RL through a learned skill library, using feedback from RL to iteratively refine LLM-proposed skill specifications. It shows substantial improvement on the Craftax environment.

简要说明: SCALAR是一个结合了LLM规划和RL的框架，通过学习到的技能库，利用来自RL的反馈迭代地优化LLM提出的技能规范。在Craftax环境中表现出显著改进。

Relevance: (9/10)
Novelty: (8/10)

Authors: Renos Zabounidis, Yue Wu, Simon Stepputtis, Woojun Kim, Yuanzhi Li, Tom Mitchell, Katia Sycara

Kinodynamic Motion Retargeting for Humanoid Locomotion via Multi-Contact Whole-Body Trajectory Optimization

Abstract (English): We present the KinoDynamic Motion Retargeting (KDMR) framework, a novel approach for humanoid locomotion that models the retargeting process as a multi-contact, whole-body trajectory optimization problem. Conventional kinematics-based retargeting methods rely solely on spatial motion capture (MoCap) data, inevitably introducing physically inconsistent artifacts, such as foot sliding and ground penetration, that severely degrade the performance of downstream imitation learning policies. To bridge this gap, KDMR extends beyond pure kinematics by explicitly enforcing rigid-body dynamics and contact complementarity constraints. Further, by integrating ground reaction force (GRF) measurements alongside MoCap data, our method automatically detects heel-toe contact events to accurately replicate complex human-like contact patterns. We evaluate KDMR against the state-of-the-art baseline, GMR, across three key dimensions: 1) the dynamic feasibility and smoothness of the retargeted motions, 2) the accuracy of GRF tracking compared to raw source data, and 3) the training efficiency and final performance of downstream control policies trained via the BeyondMimic framework. Experimental results demonstrate that KDMR significantly outperforms purely kinematic methods, yielding dynamically viable reference trajectories that accelerate policy convergence and enhance overall locomotion stability. Our end-to-end pipeline will be open-sourced upon publication.

摘要（中文）: 我们提出了运动动力学运动重定向（KDMR）框架，一种用于类人生物运动的新颖方法，该方法将重定向过程建模为一个多接触、全身轨迹优化问题。传统的基于运动学的重定向方法仅依赖于空间动作捕捉（MoCap）数据，不可避免地引入物理上不一致的伪影，例如脚部滑动和地面穿透，这严重降低了下游模仿学习策略的性能。为了弥合这一差距，KDMR通过显式地实施刚体动力学和接触互补约束，扩展到纯粹的运动学之外。此外，通过整合地面反作用力（GRF）测量结果以及MoCap数据，我们的方法自动检测跟-趾接触事件，以准确地复制复杂的人类式接触模式。我们在三个关键维度上，针对最先进的基线GMR评估了KDMR：1）重定向运动的动态可行性和平滑性，2）GRF跟踪与原始源数据的准确性，以及3）通过BeyondMimic框架训练的下游控制策略的训练效率和最终性能。实验结果表明，KDMR显著优于纯粹的运动学方法，产生动态可行的参考轨迹，加速策略收敛并提高整体运动稳定性。我们的端到端流程将在发布后开源。

TLDR: The paper introduces KinoDynamic Motion Retargeting (KDMR), a method for generating dynamically feasible humanoid locomotion trajectories by incorporating dynamics and contact constraints during motion retargeting, leading to improved imitation learning policies.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了KinoDynamic运动重定向（KDMR）方法，通过在运动重定向过程中加入动力学和接触约束，生成动态可行的人形机器人运动轨迹，从而改进模仿学习策略。

Authors: Xiaoyu Zhang, Steven Haener, Varun Madabushi, Maegan Tucker

NanoBench: A Multi-Task Benchmark Dataset for Nano-Quadrotor System Identification, Control, and State Estimation

Abstract (English): Existing aerial-robotics benchmarks target vehicles from hundreds of grams to several kilograms and typically expose only high-level state data. They omit the actuator-level signals required to study nano-scale quadrotors, where low-Reynolds number aerodynamics, coreless DC motor nonlinearities, and severe computational constraints invalidate models and controllers developed for larger vehicles. We introduce NanoBench, an open-source multi-task benchmark collected on the commercially available Crazyflie 2.1 nano-quadrotor (takeoff weight 27 g) in a Vicon motion capture arena. The dataset contains over 170 flight trajectories spanning hover, multi-frequency excitation, standard tracking, and aggressive maneuvers across multiple speed regimes. Each trajectory provides synchronized Vicon ground truth, raw IMU data, onboard extended Kalman filter estimates, PID controller internals, and motor PWM commands at 100 Hz, alongside battery telemetry at 10 Hz, aligned with sub-0.5 ms consistency. NanoBench defines standardized evaluation protocols, train/test splits, and open-source baselines for three tasks: nonlinear system identification, closed-loop controller benchmarking, and onboard state estimation assessment. To our knowledge, it is the first public dataset to jointly provide actuator commands, controller internals, and estimator outputs with millimeter-accurate ground truth on a commercially available nano-scale aerial platform.

摘要（中文）: 现有无人机基准测试主要针对几百克到几千克的飞行器，且通常仅公开高层状态数据。它们忽略了研究纳米级四旋翼飞行器所需的执行器层面的信号，而纳米级四旋翼飞行器中，低雷诺数空气动力学、无芯直流电机非线性以及严峻的计算约束使得为大型飞行器开发的模型和控制器失效。我们推出了NanoBench，这是一个开源的多任务基准测试，基于市售的 Crazyflie 2.1 纳米四旋翼飞行器（起飞重量27克）在Vicon运动捕捉场地中收集。该数据集包含超过170条飞行轨迹，涵盖悬停、多频激励、标准跟踪以及跨多个速度范围的激烈机动。每条轨迹以100Hz的频率提供同步的Vicon真值、原始IMU数据、机载扩展卡尔曼滤波器估计值、PID控制器内部参数和电机PWM指令，以及以10Hz频率采样的电池遥测数据，并保持亚0.5毫秒的一致性。NanoBench定义了标准化的评估协议、训练/测试集划分，以及针对三个任务的开源基线：非线性系统辨识、闭环控制器基准测试和机载状态估计评估。据我们所知，它是第一个在市售纳米级无人机平台上共同提供执行器指令、控制器内部参数和估计器输出，且具有毫米级精度真值的公开数据集。

TLDR: The paper introduces NanoBench, a novel multi-task benchmark dataset for nano-quadrotor research, providing synchronized actuator-level data and standardized evaluation protocols for system identification, control, and state estimation.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了NanoBench，一种用于纳米四旋翼研究的多任务基准数据集，为系统辨识、控制和状态估计提供同步的执行器级数据和标准化的评估协议。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Syed Izzat Ullah, Jose Baca

TIMID: Time-Dependent Mistake Detection in Videos of Robot Executions

Abstract (English): As robotic systems execute increasingly difficult task sequences, so does the number of ways in which they can fail. Video Anomaly Detection (VAD) frameworks typically focus on singular, low-level kinematic or action failures, struggling to identify more complex temporal or spatial task violations, because they do not necessarily manifest as low-level execution errors. To address this problem, the main contribution of this paper is a new VAD-inspired architecture, TIMID, which is able to detect robot time-dependent mistakes when executing high-level tasks. Our architecture receives as inputs a video and prompts of the task and the potential mistake, and returns a frame-level prediction in the video of whether the mistake is present or not. By adopting a VAD formulation, the model can be trained with weak supervision, requiring only a single label per video. Additionally, to alleviate the problem of data scarcity of incorrect executions, we introduce a multi-robot simulation dataset with controlled temporal errors and real executions for zero-shot sim-to-real evaluation. Our experiments demonstrate that out-of-the-box VLMs lack the explicit temporal reasoning required for this task, whereas our framework successfully detects different types of temporal errors. Project: https://ropertunizar.github.io/TIMID/

摘要（中文）: 随着机器人系统执行日益复杂的任务序列，它们可能失败的方式也随之增多。视频异常检测 (VAD) 框架通常侧重于单一的低级运动学或动作失败，难以识别更复杂的时序或空间任务违规，因为它们不一定表现为低级执行错误。为了解决这个问题，本文的主要贡献是一种新的受 VAD 启发的架构 TIMID，它能够检测机器人执行高级任务时的时间相关错误。我们的架构接收视频以及任务和潜在错误的提示作为输入，并返回视频中帧级别的预测，表明是否存在错误。通过采用 VAD 公式，该模型可以使用弱监督进行训练，每个视频仅需一个标签。此外，为了缓解不正确执行数据的稀缺性问题，我们引入了一个多机器人仿真数据集，其中包含可控的时间误差，并提供真实的执行情况用于零样本的仿真到现实评估。我们的实验表明，开箱即用的视觉语言模型 (VLM) 缺乏完成此任务所需的显式时间推理能力，而我们的框架成功地检测出不同类型的时序错误。项目地址：https://ropertunizar.github.io/TIMID/

TLDR: The paper introduces TIMID, a VAD-inspired architecture for detecting time-dependent mistakes in robot executions using video and task prompts, trained with weak supervision on a new multi-robot simulation dataset. It addresses the limitations of VLMs in temporal reasoning for error detection.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一种名为TIMID的架构，它受到视频异常检测（VAD）的启发，用于检测机器人执行过程中的时间依赖性错误。该架构使用视频和任务提示作为输入，并使用在新的多机器人模拟数据集上进行弱监督训练。该研究旨在解决VLM在时间推理方面，于错误检测时的局限性。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Nerea Gallego, Fernando Salanova, Claudio Mannarano, Cristian Mahulea, Eduardo Montijano

MuxGel: Simultaneous Dual-Modal Visuo-Tactile Sensing via Spatially Multiplexing and Deep Reconstruction

Abstract (English): High-fidelity visuo-tactile sensing is important for precise robotic manipulation. However, most vision-based tactile sensors face a fundamental trade-off: opaque coatings enable tactile sensing but block pre-contact vision. To address this, we propose MuxGel, a spatially multiplexed sensor that captures both external visual information and contact-induced tactile signals through a single camera. By using a checkerboard coating pattern, MuxGel interleaves tactile-sensitive regions with transparent windows for external vision. This design maintains standard form factors, allowing for plug-and-play integration into GelSight-style sensors by simply replacing the gel pad. To recover full-resolution vision and tactile signals from the multiplexed inputs, we develop a U-Net-based reconstruction framework. Leveraging a sim-to-real pipeline, our model effectively decouples and restores high-fidelity tactile and visual fields simultaneously. Experiments on unseen objects demonstrate the framework's generalization and accuracy. Furthermore, we demonstrate MuxGel's utility in grasping tasks, where dual-modality feedback facilitates both pre-contact alignment and post-contact interaction. Results show that MuxGel enhances the perceptual capabilities of existing vision-based tactile sensors while maintaining compatibility with their hardware stacks. Project webpage: https://zhixianhu.github.io/muxgel/.

摘要（中文）: 高保真视觉触觉感知对于精确的机器人操作至关重要。然而，大多数基于视觉的触觉传感器面临一个根本性的权衡：不透明涂层能够实现触觉感知，但会阻碍接触前的视觉信息获取。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种空间复用传感器MuxGel，该传感器通过单个摄像头同时捕获外部视觉信息和接触引起的触觉信号。通过使用棋盘格涂层图案，MuxGel将触觉敏感区域与用于外部视觉的透明窗口交错排列。这种设计保持了标准的外形尺寸，只需更换凝胶垫即可即插即用地集成到GelSight风格的传感器中。为了从复用的输入中恢复全分辨率的视觉和触觉信号，我们开发了一种基于U-Net的重建框架。利用从仿真到真实的流程，我们的模型能够有效地解耦并恢复高保真的触觉和视觉场。对未见物体的实验证明了该框架的泛化性和准确性。此外，我们展示了MuxGel在抓取任务中的应用，双模态反馈有助于接触前的对准和接触后的交互。结果表明，MuxGel增强了现有基于视觉的触觉传感器的感知能力，同时保持了与它们硬件堆栈的兼容性。项目网页：https://zhixianhu.github.io/muxgel/。

TLDR: MuxGel introduces a spatially multiplexed visuo-tactile sensor using a checkerboard coating and U-Net reconstruction to capture both visual and tactile information, improving robotic manipulation through enhanced perceptual capabilities.

简要说明: MuxGel 提出了一种空间复用的视觉触觉传感器，它利用棋盘格涂层和 U-Net 重建来同时捕获视觉和触觉信息，从而通过增强感知能力来改进机器人操作。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (8/10)

Authors: Zhixian Hu, Zhengtong Xu, Sheeraz Athar, Juan Wachs, Yu She

PanoAffordanceNet: Towards Holistic Affordance Grounding in 360° Indoor Environments

Abstract (English): Global perception is essential for embodied agents in 360° spaces, yet current affordance grounding remains largely object-centric and restricted to perspective views. To bridge this gap, we introduce a novel task: Holistic Affordance Grounding in 360° Indoor Environments. This task faces unique challenges, including severe geometric distortions from Equirectangular Projection (ERP), semantic dispersion, and cross-scale alignment difficulties. We propose PanoAffordanceNet, an end-to-end framework featuring a Distortion-Aware Spectral Modulator (DASM) for latitude-dependent calibration and an Omni-Spherical Densification Head (OSDH) to restore topological continuity from sparse activations. By integrating multi-level constraints comprising pixel-wise, distributional, and region-text contrastive objectives, our framework effectively suppresses semantic drift under low supervision. Furthermore, we construct 360-AGD, the first high-quality panoramic affordance grounding dataset. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PanoAffordanceNet significantly outperforms existing methods, establishing a solid baseline for scene-level perception in embodied intelligence. The source code and benchmark dataset will be made publicly available at https://github.com/GL-ZHU925/PanoAffordanceNet.

摘要（中文）: 全局感知对于360°空间中的具身智能体至关重要，然而，目前的示能性推断主要还是以物体为中心，且局限于透视视角。为了弥补这一差距，我们引入了一项新的任务：360°室内环境下的整体示能性推断。此任务面临着独特的挑战，包括来自等距柱状投影（ERP）的严重几何失真、语义分散和跨尺度对齐困难。我们提出了PanoAffordanceNet，一个端到端的框架，其包含一个用于纬度依赖校准的失真感知频谱调制器（DASM）和一个用于从稀疏激活中恢复拓扑连续性的全向球形密集化头（OSDH）。通过集成包含像素级、分布级和区域-文本对比目标的多个级别约束，我们的框架有效地抑制了低监督下的语义漂移。此外，我们构建了360-AGD，第一个高质量的 panoramic 示能性推断数据集。大量实验表明，PanoAffordanceNet 显著优于现有的方法，为具身智能中的场景级感知建立了坚实的基础。源代码和基准数据集将在 https://github.com/GL-ZHU925/PanoAffordanceNet 上公开。

TLDR: The paper introduces PanoAffordanceNet for holistic affordance grounding in 360° indoor environments, addressing challenges like geometric distortions and semantic dispersion, along with a new dataset, 360-AGD.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了 PanoAffordanceNet，用于在 360° 室内环境中进行整体可供性 (affordance) 基础任务。 其解决了诸如几何失真和语义分散等挑战, 并提出了一个新的数据集 360-AGD。

Novelty: (8/10)

Authors: Guoliang Zhu, Wanjun Jia, Caoyang Shao, Yuheng Zhang, Zhiyong Li, Kailun Yang

ReTac-ACT: A State-Gated Vision-Tactile Fusion Transformer for Precision Assembly

Abstract (English): Precision assembly requires sub-millimeter corrections in contact-rich "last-millimeter" regions where visual feedback fails due to occlusion from the end-effector and workpiece. We present ReTac-ACT (Reconstruction-enhanced Tactile ACT), a vision-tactile imitation learning policy that addresses this challenge through three synergistic mechanisms: (i) bidirectional cross-attention enabling reciprocal visuo-tactile feature enhancement before fusion, (ii) a proprioception-conditioned gating network that dynamically elevates tactile reliance when visual occlusion occurs, and (iii) a tactile reconstruction objective enforcing learning of manipulation-relevant contact information rather than generic visual textures. Evaluated on the standardized NIST Assembly Task Board M1 benchmark, ReTac-ACT achieves 90% peg-in-hole success, substantially outperforming vision-only and generalist baseline methods, and maintains 80% success at industrial-grade 0.1mm clearance. Ablation studies validate that each architectural component is indispensable. The ReTac-ACT codebase and a vision-tactile demonstration dataset covering various clearance levels with both visual and tactile features will be released to support reproducible research.

摘要（中文）: 精密装配需要在富含接触的“最后毫米”区域进行亚毫米级的校正，而在这些区域，由于末端执行器和工件的遮挡，视觉反馈会失效。我们提出了 ReTac-ACT (重建增强型触觉 ACT)，这是一个视觉-触觉模仿学习策略，它通过三种协同机制来解决这个挑战：（i）双向交叉注意力，在融合前实现互惠的视觉-触觉特征增强，（ii）一种本体感受条件门控网络，可在视觉遮挡发生时动态提升触觉依赖性，以及（iii）一种触觉重建目标，它强制学习与操作相关的接触信息，而不是通用的视觉纹理。在标准化的 NIST 装配任务板 M1 基准上评估，ReTac-ACT 实现了 90% 的销钉插入孔成功率，显著优于仅视觉和通用基线方法，并在工业级的 0.1 毫米间隙下保持了 80% 的成功率。消融研究验证了每个架构组件都是不可或缺的。ReTac-ACT 代码库以及涵盖各种间隙级别且包含视觉和触觉特征的视觉-触觉演示数据集将被发布，以支持可重复的研究。

TLDR: ReTac-ACT, a vision-tactile imitation learning policy, uses a transformer architecture with state-gating and tactile reconstruction to achieve high success rates in precision assembly tasks, even with visual occlusion.

简要说明: ReTac-ACT是一个视觉-触觉模仿学习策略，它使用具有状态门控和触觉重建的 Transformer 架构，即使在视觉遮挡的情况下也能在精密装配任务中实现高成功率。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)

Authors: Minchi Ruan, LiangQing Zhou, Hongtong Li, Zongtao Wang, ZhaoMing Lu, Jianwei Zhang, Bin Fang

Stein Variational Ergodic Surface Coverage with SE(3) Constraints

Abstract (English): Surface manipulation tasks require robots to generate trajectories that comprehensively cover complex 3D surfaces while maintaining precise end-effector poses. Existing ergodic trajectory optimization (TO) methods demonstrate success in coverage tasks, while struggling with point-cloud targets due to the nonconvex optimization landscapes and the inadequate handling of SE(3) constraints in sampling-as-optimization (SAO) techniques. In this work, we introduce a preconditioned SE(3) Stein Variational Gradient Descent (SVGD) approach for SAO ergodic trajectory generation. Our proposed approach comprises multiple innovations. First, we reformulate point-cloud ergodic coverage as a manifold-aware sampling problem. Second, we derive SE(3)-specific SVGD particle updates, and, third, we develop a preconditioner to accelerate TO convergence. Our sampling-based framework consistently identifies superior local optima compared to strong optimization-based and SAO baselines while preserving the SE(3) geometric structure. Experiments on a 3D point-cloud surface coverage benchmark and robotic surface drawing tasks demonstrate that our method achieves superior coverage quality with tractable computation in our setting relative to existing TO and SAO approaches, and is validated in real-world robot experiments.

摘要（中文）: 表面操作任务要求机器人生成轨迹以全面覆盖复杂的3D表面，同时保持精确的末端执行器姿态。 现有的遍历轨迹优化（TO）方法在覆盖任务中表现出成功，但由于非凸优化格局以及采样即优化（SAO）技术对SE(3)约束的处理不足，因此在点云目标上存在困难。 在这项工作中，我们引入了一种预处理的SE(3) Stein变分梯度下降（SVGD）方法用于SAO遍历轨迹生成。 我们提出的方法包括多项创新。 首先，我们将点云遍历覆盖重新表述为流形感知的采样问题。 其次，我们推导出SE(3)特定的SVGD粒子更新，第三，我们开发了一种预处理器来加速TO收敛。 我们的基于采样的框架始终如一地识别出优于强大的基于优化的和SAO基线的局部最优解，同时保留了SE(3)几何结构。 在3D点云表面覆盖基准测试和机器人表面绘制任务中的实验表明，相对于现有的TO和SAO方法，我们的方法在我们的设置中实现了卓越的覆盖质量和可处理的计算，并在真实世界的机器人实验中得到了验证。

TLDR: This paper introduces a preconditioned SE(3) Stein Variational Gradient Descent (SVGD) approach for ergodic trajectory generation for robotic surface coverage tasks, improving coverage quality and handling SE(3) constraints better than existing methods.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种预处理的SE(3) Stein变分梯度下降（SVGD）方法，用于机器人表面覆盖任务中的遍历轨迹生成，比现有方法更好地提高了覆盖质量和处理了SE(3)约束。

Authors: Jiayun Li, Yufeng Jin, Sangli Teng, Dejian Gong, Georgia Chalvatzaki

Vision-Augmented On-Track System Identification for Autonomous Racing via Attention-Based Priors and Iterative Neural Correction

Abstract (English): Operating autonomous vehicles at the absolute limits of handling requires precise, real-time identification of highly non-linear tire dynamics. However, traditional online optimization methods suffer from "cold-start" initialization failures and struggle to model high-frequency transient dynamics. To address these bottlenecks, this paper proposes a novel vision-augmented, iterative system identification framework. First, a lightweight CNN (MobileNetV3) translates visual road textures into a continuous heuristic friction prior, providing a robust "warm-start" for parameter optimization. Next, a S4 model captures complex temporal dynamic residuals, circumventing the memory and latency limitations of traditional MLPs and RNNs. Finally, a derivative-free Nelder-Mead algorithm iteratively extracts physically interpretable Pacejka tire parameters via a hybrid virtual simulation. Co-simulation in CarSim demonstrates that the lightweight vision backbone reduces friction estimation error by 76.1 using 85 fewer FLOPs, accelerating cold-start convergence by 71.4. Furthermore, the S4-augmented framework improves parameter extraction accuracy and decreases lateral force RMSE by over 60 by effectively capturing complex vehicle dynamics, demonstrating superior performance compared to conventional neural architectures.

摘要（中文）: 在操控极限下运行自动驾驶车辆需要精确、实时地识别高度非线性的轮胎动力学。然而，传统的在线优化方法面临“冷启动”初始化失败的问题，并且难以建模高频瞬态动力学。为了解决这些瓶颈，本文提出了一种新的视觉增强、迭代系统辨识框架。首先，一个轻量级的CNN（MobileNetV3）将视觉道路纹理转化为连续的启发式摩擦先验，为参数优化提供了一个鲁棒的“热启动”。其次，一个S4模型捕捉复杂的时序动态残差，规避了传统MLP和RNN的内存和延迟限制。最后，一种无需导数的Nelder-Mead算法通过混合虚拟仿真迭代提取具有物理可解释性的Pacejka轮胎参数。在CarSim中的协同仿真表明，轻量级视觉骨干网络使用减少85个FLOPS的计算量，将摩擦估计误差降低了76.1，加速了冷启动收敛71.4%。此外，S4增强型框架提高了参数提取精度，并通过有效捕捉复杂的车辆动力学，将横向力RMSE降低了60%以上，从而展示出优于传统神经架构的性能。

TLDR: This paper presents a vision-augmented system identification framework for autonomous racing, using a CNN for friction estimation and an S4 model for capturing vehicle dynamics, demonstrating improved accuracy and convergence speed. It combines visual perception with system identification to tackle a challenging robotics problem.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种用于自动驾驶赛车的视觉增强型系统辨识框架，使用 CNN 进行摩擦估计，使用 S4 模型捕获车辆动力学，从而提高了精度和收敛速度。 它结合了视觉感知和系统辨识，以解决具有挑战性的机器人技术问题。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)

Authors: Zhiping Wu, Cheng Hu, Yiqin Wang, Lei Xie, Hongye Su

TRIP-Bag: A Portable Teleoperation System for Plug-and-Play Robotic Arms and Leaders

Abstract (English): Large scale, diverse demonstration data for manipulation tasks remains a major challenge in learning-based robot policies. Existing in-the-wild data collection approaches often rely on vision-based pose estimation of hand-held grippers or gloves, which introduces an embodiment gap between the collection platform and the target robot. Teleoperation systems eliminate the embodiment gap, but are typically impractical to deploy outside the laboratory environment. We propose TRIP-Bag (Teleoperation, Recording, Intelligence in a Portable Bag), a portable, puppeteer-style teleoperation system fully contained within a commercial suitcase, as a practical solution for collecting high-fidelity manipulation data across varied settings. With a setup time of under five minutes and direct joint-to-joint teleoperation, TRIP-Bag enables rapid and reliable data collection in any environment. We validated TRIP-Bag's usability through experiments with non-expert users, showing that the system is intuitive and easy to operate. Furthermore, we confirmed the quality of the collected data by training benchmark manipulation policies, demonstrating its value as a practical resource for robot learning.

摘要（中文）: 用于操控任务的大规模、多样化的演示数据仍然是基于学习的机器人策略面临的主要挑战。现有的自然场景数据收集方法通常依赖于基于视觉的手持夹具或手套姿态估计，这在收集平台和目标机器人之间引入了具身差异。遥操作系统消除了具身差异，但通常不适用于实验室环境之外的部署。我们提出TRIP-Bag（一个便携包中的遥操作、记录和智能），一种完全包含在商业行李箱内的便携式、木偶式遥操作系统，作为在各种环境下收集高保真操控数据的实用解决方案。TRIP-Bag设置时间不到五分钟，并且采用直接的关节到关节遥操作方式，能够在任何环境中快速可靠地收集数据。我们通过非专业用户的实验验证了TRIP-Bag的可用性，表明该系统直观且易于操作。此外，我们通过训练基准操控策略验证了所收集数据的质量，证明了其作为机器人学习实用资源的价值。

TLDR: The paper introduces TRIP-Bag, a portable teleoperation system designed for rapid collection of high-fidelity robot manipulation data in diverse environments, enabling the training of effective benchmark manipulation policies.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一种名为 TRIP-Bag 的便携式遥操作系统，旨在在不同环境中快速收集高保真机器人操作数据，从而能够训练有效的基准操作策略。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Noboru Myers, Sankalp Yamsani, Obin Kwon, Joohyung Kim

Embodied Human Simulation for Quantitative Design and Analysis of Interactive Robotics

Abstract (English): Physical interactive robotics, ranging from wearable devices to collaborative humanoid robots, require close coordination between mechanical design and control. However, evaluating interactive dynamics is challenging due to complex human biomechanics and motor responses. Traditional experiments rely on indirect metrics without measuring human internal states, such as muscle forces or joint loads. To address this issue, we develop a scalable simulation-based framework for the quantitative analysis of physical human-robot interaction. At its core is a full-body musculoskeletal model serving as a predictive surrogate for the human dynamical system. Driven by a reinforcement learning controller, it generates adaptive, physiologically grounded motor behaviors. We employ a sequential training pipeline where the pre-trained human motion control policy acts as a consistent evaluator, making large-scale design space exploration computationally tractable. By simulating the coupled human-robot system, the framework provides access to internal biomechanical metrics, offering a systematic way to concurrently co-optimize a robot's structural parameters and control policy. We demonstrate its capability in optimizing human-exoskeleton interactions, showing improved joint alignment and reduced contact forces. This work establishes embodied human simulation as a scalable paradigm for interactive robotics design.

摘要（中文）: 物理交互机器人，范围从可穿戴设备到协作型人形机器人，需要机械设计与控制之间的紧密协调。然而，由于复杂的人体生物力学和运动反应，评估交互动力学极具挑战性。传统实验依赖于间接指标，无法测量人体内部状态，例如肌肉力量或关节负荷。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一个可扩展的基于仿真的框架，用于物理人机交互的定量分析。其核心是一个全身肌肉骨骼模型，作为人体动力系统的预测代理。由强化学习控制器驱动，该模型生成适应性的、生理学上有根据的运动行为。我们采用顺序训练流程，其中预训练的人体运动控制策略作为一致的评估器，使得大规模的设计空间探索在计算上可行。通过模拟耦合的人机系统，该框架提供了对内部生物力学指标的访问，提供了一种系统性的方法来同时共同优化机器人的结构参数和控制策略。我们展示了其在优化人体-外骨骼交互方面的能力，表明关节对齐得到改善，接触力降低。这项工作确立了具身人体仿真作为交互机器人设计的一种可扩展范式。

TLDR: This paper presents a simulation-based framework using a full-body musculoskeletal model and reinforcement learning to co-optimize robot design and control by simulating human-robot interaction and providing access to internal biomechanical metrics, demonstrated through optimizing human-exoskeleton interactions. It enables quantitative design and analysis of interactive robotics.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种基于仿真的框架，使用全身肌肉骨骼模型和强化学习，通过模拟人机交互并提供内部生物力学指标，来共同优化机器人设计和控制，并通过优化人机外骨骼交互进行了演示。它实现了交互式机器人量化设计和分析。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Chenhui Zuo, Jinhao Xu, Michael Qian Vergnolle, Yanan Sui

WESPR: Wind-adaptive Energy-Efficient Safe Perception & Planning for Robust Flight with Quadrotors

Abstract (English): Local wind conditions strongly influence drone performance: headwinds increase flight time, crosswinds and wind shear hinder agility in cluttered spaces, while tailwinds reduce travel time. Although adaptive controllers can mitigate turbulence, they remain unaware of the surrounding geometry that generates it, preventing proactive avoidance. Existing methods that model how wind interacts with the environment typically rely on computationally expensive fluid dynamics simulations, limiting real-time adaptation to new environments and conditions. To bridge this gap, we present WESPR, a fast framework that predicts how environmental geometry affects local wind conditions, enabling proactive path planning and control adaptation. Our lightweight pipeline integrates geometric perception and local weather data to estimate wind fields, compute cost-efficient paths, and adjust control strategies-all within 10 seconds. We validate WESPR on a Crazyflie drone navigating turbulent obstacle courses. Our results show a 12.5-58.7% reduction in maximum trajectory deviation and a 24.6% improvement in stability compared to a wind-agnostic adaptive controller.

摘要（中文）: 局部风况对无人机性能有显著影响：逆风增加飞行时间，侧风和风切变阻碍在拥挤空间中的灵活性，而顺风则减少旅行时间。虽然自适应控制器可以缓解湍流，但它们仍然无法感知产生湍流的周围几何环境，从而无法进行主动规避。现有对风与环境交互建模的方法通常依赖于计算密集的流体动力学模拟，限制了对新环境和条件的实时适应。为了弥合这一差距，我们提出了WESPR，这是一个快速框架，用于预测环境几何形状如何影响局部风况，从而实现主动路径规划和控制适应。我们轻量级的流水线集成了几何感知和局部气象数据，以估计风场，计算高性价比路径，并调整控制策略——所有操作都在10秒内完成。我们在一架Crazyflie无人机上验证了WESPR 在湍流障碍路线中的导航能力。我们的结果表明，与无风适应的自适应控制器相比，最大轨迹偏差减少了12.5-58.7％，稳定性提高了24.6％。

TLDR: WESPR is a fast framework that predicts wind conditions based on environmental geometry for proactive path planning and control adaptation in quadrotor flight, demonstrating improved trajectory deviation and stability compared to wind-agnostic methods.

简要说明: WESPR是一个快速框架，它基于环境几何形状预测风况，从而实现四旋翼飞行中的主动路径规划和控制适应。与不考虑风况的方法相比，该方法在轨迹偏差和稳定性方面均有所改善。

Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Khuzema Habib, Pranav Deshakulkarni Manjunath, Kasra Torshizi, Troi Williams, Pratap Tokekar

Quality over Quantity: Demonstration Curation via Influence Functions for Data-Centric Robot Learning

Abstract (English): Learning from demonstrations has emerged as a promising paradigm for end-to-end robot control, particularly when scaled to diverse and large datasets. However, the quality of demonstration data, often collected through human teleoperation, remains a critical bottleneck for effective data-driven robot learning. Human errors, operational constraints, and teleoperator variability introduce noise and suboptimal behaviors, making data curation essential yet largely manual and heuristic-driven. In this work, we propose Quality over Quantity (QoQ), a grounded and systematic approach to identifying high-quality data by defining data quality as the contribution of each training sample to reducing loss on validation demonstrations. To efficiently estimate this contribution, we leverage influence functions, which quantify the impact of individual training samples on model performance. We further introduce two key techniques to adapt influence functions for robot demonstrations: (i) using maximum influence across validation samples to capture the most relevant state-action pairs, and (ii) aggregating influence scores of state-action pairs within the same trajectory to reduce noise and improve data coverage. Experiments in both simulated and real-world settings show that QoQ consistently improves policy performances over prior data selection methods.

摘要（中文）: 从演示中学习已经成为一种极具前景的端到端机器人控制范式，尤其是在扩展到多样化和大型数据集时。然而，演示数据的质量（通常通过人工遥操作收集）仍然是有效数据驱动机器人学习的关键瓶颈。人为误差、操作约束和遥操作员的差异性引入了噪声和次优行为，使得数据管理至关重要，但目前主要依赖于手动和启发式方法。本文提出了“质量优先”（QoQ），一种基于验证演示来定义数据质量（即每个训练样本对减少损失的贡献）从而识别高质量数据的、有依据且系统化的方法。为了有效估计这种贡献，我们利用了影响函数，该函数可以量化单个训练样本对模型性能的影响。我们进一步引入了两项关键技术来调整影响函数以适应机器人演示：（i）使用验证样本间的最大影响值来捕获最相关的状态-动作对，以及（ii）聚合同一轨迹中状态-动作对的影响分数，以减少噪声并提高数据覆盖率。在模拟和真实世界的实验中，QoQ始终优于先前的数据选择方法，显著提升策略性能。

TLDR: The paper introduces Quality over Quantity (QoQ), a novel approach using influence functions for data curation in robot learning from demonstrations, effectively improving policy performance by identifying and prioritizing high-quality training data.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了Quality over Quantity (QoQ)，一种利用影响函数进行机器人模仿学习数据整理的新方法，通过识别和优先选择高质量训练数据，有效提高策略性能。

Relevance: (8/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Haeone Lee, Taywon Min, Junsu Kim, Sinjae Kang, Fangchen Liu, Lerrel Pinto, Kimin Lee

Improving through Interaction: Searching Behavioral Representation Spaces with CMA-ES-IG

Abstract (English): Robots that interact with humans must adapt to individual users' preferences to operate effectively in human-centered environments. An intuitive and effective technique to learn non-expert users' preferences is through rankings of robot behaviors, e.g., trajectories, gestures, or voices. Existing techniques primarily focus on generating queries that optimize preference learning outcomes, such as sample efficiency or final preference estimation accuracy. However, the focus on outcome overlooks key user expectations in the process of providing these rankings, which can negatively impact users' adoption of robotic systems. This work proposes the Covariance Matrix Adaptation Evolution Strategies with Information Gain (CMA-ES-IG) algorithm. CMA-ES-IG explicitly incorporates user experience considerations into the preference learning process by suggesting perceptually distinct and informative trajectories for users to rank. We demonstrate these benefits through both simulated studies and real-robot experiments. CMA-ES-IG, compared to state-of-the-art alternatives, (1) scales more effectively to higher-dimensional preference spaces, (2) maintains computational tractability for high-dimensional problems, (3) is robust to noisy or inconsistent user feedback, and (4) is preferred by non-expert users in identifying their preferred robot behaviors. This project's code is available at github.com/interaction-lab/CMA-ES-IG

摘要（中文）: 与人类交互的机器人必须适应个体用户的偏好，才能在以人为中心的环境中有效运行。学习非专业用户偏好的直观有效技术是通过对机器人行为（例如轨迹、手势或声音）进行排序。现有技术主要侧重于生成优化偏好学习结果的查询，例如样本效率或最终偏好估计准确性。然而，对结果的关注忽略了用户在提供这些排名过程中的关键期望，这可能会对用户采用机器人系统产生负面影响。 本文提出了带有信息增益的协方差矩阵自适应进化策略（CMA-ES-IG）算法。 CMA-ES-IG通过为用户建议感知上明显且信息量大的轨迹以进行排序，从而将用户体验考虑因素明确地纳入偏好学习过程中。 我们通过模拟研究和真实机器人实验证明了这些优势。 与最先进的替代方案相比，CMA-ES-IG (1)更有效地扩展到更高维度的偏好空间，(2) 保持了高维问题的计算可处理性，(3) 对嘈杂或不一致的用户反馈具有鲁棒性，以及 (4) 在识别用户偏好的机器人行为时更受非专业用户的青睐。 该项目的代码可在 github.com/interaction-lab/CMA-ES-IG 获得。

TLDR: The paper introduces CMA-ES-IG, an algorithm that optimizes robot behavior learning from human preferences by incorporating user experience considerations, leading to improved scalability, robustness, and user satisfaction in identifying preferred robot behaviors.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了CMA-ES-IG算法，该算法通过结合用户体验的因素优化机器人从人类偏好中学习行为，从而提高了可扩展性、鲁棒性以及用户在识别首选机器人行为时的满意度。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)

Authors: Nathaniel Dennler, Zhonghao Shi, Yiran Tao, Andreea Bobu, Stefanos Nikolaidis, Maja Matarić

Characterization, Analytical Planning, and Hybrid Force Control for the Inspire RH56DFX Hand

Abstract (English): Commercially accessible dexterous robot hands are increasingly prevalent, but many remain difficult to use as scientific instruments. For example, the Inspire RH56DFX hand exposes only uncalibrated proprioceptive information and shows unreliable contact behavior at high speed (up to 1618% force limit overshoot). Furthermore, its underactuated, coupled finger linkages make antipodal grasps non-trivial. We contribute three improvements to the Inspire RH56DFX to transform it from a black-box device to a research tool: (1) hardware characterization (force calibration, latency, and overshoot), (2) a sim2real validated MuJoCo model for analytical width-to-grasp planning, and (3) a hybrid, closed-loop speed-force grasp controller. We validate these components on peg-in-hole insertion, achieving 65% success and outperforming a wrist-force-only baseline of 10% and on 300 grasps across 15 physically diverse objects, achieving 87% success and outperforming plan-free grasps and learned grasps. Our approach is modular, designed for compatibility with external object detectors and vision-language models for width & force estimation and high-level planning, and provides an interpretable and immediately deployable interface for dexterous manipulation with the Inspire RH56DFX hand, open-sourced at this website https://correlllab.github.io/rh56dfx.html.

摘要（中文）: 商业上可获得的灵巧机器人手越来越普遍，但许多仍然难以用作科学仪器。例如，Inspire RH56DFX手仅暴露未校准的本体感受信息，并且在高速下表现出不可靠的接触行为（高达1618%的力限过冲）。此外，其欠驱动的、耦合的手指连杆结构使得对踵抓取变得不简单。我们针对Inspire RH56DFX手贡献了三项改进，将其从一个黑盒设备转变为一个研究工具：(1) 硬件特性表征（力校准、延迟和过冲），(2) 一个经过Sim2Real验证的 MuJoCo 模型，用于分析性的宽度-抓取规划，以及(3) 一个混合的闭环速度-力抓取控制器。我们通过销钉插入孔实验验证了这些组件，成功率达到65%，优于仅使用腕部力传感器时的10%的基线。我们还在15个物理上不同的物体上进行了300次抓取测试，成功率达到87%，优于无规划抓取和学习抓取。我们的方法是模块化的，设计上与外部物体检测器和视觉-语言模型兼容，用于宽度和力估计以及高层规划，并提供一个可解释且可立即部署的界面，用于使用Inspire RH56DFX手进行灵巧操作，并在本网站 https://correlllab.github.io/rh56dfx.html 上开源

TLDR: This paper presents hardware characterization, a sim2real MuJoCo model, and a hybrid force controller for the Inspire RH56DFX hand, significantly improving its grasping and manipulation performance on peg-in-hole and diverse object grasping tasks.

简要说明: 本文介绍了 Inspire RH56DFX 机械手的硬件特性分析、一个 sim2real MuJoCo 模型和一个混合力控制器，显著提高了其在插孔和多样物体抓取任务中的抓取和操作性能。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
