Authors: Xuan Tan, William Xie, Nikolaus Correll

SurgCalib: Gaussian Splatting-Based Hand-Eye Calibration for Robot-Assisted Minimally Invasive Surgery

Abstract (English): We present a Gaussian Splatting-based framework for hand-eye calibration of the da Vinci surgical robot. In a vision-guided robotic system, accurate estimation of the rigid transformation between the robot base and the camera frame is essential for reliable closed-loop control. For cable-driven surgical robots, this task faces unique challenges. The encoders of surgical instruments often produce inaccurate proprioceptive measurements due to cable stretch and backlash. Conventional hand-eye calibration approaches typically rely on known fiducial patterns and solve the AX = XB formulation. While effective, introducing additional markers into the operating room (OR) environment can violate sterility protocols and disrupt surgical workflows. In this study, we propose SurgCalib, an automatic, markerless framework that has the potential to be used in the OR. SurgCalib first initializes the pose of the surgical instrument using raw kinematic measurements and subsequently refines this pose through a two-phase optimization procedure under the RCM constraint within a Gaussian Splatting-based differentiable rendering pipeline. We evaluate the proposed method on the public dVRK benchmark, SurgPose. The results demonstrate average 2D tool-tip reprojection errors of 12.24 px (2.06 mm) and 11.33 px (1.9 mm), and 3D tool-tip Euclidean distance errors of 5.98 mm and 4.75 mm, for the left and right instruments, respectively.

摘要（中文）: 我们提出了一种基于高斯溅射的框架，用于达芬奇手术机器人的手眼标定。在视觉引导的机器人系统中，准确估计机器人基座和相机坐标系之间的刚性变换对于可靠的闭环控制至关重要。对于电缆驱动的手术机器人，这项任务面临独特的挑战。手术器械的编码器通常会因电缆拉伸和反冲而产生不准确的本体感觉测量。传统的手眼标定方法通常依赖于已知的基准图案并求解AX = XB公式。虽然有效，但将额外的标记物引入手术室 (OR) 环境可能会违反无菌协议并中断手术流程。在本研究中，我们提出 SurgCalib，一种自动、无标记的框架，具有在手术室中使用的潜力。SurgCalib 首先使用原始运动学测量初始化手术器械的姿态，然后通过基于高斯溅射的可微渲染管道中受 RCM 约束的两阶段优化过程来细化该姿态。我们在公开的 dVRK 基准测试 SurgPose 上评估了所提出的方法。结果表明，左右器械的平均 2D 工具尖重投影误差分别为 12.24 像素（2.06 毫米）和 11.33 像素（1.9 毫米），3D 工具尖欧几里得距离误差分别为 5.98 毫米和 4.75 毫米。

TLDR: The paper introduces SurgCalib, a markerless hand-eye calibration framework for the da Vinci surgical robot using Gaussian Splatting and differentiable rendering, achieving promising results on the dVRK SurgPose benchmark.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了SurgCalib，一个基于高斯溅射和可微渲染的达芬奇手术机器人无标记手眼标定框架，并在dVRK SurgPose基准测试中取得了可喜的成果。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Zijian Wu, Shuojue Yang, Yu Chung Lee, Eitan Prisman, Yueming Jin, Septimiu E. Salcudean

Formation-Aware Adaptive Conformalized Perception for Safe Leader-Follower Multi-Robot Systems

Abstract (English): This paper considers the perception safety problem in distributed vision-based leader-follower formations, where each robot uses onboard perception to estimate relative states, track desired setpoints, and keep the leader within its camera field of view (FOV). Safety is challenging due to heteroscedastic perception errors and the coupling between formation maneuvers and visibility constraints. We propose a distributed, formation-aware adaptive conformal prediction method based on Risk-Aware Mondrian CP to produce formation-conditioned uncertainty quantiles. The resulting bounds tighten in high-risk configurations (near FOV limits) and relax in safer regions. We integrate these bounds into a Formation-Aware Conformal CBF-QP with a smooth margin to enforce visibility while maintaining feasibility and tracking performance. Gazebo simulations show improved formation success rates and tracking accuracy over non-adaptive (global) CP baselines that ignore formation-dependent visibility risk, while preserving finite-sample probabilistic safety guarantees. The experimental videos are available on the \href{https://nail-uh.github.io/iros2026.github.io/}{project website}\footnote{Project Website: https://nail-uh.github.io/iros2026.github.io/}.

摘要（中文）: 本文研究了基于分布式视觉的领导者-跟随者编队中的感知安全问题。在此场景中，每个机器人利用其车载感知系统估计相对状态，跟踪期望设定点，并使领导者保持在其摄像头的视野范围内（FOV）。由于异方差感知误差以及编队机动与可见性约束之间的耦合关系，安全性面临挑战。我们提出了一种分布式的、感知编队的自适应保形预测方法，该方法基于风险感知的Mondrian CP，以生成编队条件下的不确定性分位数。由此产生的不确定性边界在高风险配置（接近FOV极限）时收紧，在较安全区域时放松。我们将这些边界集成到一个具有平滑裕度的感知编队的保形控制屏障函数-二次规划(CBF-QP)中，以在保持可行性和跟踪性能的同时，强制执行可见性。Gazebo仿真结果表明，与忽略编队相关可见性风险的非自适应（全局）CP基线相比，该方法提高了编队成功率和跟踪精度，同时保留了有限样本概率安全保证。实验视频可在\href{https://nail-uh.github.io/iros2026.github.io/}{项目网站}\footnote{项目网站：https://nail-uh.github.io/iros2026.github.io/}上找到。

TLDR: The paper introduces a formation-aware adaptive conformal prediction method for safe leader-follower multi-robot systems, improving safety and performance by considering visibility constraints and perception uncertainty in a distributed manner.

简要说明: 该论文提出了一种用于安全领队-跟随多机器人系统的编队感知自适应共形预测方法，通过以分布式方式考虑可见性约束和感知不确定性，从而提高安全性和性能。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Richie R. Suganda, Bin Hu

Fly, Track, Land: Infrastructure-less Magnetic Localization for Heterogeneous UAV-UGV Teaming

Abstract (English): We present a complete infrastructure-less magneto-inductive (MI) localization system enabling a lightweight UAV to autonomously hover, track, and land with centimeter precision on a mobile quadruped robot acting as a dynamic docking pad. This work advances the vision of heterogeneous robot collaboration, where ultra-lightweight flying robots serve as mobile perception agents for ground-based Unmanned Ground Vehicles (UGVs). By extending the sensing horizon and providing complementary viewpoints, the UAVs enhance exploration efficiency and improve the quality of data collection in large-scale, unknown environments. The proposed system aims to complements traditional localization modalities with a compact, embedded, and infrastructure-less magnetic sensing approach, providing accurate short-range relative positioning to bridge the gap between coarse navigation and precise UAV docking. A single lightweight receive coil and a fully embedded estimation pipeline on the UAV deliver 20 Hz relative pose estimates in the UGV's frame, achieving a 3D position root-mean-square error (RMSE) of 5 cm. The system uses real-time estimation and a warm-started solver to estimate the 3D position, which is then fused with inertial and optical-flow measurements in the onboard extended Kalman filter. Real-world experiments validate the effectiveness of the framework, demonstrating significant improvements in UAV--UGV teaming in infrastructure-less scenarios compared to state-of-the-art methods, requiring no external anchors or global positioning. In dynamic scenarios, the UAV tracks and docks with a moving UGV while maintaining a 7.2 cm RMSE and achieving successful autonomous landings.

摘要（中文）: 我们提出了一种完整的、无需基础设施的磁感应(MI)定位系统，该系统使轻型无人机能够自主悬停、跟踪和以厘米级精度降落在移动四足机器人上，将其作为动态对接平台。这项工作推进了异构机器人协作的愿景，其中超轻型飞行机器人作为地面无人车辆(UGV)的移动感知代理。通过扩展感知范围并提供互补的视角，无人机提高了探索效率并改善了在大型未知环境中数据收集的质量。所提出的系统旨在利用紧凑、嵌入式且无需基础设施的磁感应方法来补充传统的定位方式，从而提供精确的短程相对定位，以弥合粗略导航和精确无人机对接之间的差距。无人机上单个轻量级接收线圈和完全嵌入式的估计流程，以UGV的坐标系提供20 Hz的相对姿态估计，实现5厘米的3D位置均方根误差(RMSE)。该系统采用实时估计和热启动求解器来估计3D位置，然后将其与机载扩展卡尔曼滤波器中的惯性和光流测量融合。真实世界的实验验证了该框架的有效性，表明与最先进的方法相比，在无需基础设施的场景中，无人机-UGV协同方面取得了显著的改进，无需外部锚点或全球定位。在动态场景中，无人机跟踪并对接移动的UGV，同时保持7.2厘米的RMSE，并成功实现自主着陆。

TLDR: This paper presents an infrastructure-less magnetic localization system for UAV-UGV teaming, enabling precise autonomous hovering, tracking, and landing on a moving UGV with centimeter-level accuracy using a lightweight magnetic sensing approach.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种无需基础设施的磁定位系统，用于无人机-无人车组队，通过轻量级的磁感应方法，实现了无人机在移动无人车上精确自动悬停、跟踪和着陆（厘米级精度）。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Valerio Brunacci, Davide Plozza, Alessio De Angelis, Michele Magno, Tommaso Polonelli

Model-Free Co-Optimization of Manufacturable Sensor Layouts and Deformation Proprioception

Abstract (English): Flexible sensors are increasingly employed in soft robotics and wearable devices to provide proprioception of freeform deformations.Although supervised learning can train shape predictors from sensor signals, prediction accuracy strongly depends on sensor layout, which is typically determined heuristically or through trial-and-error. This work introduces a model-free, data-driven computational pipeline that jointly optimizes the number, length, and placement of flexible length-measurement sensors together with the parameters of a shape prediction network for large freeform deformations. Unlike model-based approaches, the proposed method relies solely on datasets of deformed shapes, without requiring physical simulation models, and is therefore broadly applicable to diverse robotic sensing tasks. The pipeline incorporates differentiable loss functions that account for both prediction accuracy and manufacturability constraints. By co-optimizing sensor layouts and network parameters, the method significantly improves deformation prediction accuracy over unoptimized layouts while ensuring practical feasibility. The effectiveness and generality of the approach are validated through numerical and physical experiments on multiple soft robotic and wearable systems.

摘要（中文）: 柔性传感器越来越多地应用于软体机器人和可穿戴设备中，以提供自由形变的感觉。虽然监督学习可以通过传感器信号训练形状预测器，但预测精度很大程度上取决于传感器布局，而传感器布局通常是凭经验或通过试错法确定的。本研究提出了一种无模型、数据驱动的计算流程，该流程联合优化柔性长度测量传感器的数量、长度和位置，以及用于大型自由形变的形状预测网络的参数。与基于模型的方法不同，所提出的方法仅依赖于形变形状的数据集，而无需物理仿真模型，因此广泛适用于各种机器人传感任务。该流程结合了可微的损失函数，这些函数考虑了预测精度和可制造性约束。通过协同优化传感器布局和网络参数，该方法显著提高了形变预测精度，优于未优化的布局，同时确保了实际可行性。通过在多个软体机器人和可穿戴系统上的数值和物理实验验证了该方法的有效性和通用性。

TLDR: This paper introduces a model-free method to co-optimize sensor layout and shape prediction networks for flexible sensors in soft robotics and wearable devices, improving deformation prediction accuracy and manufacturability without relying on physical simulation models.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种模型无关的方法，用于协同优化软体机器人和可穿戴设备中柔性传感器的传感器布局和形状预测网络，无需依赖物理仿真模型，从而提高形变预测的准确性和可制造性。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Yingjun Tian, Guoxin Fang, Aoran Lyu, Xilong Wang, Zikang Shi, Yuhu Guo, Weiming Wang, Charlie C. L. Wang

Proprioceptive Safe Active Navigation and Exploration for Planetary Environments

Abstract (English): Deformable granular terrains introduce significant locomotion and immobilization risks in planetary exploration and are difficult to detect via remote sensing (e.g., vision). Legged robots can sense terrain properties through leg-terrain interactions during locomotion, offering a direct means to assess traversability in deformable environments. How to systematically exploit this interaction-derived information for navigation planning, however, remains underexplored. We address this gap by presenting PSANE, a Proprioceptive Safe Active Navigation and Exploration framework that leverages leg-terrain interaction measurements for safe navigation and exploration in unknown deformable environments. PSANE learns a traversability model via Gaussian Process regression to estimate and certify safe regions and identify exploration frontiers online, and integrates these estimates with a reactive controller for real-time navigation. Frontier selection is formulated as a multi-objective optimization that balances safe-set expansion probability and goal-directed cost, with subgoals selected via scalarization over the Pareto-optimal frontier set. PSANE safely explores unknown granular terrain and reaches specified goals using only proprioceptively estimated traversability, while achieving performance improvements over baseline methods.

摘要（中文）: 火星探测等行星探索活动中，可变形颗粒状地形会带来显著的移动和滞留风险，并且难以通过遥感（如视觉）进行探测。腿式机器人可以通过运动过程中腿部与地形的相互作用来感知地形特性，从而提供一种直接评估可变形环境中可通行性的方法。然而，如何系统地利用这种源自相互作用的信息进行导航规划仍需进一步探索。为此，我们提出了 PSANE，一种本体感知安全主动导航与探索框架，该框架利用腿部与地形的相互作用测量信息，在未知可变形环境中实现安全导航与探索。PSANE 通过高斯过程回归学习通行性模型，以在线估计和验证安全区域，并识别探索前沿，并将这些估计结果与反应式控制器集成，实现实时导航。前沿选择被公式化为多目标优化问题，以平衡安全集扩展概率和面向目标的代价，并通过对帕累托最优前沿集进行标量化来选择子目标。PSANE 仅使用本体感知所估计的通行性，便能安全地探索未知颗粒状地形并到达指定目标，同时在性能上优于基线方法。

TLDR: The paper introduces PSANE, a framework for safe active navigation and exploration on deformable granular terrains using proprioceptive sensing for traversability estimation, improving upon baseline methods.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了PSANE，一个利用本体感受安全主动导航与探索框架，用于在可变形颗粒地形上安全导航和探索。该框架使用本体感受进行可穿越性估计，优于基线方法。

Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Matthew Y. Jiang, Feifei Qian, Shipeng Liu

When Learning Rates Go Wrong: Early Structural Signals in PPO Actor-Critic

Abstract (English): Deep Reinforcement Learning systems are highly sensitive to the learning rate (LR), and selecting stable and performant training runs often requires extensive hyperparameter search. In Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) actor--critic methods, small LR values lead to slow convergence, whereas large LR values may induce instability or collapse. We analyse this phenomenon from the behavior of the hidden neurons in the network using the Overfitting-Underfitting Indicator (OUI), a metric that quantifies the balance of binary activation patterns over a fixed probe batch. We introduce an efficient batch-based formulation of OUI and derive a theoretical connection between LR and activation sign changes, clarifying how a correct evolution of the neuron's inner structure depends on the step size. Empirically, across three discrete-control environments and multiple seeds, we show that OUI measured at only 10\% of training already discriminates between LR regimes. We observe a consistent asymmetry: critic networks achieving highest return operate in an intermediate OUI band (avoiding saturation), whereas actor networks achieving highest return exhibit comparatively high OUI values. We then compare OUI-based screening rules against early return, clip-based, divergence-based, and flip-based criteria under matched recall over successful runs. In this setting, OUI provides the strongest early screening signal: OUI alone achieves the best precision at broader recall, while combining early return with OUI yields the highest precision in best-performing screening regimes, enabling aggressive pruning of unpromising runs without requiring full training.

摘要（中文）: 深度强化学习系统对学习率（LR）高度敏感，选择稳定且性能良好的训练运行通常需要广泛的超参数搜索。在近端策略优化（PPO）actor-critic方法中，较小的LR值会导致收敛缓慢，而较大的LR值可能导致不稳定或崩溃。我们利用过拟合-欠拟合指标（OUI）分析了网络中隐藏神经元的行为，OUI是一种量化固定探针批次上二元激活模式平衡的指标。我们引入了一种高效的基于批次的OUI表示，并推导了LR和激活符号变化之间的理论联系，阐明了神经元内部结构的正确演化如何取决于步长。 在三个离散控制环境和多个种子下，经验上表明，仅在10%的训练中测量的OUI即可区分不同的LR机制。我们观察到一种一致的不对称性：获得最高回报的critic网络在中间OUI带（避免饱和）中运行，而获得最高回报的actor网络则表现出相对较高的OUI值。然后，我们在成功运行的匹配召回设置下，将基于OUI的筛选规则与基于早期回报，基于裁剪，基于发散和基于翻转的标准进行比较。在这种情况下，OUI提供了最强的早期筛选信号：OUI单独使用即可在更广泛的召回率下实现最佳精度，而将早期回报与OUI结合使用可在性能最佳的筛选机制中产生最高精度，从而可以在无需完全训练的情况下积极修剪没有希望的运行。

TLDR: This paper introduces a method (OUI metric) to detect problematic learning rates in PPO actor-critic methods early in training, showing it outperforms existing screening methods and can improve hyperparameter tuning efficiency.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一种方法（OUI指标），用于在训练初期检测PPO actor-critic方法中存在问题的学习率，表明其优于现有的筛选方法，并可以提高超参数调整效率。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)

Authors: Alberto Fernández-Hernández, Cristian Pérez-Corral, Jose I. Mestre, Manuel F. Dolz, Jose Duato, Enrique S. Quintana-Ortí

MM-tau-p$^2$: Persona-Adaptive Prompting for Robust Multi-Modal Agent Evaluation in Dual-Control Settings

Abstract (English): Current evaluation frameworks and benchmarks for LLM powered agents focus on text chat driven agents, these frameworks do not expose the persona of user to the agent, thus operating in a user agnostic environment. Importantly, in customer experience management domain, the agent's behaviour evolves as the agent learns about user personality. With proliferation of real time TTS and multi-modal language models, LLM based agents are gradually going to become multi-modal. Towards this, we propose the MM-tau-p$^2$ benchmark with metrics for evaluating the robustness of multi-modal agents in dual control setting with and without persona adaption of user, while also taking user inputs in the planning process to resolve a user query. In particular, our work shows that even with state of-the-art frontier LLMs like GPT-5, GPT 4.1, there are additional considerations measured using metrics viz. multi-modal robustness, turn overhead while introducing multi-modality into LLM based agents. Overall, MM-tau-p$^2$ builds on our prior work FOCAL and provides a holistic way of evaluating multi-modal agents in an automated way by introducing 12 novel metrics. We also provide estimates of these metrics on the telecom and retail domains by using the LLM-as-judge approach using carefully crafted prompts with well defined rubrics for evaluating each conversation.

摘要（中文）: 当前针对大型语言模型驱动代理的评估框架和基准主要侧重于文本聊天驱动的代理，这些框架不会向代理展示用户的角色画像，因此在用户不可知的环境中运行。重要的是，在客户体验管理领域，代理的行为会随着代理对用户个性的了解而演变。随着实时文本转语音（TTS）和多模态语言模型的普及，基于大型语言模型的代理将逐渐转变为多模态。为此，我们提出了MM-τ-p$^2$基准，其中包含用于评估多模态代理在双重控制设置中（无论是否进行用户角色适应）的鲁棒性的指标，同时还将用户输入纳入规划流程以解决用户查询。特别是，我们的工作表明，即使使用GPT-5、GPT 4.1等最先进的前沿大型语言模型，在使用指标（例如，多模态鲁棒性、回合开销）衡量时，将多模态引入到基于大型语言模型的代理中时，也需要额外的考虑事项。总的来说，MM-τ-p$^2$建立在我们之前的工作FOCAL的基础上，并通过引入12个新的指标提供了一种以自动化方式全面评估多模态代理的方法。我们还通过使用精心制作的提示和定义明确的评分标准来评估每一次对话，利用大型语言模型作为评判者的方法，提供了这些指标在电信和零售领域的估计值。

TLDR: The paper introduces MM-tau-p$^2$, a benchmark for evaluating the robustness of multi-modal agents in dual-control settings with persona adaptation, highlighting deficiencies of even state-of-the-art LLMs in this context using 12 novel metrics.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了MM-tau-p$^2$，一个用于评估在双重控制设置中具有角色适应性的多模态代理的鲁棒性的基准，强调了即使是最先进的LLM在这方面的不足之处，并使用了12个新颖的指标。

Relevance: (8/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)

Authors: Anupam Purwar, Aditya Choudhary

GenePlan: Evolving Better Generalized PDDL Plans using Large Language Models

Abstract (English): We present GenePlan (GENeralized Evolutionary Planner), a novel framework that leverages large language model (LLM) assisted evolutionary algorithms to generate domain-dependent generalized planners for classical planning tasks described in PDDL. By casting generalized planning as an optimization problem, GenePlan iteratively evolves interpretable Python planners that minimize plan length across diverse problem instances. In empirical evaluation across six existing benchmark domains and two new domains, GenePlan achieved an average SAT score of 0.91, closely matching the performance of the state-of-the-art planners (SAT score 0.93), and significantly outperforming other LLM-based baselines such as chain-of-thought (CoT) prompting (average SAT score 0.64). The generated planners solve new instances rapidly (average 0.49 seconds per task) and at low cost (average $1.82 per domain using GPT-4o).

摘要（中文）: 我们提出了GenePlan（通用进化规划器），一种新颖的框架，其利用大型语言模型（LLM）辅助的进化算法来生成用于描述以PDDL表示的经典规划任务的领域相关通用规划器。通过将通用规划建模成一个优化问题，GenePlan迭代演化可解释的Python规划器，以最小化跨越不同问题实例的规划长度。在对六个现有基准领域和两个新领域的实证评估中，GenePlan取得了平均0.91的SAT得分，与最先进的规划器性能（SAT得分0.93）非常接近，并且显著优于其他基于LLM的基线，例如思维链（CoT）提示（平均SAT得分0.64）。所生成的规划器能够快速（平均每个任务0.49秒）且低成本地（使用GPT-4o，每个领域平均1.82美元）解决新的实例。

TLDR: GenePlan uses LLMs and evolutionary algorithms to generate domain-dependent generalized planners for classical planning, achieving performance comparable to state-of-the-art planners with improved speed and cost.

简要说明: GenePlan利用大型语言模型和进化算法来生成经典规划的领域相关通用规划器，其性能与最先进的规划器相当，且速度和成本都有所提高。

Novelty: (8/10)

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Andrew Murray, Danial Dervovic, Alberto Pozanco, Michael Cashmore

Telogenesis: Goal Is All U Need

Abstract (English): Goal-conditioned systems assume goals are provided externally. We ask whether attentional priorities can emerge endogenously from an agent's internal cognitive state. We propose a priority function that generates observation targets from three epistemic gaps: ignorance (posterior variance), surprise (prediction error), and staleness (temporal decay of confidence in unobserved variables). We validate this in two systems: a minimal attention-allocation environment (2,000 runs) and a modular, partially observable world (500 runs). Ablation shows each component is necessary. A key finding is metric-dependent reversal: under global prediction error, coverage-based rotation wins; under change detection latency, priority-guided allocation wins, with advantage growing monotonically with dimensionality (d = -0.95 at N=48, p < 10^-6). Detection latency follows a power law in attention budget, with a steeper exponent for priority-guided allocation (0.55 vs. 0.40). When the decay rate is made learnable per variable, the system spontaneously recovers environmental volatility structure without supervision (t = 22.5, p < 10^-6). We demonstrate that epistemic gaps alone, without external reward, suffice to generate adaptive priorities that outperform fixed strategies and recover latent environmental structure.

摘要（中文）: 以目标为条件的系统假设目标由外部提供。我们探究注意力优先级是否能内生地从智能体的内部认知状态中涌现。我们提出一种优先级函数，通过三个认知差距生成观测目标：无知（后验方差），惊奇（预测误差）和陈旧性（对未观测变量的信心的时间衰减）。我们在两个系统中验证了这一点：一个最小化的注意力分配环境（2000次运行）和一个模块化的、部分可观测的世界（500次运行）。消融实验表明每个组件都是必需的。一个关键发现是依赖于度量的反转：在全球预测误差下，基于覆盖的轮换胜出；在变化检测延迟下，优先级引导的分配胜出，且优势随维度单调增长（在N=48时，d = -0.95，p < 10^-6）。检测延迟遵循注意力预算的幂律，且优先级引导的分配具有更陡峭的指数（0.55 vs. 0.40）。当每个变量的衰减率变为可学习时，系统在没有监督的情况下自发地恢复了环境波动结构（t = 22.5，p < 10^-6）。我们证明仅凭认知差距，无需外部奖励，就足以生成自适应优先级，其性能优于固定策略并能恢复潜在的环境结构。

TLDR: The paper proposes a method for generating attentional priorities endogenously from epistemic gaps (ignorance, surprise, staleness) without external reward and demonstrates its effectiveness in attention-allocation and partially observable environments, showing it can outperform fixed strategies and uncover latent environmental structure.

简要说明: 该论文提出了一种从认知差距（无知、惊讶、陈旧）内生地生成注意力优先级的方法，无需外部奖励，并在注意力分配和部分可观察环境中验证了其有效性，表明其性能优于固定策略，并能够发现潜在的环境结构。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (8/10)

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Zhuoran Deng, Yizhi Zhang, Ziyi Zhang, Wan Shen

Robust Regularized Policy Iteration under Transition Uncertainty

Abstract (English): Offline reinforcement learning (RL) enables data-efficient and safe policy learning without online exploration, but its performance often degrades under distribution shift. The learned policy may visit out-of-distribution state-action pairs where value estimates and learned dynamics are unreliable. To address policy-induced extrapolation and transition uncertainty in a unified framework, we formulate offline RL as robust policy optimization, treating the transition kernel as a decision variable within an uncertainty set and optimizing the policy against the worst-case dynamics. We propose Robust Regularized Policy Iteration (RRPI), which replaces the intractable max-min bilevel objective with a tractable KL-regularized surrogate and derives an efficient policy iteration procedure based on a robust regularized Bellman operator. We provide theoretical guarantees by showing that the proposed operator is a $γ$-contraction and that iteratively updating the surrogate yields monotonic improvement of the original robust objective with convergence. Experiments on D4RL benchmarks demonstrate that RRPI achieves strong average performance, outperforming recent baselines including percentile-based methods such as PMDB on the majority of environments while remaining competitive on the rest. Moreover, RRPI exhibits robust behavior. The learned $Q$-values decrease in regions with higher epistemic uncertainty, suggesting that the resulting policy avoids unreliable out-of-distribution actions under transition uncertainty.

摘要（中文）: 离线强化学习（RL）能够在无需在线探索的情况下实现数据高效且安全的策略学习，但其性能通常会在分布偏移下降低。学习到的策略可能会访问到分布外的状态-动作对，在这些状态-动作对中，价值估计和学习到的动力学模型是不可靠的。为了在统一的框架下解决策略诱导的外推和转移不确定性问题，我们将离线RL公式化为鲁棒策略优化，将转移核视为不确定性集合内的决策变量，并针对最坏情况下的动力学模型优化策略。我们提出了鲁棒正则化策略迭代（RRPI），它用一个易于处理的KL正则化替代项替换了棘手的最大-最小双层目标，并基于鲁棒正则化贝尔曼算子推导出一种高效的策略迭代过程。我们通过证明所提出的算子是一个$γ$-压缩，并且迭代更新替代项会单调改善原始鲁棒目标并收敛，从而提供了理论保证。在D4RL基准上的实验表明，RRPI实现了强大的平均性能，在大多数环境中优于最近的基线，包括基于百分位的方法（例如PMDB），同时在其余环境中保持竞争力。此外，RRPI表现出鲁棒的行为。学习到的$Q$值在认知不确定性较高的区域中减小，表明由此产生的策略避免了转移不确定性下不可靠的分布外动作。

TLDR: This paper introduces Robust Regularized Policy Iteration (RRPI) for offline reinforcement learning, addressing transition uncertainty and policy extrapolation by optimizing against worst-case dynamics within an uncertainty set. Experiments on D4RL show strong performance and robustness.

简要说明: 本文提出了鲁棒正则化策略迭代（RRPI）用于离线强化学习，通过在不确定性集合中针对最坏情况动态优化，解决了转移不确定性和策略外推问题。在D4RL上的实验表明，该方法具有强大的性能和鲁棒性。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Hongqiang Lin, Zhenghui Fu, Weihao Tang, Pengfei Wang, Yiding Sun, Qixian Huang, Dongxu Zhang

SpaceSense-Bench: A Large-Scale Multi-Modal Benchmark for Spacecraft Perception and Pose Estimation

Abstract (English): Autonomous space operations such as on-orbit servicing and active debris removal demand robust part-level semantic understanding and precise relative navigation of target spacecraft, yet collecting large-scale real data in orbit remains impractical due to cost and access constraints. Existing synthetic datasets, moreover, suffer from limited target diversity, single-modality sensing, and incomplete ground-truth annotations. We present \textbf{SpaceSense-Bench}, a large-scale multi-modal benchmark for spacecraft perception encompassing 136~satellite models with approximately 70~GB of data. Each frame provides time-synchronized 1024$\times$1024 RGB images, millimeter-precision depth maps, and 256-beam LiDAR point clouds, together with dense 7-class part-level semantic labels at both the pixel and point level as well as accurate 6-DoF pose ground truth. The dataset is generated through a high-fidelity space simulation built in Unreal Engine~5 and a fully automated pipeline covering data acquisition, multi-stage quality control, and conversion to mainstream formats. We benchmark five representative tasks (object detection, 2D semantic segmentation, RGB--LiDAR fusion-based 3D point cloud segmentation, monocular depth estimation, and orientation estimation) and identify two key findings: (i)~perceiving small-scale components (\emph{e.g.}, thrusters and omni-antennas) and generalizing to entirely unseen spacecraft in a zero-shot setting remain critical bottlenecks for current methods, and (ii)~scaling up the number of training satellites yields substantial performance gains on novel targets, underscoring the value of large-scale, diverse datasets for space perception research. The dataset, code, and toolkit are publicly available at https://github.com/wuaodi/SpaceSense-Bench.

摘要（中文）: 在轨服务和主动碎片清除等自主空间操作需要对目标航天器进行稳健的部件级语义理解和精确的相对导航，然而，由于成本和访问限制，在轨道上收集大规模真实数据仍然不切实际。此外，现有的合成数据集存在目标多样性有限、单模态感知和地面真值标注不完整等问题。我们提出了\textbf{SpaceSense-Bench}，一个大型多模态航天器感知基准，包含136个卫星模型，约70 GB的数据。每个帧提供时间同步的1024$\\times$1024 RGB图像、毫米级精度深度图和256线激光雷达点云，以及像素和点级别的密集7类部件级语义标签以及精确的6自由度姿态真值。该数据集通过在Unreal Engine~5中构建的高保真空间模拟和全自动流水线生成，涵盖数据采集、多阶段质量控制和转换为主流格式。我们对五个代表性任务（目标检测、2D语义分割、基于RGB--LiDAR融合的3D点云分割、单目深度估计和姿态估计）进行了基准测试，并确定了两个关键发现：（i）感知小尺度组件（\emph{例如}，推进器和全向天线）以及在零样本设置下泛化到完全未见过的航天器仍然是当前方法的关键瓶颈，并且（ii）扩大训练卫星的数量可以在新目标上产生显著的性能提升，强调了大规模、多样化数据集对空间感知研究的价值。数据集、代码和工具包可在https://github.com/wuaodi/SpaceSense-Bench公开获取。

TLDR: The paper introduces SpaceSense-Bench, a large-scale multi-modal synthetic dataset for spacecraft perception and pose estimation, highlighting challenges in perceiving small components and generalizing to unseen spacecraft.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了 SpaceSense-Bench，一个用于航天器感知和姿态估计的大规模多模态合成数据集，强调了感知小型组件和推广到未见航天器方面的挑战。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Aodi Wu, Jianhong Zuo, Zeyuan Zhao, Xubo Luo, Ruisuo Wang, Xue Wan

Evaluate-as-Action: Self-Evaluated Process Rewards for Retrieval-Augmented Agents

Abstract (English): Retrieval-augmented agents can query external evidence, yet their reliability in multi-step reasoning remains limited: noisy retrieval may derail multi-hop question answering, while outcome-only reinforcement learning provides credit signals that are too coarse to optimize intermediate steps. We propose \textsc{EvalAct} (Evaluate-as-Action), which converts implicit retrieval quality assessment into an explicit action and enforces a coupled Search-to-Evaluate protocol so that each retrieval is immediately followed by a structured evaluation score, yielding process signals aligned with the interaction trajectory. To leverage these signals, we introduce Process-Calibrated Advantage Rescaling (PCAR), a GRPO-based optimization method that rescales advantages at the segment level according to evaluation scores, emphasizing reliable segments while updating uncertain ones conservatively. Experiments on seven open-domain QA benchmarks show that \textsc{EvalAct} achieves the best average accuracy, with the largest gains on multi-hop tasks, and ablations verify that the explicit evaluation loop drives the primary improvements while PCAR provides consistent additional benefits.

摘要（中文）: 检索增强型智能体能够查询外部证据，但其在多步推理中的可靠性仍然有限：噪声式检索可能会使多跳问答脱轨，而仅有结果的强化学习提供的信用信号过于粗糙，无法优化中间步骤。我们提出\textsc{EvalAct}（评估即行动），它将隐式的检索质量评估转化为显式行动，并强制执行耦合的搜索-评估协议，从而使每次检索后都立即伴随一个结构化的评估分数，产生与交互轨迹对齐的过程信号。为了利用这些信号，我们引入了过程校准优势重缩放（PCAR），这是一种基于GRPO的优化方法，它根据评估分数在段级别重新缩放优势，强调可靠片段，同时保守地更新不确定片段。在七个开放域问答基准测试上的实验表明，\textsc{EvalAct}实现了最佳平均准确率，尤其是在多跳任务上收益最大，消融实验验证了显式评估循环驱动了主要改进，而PCAR提供了持续的额外益处。

TLDR: The paper introduces EvalAct, a method that explicitly evaluates the quality of retrieval actions in retrieval-augmented agents, and PCAR, an optimization technique leveraging these evaluations to improve multi-hop question answering performance, showing strong results on several open-domain QA benchmarks.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种名为EvalAct的方法，该方法显式评估检索增强代理中检索行为的质量，以及一种名为PCAR的优化技术，该技术利用这些评估来提高多跳问答性能，并在多个开放域问答基准测试中显示出强大的结果。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Jiangming Shu, Yuxiang Zhang, Ye Ma, Xueyuan Lin, Jitao Sang

Sim2Act: Robust Simulation-to-Decision Learning via Adversarial Calibration and Group-Relative Perturbation

Abstract (English): Simulation-to-decision learning enables safe policy training in digital environments without risking real-world deployment, and has become essential in mission-critical domains such as supply chains and industrial systems. However, simulators learned from noisy or biased real-world data often exhibit prediction errors in decision-critical regions, leading to unstable action ranking and unreliable policies. Existing approaches either focus on improving average simulation fidelity or adopt conservative regularization, which may cause policy collapse by discarding high-risk high-reward actions. We propose Sim2Act, a robust simulation-to-decision framework that addresses both simulator and policy robustness. First, we introduce an adversarial calibration mechanism that re-weights simulation errors in decision-critical state-action pairs to align surrogate fidelity with downstream decision impact. Second, we develop a group-relative perturbation strategy that stabilizes policy learning under simulator uncertainty without enforcing overly pessimistic constraints. Extensive experiments on multiple supply chain benchmarks demonstrate improved simulation robustness and more stable decision performance under structured and unstructured perturbations.

摘要（中文）: 以下是一个可能的翻译： 仿真到决策学习能够在数字环境中安全地训练策略，无需冒现实世界部署的风险，并且已成为供应链和工业系统等任务关键型领域中的必备技术。然而，从嘈杂或有偏差的现实世界数据中学习到的模拟器通常在决策关键区域表现出预测误差，从而导致不稳定的行动排序和不可靠的策略。现有方法要么侧重于提高平均模拟逼真度，要么采用保守的正则化，这可能会因丢弃高风险高回报行动而导致策略崩溃。 我们提出Sim2Act，一个稳健的仿真到决策框架，旨在解决模拟器和策略的稳健性问题。首先，我们引入了一种对抗校准机制，其重新加权决策关键状态-行动对中的模拟误差，以使代理逼真度与下游决策影响对齐。其次，我们开发了一种组相对扰动策略，该策略在不强制实施过度悲观约束的情况下，稳定了模拟器不确定性下的策略学习。在多个供应链基准测试上的大量实验表明，在结构化和非结构化扰动下，模拟器稳健性得到改善，决策性能更加稳定。

TLDR: The paper introduces Sim2Act, a framework for robust simulation-to-decision learning. It uses adversarial calibration and group-relative perturbation to improve policy learning in noisy or biased simulations, with demonstrated improvements on supply chain benchmarks.

简要说明: 该论文提出了Sim2Act，一个用于鲁棒的模拟到决策学习的框架。它使用对抗校准和组相对扰动来改善在嘈杂或有偏见的模拟中的策略学习，并在供应链基准上展示了改进。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)

Authors: Hongyu Cao, Jinghan Zhang, Kunpeng Liu, Dongjie Wang, Feng Xia, Haifeng Chen, Xiaohua Hu, Yanjie Fu

EPOCH: An Agentic Protocol for Multi-Round System Optimization

Abstract (English): Autonomous agents are increasingly used to improve prompts, code, and machine learning systems through iterative execution and feedback. Yet existing approaches are usually designed as task-specific optimization loops rather than as a unified protocol for establishing baselines and managing tracked multi-round self-improvement. We introduce EPOCH, an engineering protocol for multi-round system optimization in heterogeneous environments. EPOCH organizes optimization into two phases: baseline construction and iterative self-improvement. It further structures each round through role-constrained stages that separate planning, implementation, and evaluation, and standardizes execution through canonical command interfaces and round-level tracking. This design enables coordinated optimization across prompts, model configurations, code, and rule-based components while preserving stability, reproducibility, traceability, and integrity of evaluation. Empirical studies in various tasks illustrate the practicality of EPOCH for production-oriented autonomous improvement workflows.

摘要（中文）: 自主代理正日益广泛地应用于通过迭代执行和反馈来改进提示、代码和机器学习系统。然而，现有方法通常被设计为特定于任务的优化循环，而不是用于建立基线和管理追踪式多轮自我改进的统一协议。我们提出了EPOCH，一种用于异构环境中的多轮系统优化的工程协议。EPOCH将优化组织成两个阶段：基线构建和迭代式自我改进。它进一步通过角色约束的阶段来 structuring 每轮，这些阶段分离了规划、实现和评估，并通过规范的命令接口和轮级别跟踪来标准化执行。这种设计能够协调提示、模型配置、代码和基于规则的组件之间的优化，同时保持评估的稳定性、可复现性、可追溯性和完整性。在各种任务中的实证研究表明了 EPOCH 在面向生产的自主改进工作流程中的实用性。

TLDR: The paper introduces EPOCH, a unified engineering protocol for multi-round system optimization using autonomous agents, emphasizing stability, reproducibility, and traceability in heterogeneous environments.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一个名为EPOCH的统一工程协议，用于使用自主代理进行多轮系统优化，强调异构环境中的稳定性、可重复性和可追溯性。

Authors: Zhanlin Liu, Yitao Li, Munirathnam Srikanth

Interpretable Markov-Based Spatiotemporal Risk Surfaces for Missing-Child Search Planning with Reinforcement Learning and LLM-Based Quality Assurance

Abstract (English): The first 72 hours of a missing-child investigation are critical for successful recovery. However, law enforcement agencies often face fragmented, unstructured data and a lack of dynamic, geospatial predictive tools. Our system, Guardian, provides an end-to-end decision-support system for missing-child investigation and early search planning. It converts heterogeneous, unstructured case documents into a schema-aligned spatiotemporal representation, enriches cases with geocoding and transportation context, and provides probabilistic search products spanning 0-72 hours. In this paper, we present an overview of Guardian as well as a detailed description of a three-layer predictive component of the system. The first layer is a Markov chain, a sparse, interpretable model with transitions incorporating road accessibility costs, seclusion preferences, and corridor bias with separate day/night parameterizations. The Markov chain's output prediction distributions are then transformed into operationally useful search plans by the second layer's reinforcement learning. Finally, the third layer's LLM performs post hoc validation of layer 2 search plans prior to their release. Using a synthetic but realistic case study, we report quantitative outputs across 24/48/72-hour horizons and analyze sensitivity, failure modes, and tradeoffs. Results show that the proposed predictive system with the three-layer architecture produces interpretable priors for zone optimization and human review.

摘要（中文）: 失踪儿童调查的最初 72 小时对于成功寻回至关重要。然而，执法机构常常面临碎片化、非结构化的数据以及缺乏动态的、地理空间预测工具的困境。我们的系统 Guardian 为失踪儿童调查和早期搜索规划提供了一个端到端的决策支持系统。它将异构的、非结构化的案件文档转换为模式对齐的时空表示，通过地理编码和交通环境信息丰富案件，并提供跨 0-72 小时的时间概率搜索产品。本文概述了 Guardian 系统，并详细描述了该系统的三层预测组件。第一层是一个马尔可夫链，这是一个稀疏的、可解释的模型，其转换过程结合了道路可达性成本、隐蔽偏好和走廊偏差，并具有单独的白天/夜晚参数化。马尔可夫链的输出预测分布随后由第二层的强化学习转换为可操作的搜索计划。最后，第三层的大型语言模型 (LLM) 在发布第二层搜索计划之前对其进行事后验证。通过一个合成但真实的案例研究，我们报告了 24/48/72 小时范围内的定量输出，并分析了敏感性、失效模式和权衡。结果表明，所提出的具有三层架构的预测系统为区域优化和人工审查产生了可解释的先验信息。

TLDR: The paper introduces Guardian, a decision-support system for missing-child investigations using Markov chains, reinforcement learning, and LLM-based validation to generate spatiotemporal search plans.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了 Guardian，一个用于失踪儿童调查的决策支持系统，它使用马尔可夫链、强化学习和基于LLM的验证来生成时空搜索计划。

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Joshua Castillo, Ravi Mukkamala

Fine-grained Motion Retrieval via Joint-Angle Motion Images and Token-Patch Late Interaction

Abstract (English): Text-motion retrieval aims to learn a semantically aligned latent space between natural language descriptions and 3D human motion skeleton sequences, enabling bidirectional search across the two modalities. Most existing methods use a dual-encoder framework that compresses motion and text into global embeddings, discarding fine-grained local correspondences, and thus reducing accuracy. Additionally, these global-embedding methods offer limited interpretability of the retrieval results. To overcome these limitations, we propose an interpretable, joint-angle-based motion representation that maps joint-level local features into a structured pseudo-image, compatible with pre-trained Vision Transformers. For text-to-motion retrieval, we employ MaxSim, a token-wise late interaction mechanism, and enhance it with Masked Language Modeling regularization to foster robust, interpretable text-motion alignment. Extensive experiments on HumanML3D and KIT-ML show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art text-motion retrieval approaches while offering interpretable fine-grained correspondences between text and motion. The code is available in the supplementary material.

摘要（中文）: 文本-动作检索旨在学习自然语言描述和3D人体动作骨骼序列之间语义对齐的潜在空间，从而实现跨这两种模态的双向搜索。现有的大多数方法采用双编码器框架，将动作和文本压缩成全局嵌入，忽略了细粒度的局部对应关系，从而降低了准确性。此外，这些全局嵌入方法对检索结果的可解释性有限。为了克服这些限制，我们提出了一种可解释的、基于关节角度的动作表示，该表示将关节级别的局部特征映射到结构化的伪图像中，与预训练的Vision Transformers兼容。对于文本到动作的检索，我们采用MaxSim，一种token级别的后期交互机制，并使用掩码语言模型（Masked Language Modeling）正则化来增强它，以促进鲁棒的、可解释的文本-动作对齐。在HumanML3D和KIT-ML上的大量实验表明，我们的方法优于最先进的文本-动作检索方法，同时提供了文本和动作之间可解释的细粒度对应关系。代码可在补充材料中找到。

TLDR: This paper introduces a novel, interpretable method for text-motion retrieval using joint-angle motion images and a token-patch late interaction mechanism, achieving state-of-the-art results on standard datasets.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种新的、可解释的文本-动作检索方法，该方法使用基于关节角度的运动图像和令牌-补丁延迟交互机制，并在标准数据集上实现了最先进的结果。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (8/10)

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Yao Zhang, Zhuchenyang Liu, Yanlan He, Thomas Ploetz, Yu Xiao

DISPLAY: Directable Human-Object Interaction Video Generation via Sparse Motion Guidance and Multi-Task Auxiliary

Abstract (English): Human-centric video generation has advanced rapidly, yet existing methods struggle to produce controllable and physically consistent Human-Object Interaction (HOI) videos. Existing works rely on dense control signals, template videos, or carefully crafted text prompts, which limit flexibility and generalization to novel objects. We introduce a framework, namely DISPLAY, guided by Sparse Motion Guidance, composed only of wrist joint coordinates and a shape-agnostic object bounding box. This lightweight guidance alleviates the imbalance between human and object representations and enables intuitive user control. To enhance fidelity under such sparse conditions, we propose an Object-Stressed Attention mechanism that improves object robustness. To address the scarcity of high-quality HOI data, we further develop a Multi-Task Auxiliary Training strategy with a dedicated data curation pipeline, allowing the model to benefit from both reliable HOI samples and auxiliary tasks. Comprehensive experiments show that our method achieves high-fidelity, controllable HOI generation across diverse tasks. The project page can be found at \href{https://mumuwei.github.io/DISPLAY/}.

摘要（中文）: 以人为中心的视频生成技术发展迅速，然而现有方法难以生成可控且物理一致的人-物交互（HOI）视频。现有工作依赖于密集控制信号、模板视频或精心设计的文本提示，这限制了灵活性和对新物体的泛化能力。我们引入了一个框架，名为DISPLAY，由稀疏运动引导驱动，仅由手腕关节坐标和一个形状无关的物体包围盒组成。这种轻量级的引导减轻了人类和物体表征之间的不平衡，并实现了直观的用户控制。为了在如此稀疏的条件下提高保真度，我们提出了一种物体强调注意力机制，该机制提高了物体的鲁棒性。为了解决高质量HOI数据稀缺的问题，我们进一步开发了一种多任务辅助训练策略，并带有专门的数据整理流程，使模型能够受益于可靠的HOI样例和辅助任务。全面的实验表明，我们的方法在各种任务中实现了高保真、可控的HOI生成。项目页面可以在\href{https://mumuwei.github.io/DISPLAY/}找到。

TLDR: The paper introduces DISPLAY, a framework for controllable Human-Object Interaction video generation using sparse motion guidance and multi-task auxiliary training, achieving high-fidelity results.

简要说明: 该论文介绍DISPLAY，一个使用稀疏运动指导和多任务辅助训练的可控人-物交互视频生成框架，实现了高保真度的结果。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Jiazhi Guan, Quanwei Yang, Luying Huang, Junhao Liang, Borong Liang, Haocheng Feng, Wei He, Kaisiyuan Wang, Hang Zhou, Jingdong Wang

RA-SSU: Towards Fine-Grained Audio-Visual Learning with Region-Aware Sound Source Understanding

Abstract (English): Audio-Visual Learning (AVL) is one fundamental task of multi-modality learning and embodied intelligence, displaying the vital role in scene understanding and interaction. However, previous researchers mostly focus on exploring downstream tasks from a coarse-grained perspective (e.g., audio-visual correspondence, sound source localization, and audio-visual event localization). Considering providing more specific scene perception details, we newly define a fine-grained Audio-Visual Learning task, termed Region-Aware Sound Source Understanding (RA-SSU), which aims to achieve region-aware, frame-level, and high-quality sound source understanding. To support this goal, we innovatively construct two corresponding datasets, i.e. fine-grained Music (f-Music) and fine-grained Lifescene (f-Lifescene), each containing annotated sound source masks and frame-by-frame textual descriptions. The f-Music dataset includes 3,976 samples across 22 scene types related to specific application scenarios, focusing on music scenes with complex instrument mixing. The f-Lifescene dataset contains 6,156 samples across 61 types representing diverse sounding objects in life scenarios. Moreover, we propose SSUFormer, a Sound-Source Understanding TransFormer benchmark that facilitates both the sound source segmentation and sound region description with a multi-modal input and multi-modal output architecture. Specifically, we design two modules for this framework, Mask Collaboration Module (MCM) and Mixture of Hierarchical-prompted Experts (MoHE), to respectively enhance the accuracy and enrich the elaboration of the sound source description. Extensive experiments are conducted on our two datasets to verify the feasibility of the task, evaluate the availability of the datasets, and demonstrate the superiority of the SSUFormer, which achieves SOTA performance on the Sound Source Understanding benchmark.

摘要（中文）: 音频-视觉学习（AVL）是多模态学习和具身智能的一项基本任务，在场景理解和交互中发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，以往的研究人员主要侧重于从粗粒度的角度探索下游任务（例如，音频-视觉对应、声源定位和音视频事件定位）。考虑到提供更具体的场景感知细节，我们新定义了一个细粒度的音频-视觉学习任务，称为区域感知声源理解（RA-SSU），旨在实现区域感知、帧级别和高质量的声源理解。为了支持这一目标，我们创新性地构建了两个相应的数据集，即细粒度的音乐（f-Music）和细粒度的生活场景（f-Lifescene），每个数据集都包含带标注的声源掩码和逐帧文本描述。f-Music数据集包含3976个样本，涵盖22种与特定应用场景相关的场景类型，重点关注具有复杂乐器混音的音乐场景。f-Lifescene数据集包含6156个样本，涵盖61种代表生活场景中各种发声物体的类型。此外，我们提出了SSUFormer，一种声源理解Transformer基准模型，通过多模态输入和多模态输出架构，促进声源分割和声源区域描述。具体而言，我们为该框架设计了两个模块，即掩码协作模块（MCM）和分层提示专家混合模块（MoHE），以分别提高声源描述的准确性并丰富其阐述。我们在两个数据集上进行了大量实验，验证了任务的可行性，评估了数据集的可用性，并证明了SSUFormer的优越性，它在声源理解基准测试中实现了SOTA性能。

TLDR: This paper introduces a new fine-grained Audio-Visual Learning task called Region-Aware Sound Source Understanding (RA-SSU), along with two new datasets and a transformer-based benchmark model (SSUFormer) that achieves state-of-the-art performance.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种新的细粒度音视频学习任务，名为区域感知声源理解（RA-SSU），同时提出了两个新的数据集和一个基于Transformer的基准模型（SSUFormer），该模型实现了最先进的性能。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Muyi Sun, Yixuan Wang, Hong Wang, Chen Su, Man Zhang, Xingqun Qi, Qi Li, Zhenan Sun

Test-time Ego-Exo-centric Adaptation for Action Anticipation via Multi-Label Prototype Growing and Dual-Clue Consistency

Abstract (English): Efficient adaptation between Egocentric (Ego) and Exocentric (Exo) views is crucial for applications such as human-robot cooperation. However, the success of most existing Ego-Exo adaptation methods relies heavily on target-view data for training, thereby increasing computational and data collection costs. In this paper, we make the first exploration of a Test-time Ego-Exo Adaptation for Action Anticipation (TE$^{2}$A$^{3}$) task, which aims to adjust the source-view-trained model online during test time to anticipate target-view actions. It is challenging for existing Test-Time Adaptation (TTA) methods to address this task due to the multi-action candidates and significant temporal-spatial inter-view gap. Hence, we propose a novel Dual-Clue enhanced Prototype Growing Network (DCPGN), which accumulates multi-label knowledge and integrates cross-modality clues for effective test-time Ego-Exo adaptation and action anticipation. Specifically, we propose a Multi-Label Prototype Growing Module (ML-PGM) to balance multiple positive classes via multi-label assignment and confidence-based reweighting for class-wise memory banks, which are updated by an entropy priority queue strategy. Then, the Dual-Clue Consistency Module (DCCM) introduces a lightweight narrator to generate textual clues indicating action progressions, which complement the visual clues containing various objects. Moreover, we constrain the inferred textual and visual logits to construct dual-clue consistency for temporally and spatially bridging Ego and Exo views. Extensive experiments on the newly proposed EgoMe-anti and the existing EgoExoLearn benchmarks show the effectiveness of our method, which outperforms related state-of-the-art methods by a large margin. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/ZhaofengSHI/DCPGN}{https://github.com/ZhaofengSHI/DCPGN}.

摘要（中文）: 人机协作等应用对自中心（Ego）视角和外中心（Exo）视角之间的有效适应至关重要。 然而，大多数现有Ego-Exo适应方法的成功很大程度上依赖于用于训练的目标视角数据，从而增加了计算和数据收集成本。 在本文中，我们首次探索了用于动作预测的测试时Ego-Exo适应（TE$^{2}$A$^{3}$）任务，该任务旨在在测试时在线调整源视角训练的模型，以预测目标视角动作。 由于多动作候选以及显著的时空视角间差异，现有测试时适应（TTA）方法难以解决此任务。 因此，我们提出了一种新颖的双线索增强原型增长网络（DCPGN），其积累多标签知识并整合跨模态线索，以实现有效的测试时Ego-Exo适应和动作预测。 具体来说，我们提出了一种多标签原型增长模块（ML-PGM），通过多标签分配和基于置信度的重加权来平衡多个正类，用于类别的记忆库，这些记忆库通过熵优先队列策略进行更新。 然后，双线索一致性模块（DCCM）引入了一个轻量级的叙述器来生成指示动作进展的文本线索，其补充了包含各种对象的视觉线索。 此外，我们约束推断的文本和视觉logits以构建双线索一致性，从而在时间上和空间上桥接Ego和Exo视角。 在新提出的EgoMe-anti和现有的EgoExoLearn基准上的大量实验表明了我们方法的有效性，其大幅优于相关的最先进方法。 代码可在\href{https://github.com/ZhaofengSHI/DCPGN}{https://github.com/ZhaofengSHI/DCPGN}获得。

TLDR: The paper introduces a novel Dual-Clue enhanced Prototype Growing Network (DCPGN) for test-time adaptation between egocentric and exocentric views for action anticipation, using multi-label prototype growing and dual-clue consistency to bridge the temporal-spatial gap.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一种新颖的双线索增强原型增长网络（DCPGN），用于在测试时进行自中心和外中心视图之间的适应以进行动作预测，使用多标签原型增长和双线索一致性来弥合时空差距。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (8/10)

Authors: Zhaofeng Shi, Heqian Qiu, Lanxiao Wang, Qingbo Wu, Fanman Meng, Lili Pan, Hongliang Li

ENIGMA-360: An Ego-Exo Dataset for Human Behavior Understanding in Industrial Scenarios

Abstract (English): Understanding human behavior from complementary egocentric (ego) and exocentric (exo) points of view enables the development of systems that can support workers in industrial environments and enhance their safety. However, progress in this area is hindered by the lack of datasets capturing both views in realistic industrial scenarios. To address this gap, we propose ENIGMA-360, a new ego-exo dataset acquired in a real industrial scenario. The dataset is composed of 180 egocentric and 180 exocentric procedural videos temporally synchronized offering complementary information of the same scene. The 360 videos have been labeled with temporal and spatial annotations, enabling the study of different aspects of human behavior in industrial domain. We provide baseline experiments for 3 foundational tasks for human behavior understanding: 1) Temporal Action Segmentation, 2) Keystep Recognition and 3) Egocentric Human-Object Interaction Detection, showing the limits of state-of-the-art approaches on this challenging scenario. These results highlight the need for new models capable of robust ego-exo understanding in real-world environments. We publicly release the dataset and its annotations at https://fpv-iplab.github.io/ENIGMA-360/.

摘要（中文）: 从互补的以自我为中心（ego）和以外部为中心（exo）的视角理解人类行为，能够开发出在工业环境中支持工人并增强其安全性的系统。然而，缺乏在真实工业场景中同时捕获这两种视角的成对数据集阻碍了该领域的发展。为了解决这一空白，我们提出了 ENIGMA-360，这是一个在真实工业场景中获取的新的 ego-exo 数据集。该数据集由 180 个以自我为中心的和 180 个以外部为中心的程序性视频组成，这些视频在时间上同步，提供了同一场景的互补信息。360 度视频已被标记了时间和空间标注，从而能够研究工业领域中人类行为的不同方面。我们为人类行为理解的三个基本任务提供了基线实验：1) 时序动作分割，2) 关键步骤识别，以及 3) 以自我为中心的人-物交互检测，展示了最先进方法在这个具有挑战性的场景中的局限性。这些结果强调了对能够在真实世界环境中进行鲁棒 ego-exo 理解的新模型的需求。我们公开发布数据集及其标注，网址为 https://fpv-iplab.github.io/ENIGMA-360/。

TLDR: The paper introduces ENIGMA-360, a new synchronized ego-exo dataset of industrial tasks with temporal and spatial annotations, and provides baseline results for action segmentation, keystep recognition, and H-O interaction detection, revealing limitations of current approaches.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了ENIGMA-360，一个同步的工业任务自我中心和外部中心数据集，具有时间和空间注释，并提供了动作分割、关键步骤识别和人-物交互检测的基线结果，揭示了当前方法的局限性。

Novelty: (7/10)

Authors: Francesco Ragusa, Rosario Leonardi, Michele Mazzamuto, Daniele Di Mauro, Camillo Quattrocchi, Alessandro Passanisi, Irene D'Ambra, Antonino Furnari, Giovanni Maria Farinella

VarSplat: Uncertainty-aware 3D Gaussian Splatting for Robust RGB-D SLAM

Abstract (English): Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) with 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) enables fast, differentiable rendering and high-fidelity reconstruction across diverse real-world scenes. However, existing 3DGS-SLAM approaches handle measurement reliability implicitly, making pose estimation and global alignment susceptible to drift in low-texture regions, transparent surfaces, or areas with complex reflectance properties. To this end, we introduce VarSplat, an uncertainty-aware 3DGS-SLAM system that explicitly learns per-splat appearance variance. By using the law of total variance with alpha compositing, we then render differentiable per-pixel uncertainty map via efficient, single-pass rasterization. This map guides tracking, submap registration, and loop detection toward focusing on reliable regions and contributes to more stable optimization. Experimental results on Replica (synthetic) and TUM-RGBD, ScanNet, and ScanNet++ (real-world) show that VarSplat improves robustness and achieves competitive or superior tracking, mapping, and novel view synthesis rendering compared to existing studies for dense RGB-D SLAM.

摘要（中文）: 基于3D高斯溅射(3DGS)的同步定位与地图构建(SLAM)能够实现快速、可微渲染，并在各种真实场景中进行高保真重建。然而，现有的3DGS-SLAM方法隐式地处理测量可靠性，使得位姿估计和全局对齐容易受到低纹理区域、透明表面或具有复杂反射特性的区域中漂移的影响。为此，我们提出VarSplat，一种感知不确定性的3DGS-SLAM系统，它显式地学习每个splat的外观方差。通过利用全方差定律与alpha合成技术，我们通过高效的单通道光栅化渲染可微的逐像素不确定性图。该图引导跟踪、子地图注册和回环检测，使其关注可靠区域，并有助于更稳定的优化。在Replica（合成）以及TUM-RGBD、ScanNet和ScanNet++（真实场景）上的实验结果表明，与现有的密集RGB-D SLAM研究相比，VarSplat提高了鲁棒性，并在跟踪、地图构建和新视角合成渲染方面实现了有竞争力或更优越的性能。

TLDR: VarSplat introduces an uncertainty-aware 3D Gaussian Splatting SLAM system that learns per-splat appearance variance for improved robustness in challenging environments, demonstrating superior tracking, mapping, and rendering performance.

简要说明: VarSplat 引入了一种不确定性感知的 3D 高斯溅射 SLAM 系统，该系统学习每个点的外观方差，从而提高在复杂环境中的鲁棒性，并展示出卓越的跟踪、建图和渲染性能。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Anh Thuan Tran, Jana Kosecka

ParTY: Part-Guidance for Expressive Text-to-Motion Synthesis

Abstract (English): Text-to-motion synthesis aims to generate natural and expressive human motions from textual descriptions. While existing approaches primarily focus on generating holistic motions from text descriptions, they struggle to accurately reflect actions involving specific body parts. Recent part-wise motion generation methods attempt to resolve this but face two critical limitations: (i) they lack explicit mechanisms for aligning textual semantics with individual body parts, and (ii) they often generate incoherent full-body motions due to integrating independently generated part motions. To overcome these issues and resolve the fundamental trade-off in existing methods, we propose ParTY, a novel framework that enhances part expressiveness while generating coherent full-body motions. ParTY comprises: (1) Part-Guided Network, which first generates part motions to obtain part guidance, then uses it to generate holistic motions; (2) Part-aware Text Grounding, which diversely transforms text embeddings and appropriately aligns them with each body part; and (3) Holistic-Part Fusion, which adaptively fuses holistic motions and part motions. Extensive experiments, including part-level and coherence-level evaluations, demonstrate that ParTY achieves substantial improvements over previous methods.

摘要（中文）: 文本到动作合成旨在从文本描述中生成自然且富有表现力的人体动作。虽然现有方法主要集中于从文本描述生成整体动作，但它们难以准确反映涉及特定身体部位的动作。最近出现的部分动作生成方法试图解决这个问题，但面临两个关键限制：（i）它们缺乏明确的机制来将文本语义与各个身体部位对齐，以及（ii）由于整合独立生成的部分动作，它们经常生成不连贯的全身动作。为了克服这些问题并解决现有方法中的根本性权衡，我们提出了ParTY，这是一个新颖的框架，它在生成连贯的全身动作的同时增强了部分表现力。ParTY包括：（1）部分引导网络，它首先生成部分动作以获得部分指导，然后利用它来生成整体动作；（2）部分感知文本对齐，它多样化地转换文本嵌入并将它们与每个身体部位适当对齐；以及（3）整体-部分融合，它自适应地融合整体动作和部分动作。广泛的实验，包括部分层级和连贯性层级的评估，表明ParTY相对于以前的方法取得了显著的改进。

TLDR: The paper introduces ParTY, a framework for text-to-motion synthesis that generates more expressive and coherent human motions by explicitly aligning textual semantics with individual body parts and adaptively fusing holistic and part motions.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一个名为ParTY的框架，用于文本到动作合成，通过将文本语义与各个身体部位对齐，并自适应地融合整体动作和部分动作，从而生成更具表现力和连贯性的人体动作。

Authors: KunHo Heo, SuYeon Kim, Yonghyun Gwon, Youngbin Kim, MyeongAh Cho

Memory-Guided View Refinement for Dynamic Human-in-the-loop EQA

Abstract (English): Embodied Question Answering (EQA) has traditionally been evaluated in temporally stable environments where visual evidence can be accumulated reliably. However, in dynamic, human-populated scenes, human activities and occlusions introduce significant perceptual non-stationarity: task-relevant cues are transient and view-dependent, while a store-then-retrieve strategy over-accumulates redundant evidence and increases inference cost. This setting exposes two practical challenges for EQA agents: resolving ambiguity caused by viewpoint-dependent occlusions, and maintaining compact yet up-to-date evidence for efficient inference. To enable systematic study of this setting, we introduce DynHiL-EQA, a human-in-the-loop EQA dataset with two subsets: a Dynamic subset featuring human activities and temporal changes, and a Static subset with temporally stable observations. To address the above challenges, we present DIVRR (Dynamic-Informed View Refinement and Relevance-guided Adaptive Memory Selection), a training-free framework that couples relevance-guided view refinement with selective memory admission. By verifying ambiguous observations before committing them and retaining only informative evidence, DIVRR improves robustness under occlusions while preserving fast inference with compact memory. Extensive experiments on DynHiL-EQA and the established HM-EQA dataset demonstrate that DIVRR consistently improves over existing baselines in both dynamic and static settings while maintaining high inference efficiency.

摘要（中文）: 具身问答 (EQA) 传统上是在时间稳定的环境中评估的，在这些环境中，视觉证据可以可靠地积累。然而，在动态的、有人群的场景中，人类活动和遮挡引入了显著的感知非平稳性：与任务相关的线索是短暂且视角相关的，而存储-然后-检索策略过度积累冗余证据并增加推理成本。这种设置暴露了 EQA 代理的两个实际挑战：解决由视角相关的遮挡引起的歧义，以及维护紧凑但最新的证据以实现高效推理。为了能够系统地研究这种设置，我们引入了 DynHiL-EQA，一个人工参与的 EQA 数据集，包含两个子集：一个以人类活动和时间变化为特征的动态子集，以及一个具有时间稳定观测的静态子集。为了应对上述挑战，我们提出了 DIVRR（动态信息驱动的视角精炼和相关性引导的自适应内存选择），这是一个无需训练的框架，它将相关性引导的视角精炼与选择性内存准入相结合。通过在提交之前验证模糊的观测结果并仅保留信息丰富的证据，DIVRR 提高了遮挡下的鲁棒性，同时通过紧凑的内存保持了快速推理。在 DynHiL-EQA 和已建立的 HM-EQA 数据集上的大量实验表明，DIVRR 一致地优于动态和静态设置中的现有基线，同时保持了较高的推理效率。

TLDR: The paper introduces a new dataset (DynHiL-EQA) and a training-free framework (DIVRR) for dynamic human-in-the-loop Embodied Question Answering, addressing challenges of perceptual non-stationarity and efficient inference.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一个新的数据集(DynHiL-EQA)和一个无需训练的框架(DIVRR)，用于解决动态人机交互式具身问答中关于感知非稳态和高效推理的挑战。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)

Authors: Xin Lu, Rui Li, Xun Huang, Weixin Li, Chuanqing Zhuang, Jiayuan Li, Zhengda Lu, Jun Xiao, Yunhong Wang

SurgFed: Language-guided Multi-Task Federated Learning for Surgical Video Understanding

Abstract (English): Surgical scene Multi-Task Federated Learning (MTFL) is essential for robot-assisted minimally invasive surgery (RAS) but remains underexplored in surgical video understanding due to two key challenges: (1) Tissue Diversity: Local models struggle to adapt to site-specific tissue features, limiting their effectiveness in heterogeneous clinical environments and leading to poor local predictions. (2) Task Diversity: Server-side aggregation, relying solely on gradient-based clustering, often produces suboptimal or incorrect parameter updates due to inter-site task heterogeneity, resulting in inaccurate localization. In light of these two issues, we propose SurgFed, a multi-task federated learning framework, enabling federated learning for surgical scene segmentation and depth estimation across diverse surgical types. SurgFed is powered by two appealing designs, i.e., Language-guided Channel Selection (LCS) and Language-guided Hyper Aggregation (LHA), to address the challenge of fully exploration on corss-site and cross-task. Technically, the LCS is first designed a lightweight personalized channel selection network that enhances site-specific adaptation using pre-defined text inputs, which optimally the local model learn the specific embeddings. We further introduce the LHA that employs a layer-wise cross-attention mechanism with pre-defined text inputs to model task interactions across sites and guide a hypernetwork for personalized parameter updates. Extensive empirical evidence shows that SurgFed yields improvements over the state-of-the-art methods in five public datasets across four surgical types. The code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/SurgFed-070E/.

摘要（中文）: 外科场景多任务联邦学习(MTFL)对于机器人辅助微创手术(RAS)至关重要，但由于以下两个关键挑战，其在手术视频理解领域的研究仍然不足：(1)组织多样性：局部模型难以适应特定部位的组织特征，限制了其在异构临床环境中的有效性，并导致较差的局部预测。(2)任务多样性：服务器端的聚合仅依赖于基于梯度的聚类，由于站点间的任务异质性，通常会产生次优或不正确的参数更新，导致定位不准确。鉴于这两个问题，我们提出了SurgFed，一个多任务联邦学习框架，可实现跨多种手术类型的手术场景分割和深度估计的联邦学习。SurgFed由两个引人注目的设计驱动，即语言引导的通道选择(LCS)和语言引导的超聚合(LHA)，以解决跨站点和跨任务的全面探索挑战。在技术上，LCS首先设计了一个轻量级的个性化通道选择网络，该网络使用预定义的文本输入来增强特定站点的适应性，从而优化局部模型学习特定嵌入。我们进一步引入了LHA，它采用具有预定义文本输入的逐层交叉注意力机制来建模跨站点的任务交互，并指导一个超网络进行个性化参数更新。大量的经验证据表明，SurgFed在四种手术类型的五个公共数据集上优于最先进的方法。代码可在https://anonymous.4open.science/r/SurgFed-070E/获取。

TLDR: SurgFed is a multi-task federated learning framework for surgical video understanding that uses language guidance to address tissue and task diversity, improving performance on segmentation and depth estimation across various surgical types.

简要说明: SurgFed是一个用于手术视频理解的多任务联邦学习框架，它利用语言指导来解决组织和任务多样性问题，从而提高在各种手术类型中的分割和深度估计的性能。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Zheng Fang, Ziwei Niu, Ziyue Wang, Zhu Zhuo, Haofeng Liu, Shuyang Qian, Jun Xia, Yueming Jin

MetaDAT: Generalizable Trajectory Prediction via Meta Pre-training and Data-Adaptive Test-Time Updating

Abstract (English): Existing trajectory prediction methods exhibit significant performance degradation under distribution shifts during test time. Although test-time training techniques have been explored to enable adaptation, current approaches rely on an offline pre-trained predictor that lacks online learning flexibility. Moreover, they depend on fixed online model updating rules that do not accommodate the specific characteristics of test data. To address these limitations, we first propose a meta-learning framework to directly optimize the predictor for fast and accurate online adaptation, which performs bi-level optimization on the performance of simulated test-time adaptation tasks during pre-training. Furthermore, at test time, we introduce a data-adaptive model updating mechanism that dynamically adjusts the predefined learning rates and updating frequencies based on online partial derivatives and hard sample selection. This mechanism enables the online learning rate to suit the test data, and focuses on informative hard samples to enhance efficiency. Experiments are conducted on various challenging cross-dataset distribution shift scenarios, including nuScenes, Lyft, and Waymo. Results demonstrate that our method achieves superior adaptation accuracy, surpassing state-of-the-art test-time training methods for trajectory prediction. Additionally, our method excels under suboptimal learning rates and high FPS demands, showcasing its robustness and practicality.

摘要（中文）: 现有的轨迹预测方法在测试时分布发生偏移的情况下表现出显著的性能下降。尽管已经探索了测试时训练技术来实现适应，但目前的方法依赖于缺乏在线学习灵活性的离线预训练预测器。此外，它们依赖于固定的在线模型更新规则，而这些规则不能适应测试数据的具体特征。为了解决这些限制，我们首先提出了一种元学习框架，用于直接优化预测器，以实现快速而准确的在线适应，该框架在预训练期间对模拟的测试时适应任务的性能执行双层优化。此外，在测试时，我们引入了一种数据自适应模型更新机制，该机制基于在线偏导数和难样本选择动态调整预定义的学习率和更新频率。这种机制使在线学习率能够适应测试数据，并专注于信息丰富的难样本，以提高效率。实验在各种具有挑战性的跨数据集分布偏移场景中进行，包括nuScenes、Lyft和Waymo。结果表明，我们的方法实现了卓越的适应精度，超过了最先进的轨迹预测测试时训练方法。此外，我们的方法在次优学习率和高FPS需求下表现出色，展现了其鲁棒性和实用性。

TLDR: The paper proposes MetaDAT, a meta-learning framework with data-adaptive test-time updating for trajectory prediction, addressing performance degradation under distribution shifts by optimizing for fast online adaptation and dynamically adjusting learning rates based on online data.

简要说明: 该论文提出了 MetaDAT，一个具有数据自适应测试时更新的元学习框架，用于轨迹预测。它通过优化快速在线适应和基于在线数据动态调整学习率，解决了分布偏移下的性能下降问题。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Yuning Wang, Pu Zhang, Yuan He, Ke Wang, Jianru Xue

From Weighting to Modeling: A Nonparametric Estimator for Off-Policy Evaluation

Abstract (English): We study off-policy evaluation in the setting of contextual bandits, where we aim to evaluate a new policy using historical data that consists of contexts, actions and received rewards. This historical data typically does not faithfully represent action distribution of the new policy accurately. A common approach, inverse probability weighting (IPW), adjusts for these discrepancies in action distributions. However, this method often suffers from high variance due to the probability being in the denominator. The doubly robust (DR) estimator reduces variance through modeling reward but does not directly address variance from IPW. In this work, we address the limitation of IPW by proposing a Nonparametric Weighting (NW) approach that constructs weights using a nonparametric model. Our NW approach achieves low bias like IPW but typically exhibits significantly lower variance. To further reduce variance, we incorporate reward predictions -- similar to the DR technique -- resulting in the Model-assisted Nonparametric Weighting (MNW) approach. The MNW approach yields accurate value estimates by explicitly modeling and mitigating bias from reward modeling, without aiming to guarantee the standard doubly robust property. Extensive empirical comparisons show that our approaches consistently outperform existing techniques, achieving lower variance in value estimation while maintaining low bias.

摘要（中文）: 我们研究了上下文老虎机中的离线策略评估，其目标是利用包含上下文、动作和接收到的奖励的历史数据来评估一种新的策略。这些历史数据通常不能忠实地代表新策略的动作分布。一种常见的方法，逆概率加权 (IPW)，通过调整动作分布中的这些差异来校正偏差。然而，由于概率位于分母中，这种方法常常遭受高方差的困扰。双重鲁棒 (DR) 估计器通过对奖励进行建模来降低方差，但并未直接解决 IPW 带来的方差。在这项工作中，我们通过提出一种使用非参数模型构造权重的非参数加权 (NW) 方法来解决 IPW 的局限性。我们的 NW 方法实现了与 IPW 相似的低偏差，但通常表现出显著更低的方差。为了进一步降低方差，我们结合了奖励预测——类似于 DR 技术——由此产生了模型辅助的非参数加权 (MNW) 方法。MNW 方法通过显式地建模和减轻来自奖励建模的偏差来产生准确的价值估计，而无需旨在保证标准的双重鲁棒性。大量的实证比较表明，我们的方法始终优于现有技术，在保持低偏差的同时，实现了价值估计中更低的方差。

TLDR: The paper introduces Nonparametric Weighting (NW) and Model-assisted Nonparametric Weighting (MNW) for off-policy evaluation in contextual bandits, achieving lower variance than IPW and DR while maintaining low bias and outperforming existing methods empirically.

简要说明: 本文提出了非参数权重(NW)和模型辅助非参数权重(MNW)方法，用于情境bandit中的离策略评估。与IPW和DR相比，该方法在保持低偏差的同时实现更低的方差，并且在实验中优于现有方法。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Rong J. B. Zhu

Strategically Robust Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning with Linear Function Approximation

Abstract (English): Provably efficient and robust equilibrium computation in general-sum Markov games remains a core challenge in multi-agent reinforcement learning. Nash equilibrium is computationally intractable in general and brittle due to equilibrium multiplicity and sensitivity to approximation error. We study Risk-Sensitive Quantal Response Equilibrium (RQRE), which yields a unique, smooth solution under bounded rationality and risk sensitivity. We propose \texttt{RQRE-OVI}, an optimistic value iteration algorithm for computing RQRE with linear function approximation in large or continuous state spaces. Through finite-sample regret analysis, we establish convergence and explicitly characterize how sample complexity scales with rationality and risk-sensitivity parameters. The regret bounds reveal a quantitative tradeoff: increasing rationality tightens regret, while risk sensitivity induces regularization that enhances stability and robustness. This exposes a Pareto frontier between expected performance and robustness, with Nash recovered in the limit of perfect rationality and risk neutrality. We further show that the RQRE policy map is Lipschitz continuous in estimated payoffs, unlike Nash, and RQRE admits a distributionally robust optimization interpretation. Empirically, we demonstrate that \texttt{RQRE-OVI} achieves competitive performance under self-play while producing substantially more robust behavior under cross-play compared to Nash-based approaches. These results suggest \texttt{RQRE-OVI} offers a principled, scalable, and tunable path for equilibrium learning with improved robustness and generalization.

摘要（中文）: 在一般和马尔可夫博弈中，可证明高效且稳健的均衡计算仍然是多智能体强化学习的核心挑战。纳什均衡通常在计算上难以处理，并且由于均衡多元性和对近似误差的敏感性而显得脆弱。我们研究了风险敏感的定量反应均衡(RQRE)，它在有界理性和风险敏感性的条件下产生独特的、平滑的解。我们提出了 \texttt{RQRE-OVI}，一种乐观值迭代算法，用于在大规模或连续状态空间中使用线性函数逼近来计算 RQRE。通过有限样本后悔分析，我们建立了算法的收敛性，并明确描述了样本复杂度如何随理性和风险敏感性参数变化。后悔边界揭示了一种定量的权衡：增加理性会收紧后悔，而风险敏感性会引入正则化，从而增强稳定性和稳健性。这揭示了预期性能和稳健性之间的帕累托边界，其中纳什均衡恢复到完全理性和风险中立的极限情况。我们进一步表明，与纳什均衡不同，RQRE策略映射在估计收益方面是Lipschitz连续的，并且RQRE允许分布鲁棒优化解释。在经验上，我们证明了 \texttt{RQRE-OVI} 在自博弈中取得了具有竞争力的性能，同时与基于纳什的方法相比，在交叉博弈中产生了显著更稳健的行为。这些结果表明 \texttt{RQRE-OVI} 为均衡学习提供了一条有原则的、可扩展的和可调整的路径，具有改进的稳健性和泛化能力。

TLDR: This paper introduces RQRE-OVI, a reinforcement learning algorithm for computing Risk-Sensitive Quantal Response Equilibrium in multi-agent settings with linear function approximation, demonstrating improved robustness and generalization compared to Nash-based approaches.

简要说明: 本文介绍了RQRE-OVI，一种强化学习算法，用于在多智能体环境中计算具有线性函数逼近的风险敏感定量响应均衡，与基于纳什的方法相比，表现出更好的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

Relevance: (7/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (7/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Jake Gonzales, Max Horwitz, Eric Mazumdar, Lillian J. Ratliff

Caterpillar-Inspired Spring-Based Compressive Continuum Robot for Bristle-based Exploration

Abstract (English): Exploration of confined spaces, such as pipelines and ducts, remains challenging for conventional rigid robots due to limited space, irregular geometry, and restricted access. Inspired by caterpillar locomotion and sensing, this paper presents a compact spring-based tendon-driven continuum robot that integrates with commercial robotic arms for confined-space inspection. The system combines a mechanically compliant continuum body with a tendon actuation module, enabling coupled bending and axial length change, and uses a constant-curvature kinematic model for positional control. Experiments show a mean position error of 4.32 mm under the proposed model and control pipeline. To extend the system from motion to inspection, we integrate an artificial bristle contact sensor and demonstrate surface perception and confined-space exploration through contact interactions. This compact and compliant design offers a cost-effective upgrade for commercial robots and promises effective exploration in challenging environments.

摘要（中文）: 管道和导管等密闭空间的探索对于传统的刚性机器人来说仍然充满挑战，原因是空间有限、几何形状不规则以及入口受限。受到毛毛虫运动和感知的启发，本文提出了一种紧凑的基于弹簧的肌腱驱动连续体机器人，该机器人与商用机械臂集成，用于密闭空间检测。该系统将机械柔顺的连续体本体与肌腱驱动模块相结合，实现了耦合的弯曲和轴向长度变化，并使用恒曲率运动学模型进行位置控制。实验表明，在所提出的模型和控制流程下，平均位置误差为 4.32 毫米。为了将系统从运动扩展到检测，我们集成了一个人工刷毛接触传感器，并通过接触交互展示了表面感知和密闭空间探索。这种紧凑且柔顺的设计为商业机器人提供了一种经济高效的升级方案，并有望在具有挑战性的环境中进行有效的探索。

TLDR: This paper presents a caterpillar-inspired, spring-based continuum robot with bristle sensors for confined-space exploration, offering a cost-effective upgrade for commercial robots. The robot achieves reasonable positional accuracy and demonstrates surface perception through contact.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种受毛毛虫启发的、基于弹簧的连续体机器人，带有刷毛传感器，用于受限空间探索，为商业机器人提供了一种经济高效的升级方案。该机器人实现了合理的定位精度，并通过接触展示了表面感知能力。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (6/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
