Authors: Zhixian Hu, Yu She, Juan Wachs

$M^2$-Occ: Resilient 3D Semantic Occupancy Prediction for Autonomous Driving with Incomplete Camera Inputs

Abstract (English): Semantic occupancy prediction enables dense 3D geometric and semantic understanding for autonomous driving. However, existing camera-based approaches implicitly assume complete surround-view observations, an assumption that rarely holds in real-world deployment due to occlusion, hardware malfunction, or communication failures. We study semantic occupancy prediction under incomplete multi-camera inputs and introduce $M^2$-Occ, a framework designed to preserve geometric structure and semantic coherence when views are missing. $M^2$-Occ addresses two complementary challenges. First, a Multi-view Masked Reconstruction (MMR) module leverages the spatial overlap among neighboring cameras to recover missing-view representations directly in the feature space. Second, a Feature Memory Module (FMM) introduces a learnable memory bank that stores class-level semantic prototypes. By retrieving and integrating these global priors, the FMM refines ambiguous voxel features, ensuring semantic consistency even when observational evidence is incomplete. We introduce a systematic missing-view evaluation protocol on the nuScenes-based SurroundOcc benchmark, encompassing both deterministic single-view failures and stochastic multi-view dropout scenarios. Under the safety-critical missing back-view setting, $M^2$-Occ improves the IoU by 4.93%. As the number of missing cameras increases, the robustness gap further widens; for instance, under the setting with five missing views, our method boosts the IoU by 5.01%. These gains are achieved without compromising full-view performance. The source code will be publicly released at https://github.com/qixi7up/M2-Occ.

摘要（中文）: 语义占据预测能够为自动驾驶提供密集的3D几何和语义理解。然而，现有的基于摄像头的方法隐式地假设了完整的环视观测，但由于遮挡、硬件故障或通信失败，这一假设在实际部署中很少成立。我们研究了在不完整的多摄像头输入下的语义占据预测，并提出了$M^2$-Occ，这是一个旨在当视角缺失时保持几何结构和语义连贯性的框架。 $M^2$-Occ解决了两个互补的挑战。首先，多视角掩码重建（MMR）模块利用相邻摄像头之间的空间重叠，直接在特征空间中恢复缺失视角的表示。其次，特征记忆模块（FMM）引入了一个可学习的记忆库，存储了类级别的语义原型。通过检索和整合这些全局先验知识，FMM优化了模糊的体素特征，即使在观测证据不完整时也能确保语义一致性。 我们在基于nuScenes的SurroundOcc基准上引入了一个系统的缺失视角评估协议，包括确定性的单视角故障和随机的多视角丢弃场景。在安全至关重要的后视缺失场景下，$M^2$-Occ将IoU提高了4.93%。 随着缺失摄像头数量的增加，鲁棒性差距进一步扩大；例如，在五个视角缺失的情况下，我们的方法将IoU提高了5.01%。 这些提升是在不牺牲完整视角性能的前提下实现的。 源代码将在https://github.com/qixi7up/M2-Occ上公开。

TLDR: The paper introduces M2-Occ, a framework for resilient 3D semantic occupancy prediction in autonomous driving under incomplete camera input, using masked reconstruction and a feature memory module to handle missing view data.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了M2-Occ，一个在不完整相机输入下，用于自动驾驶的弹性3D语义占用预测框架。它使用掩码重建和特征记忆模块来处理缺失的视图数据。

Relevance: (5/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (6/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Kaixin Lin, Kunyu Peng, Di Wen, Yufan Chen, Ruiping Liu, Kailun Yang

Efficient and robust control with spikes that constrain free energy

Abstract (English): Animal brains exhibit remarkable efficiency in perception and action, while being robust to both external and internal perturbations. The means by which brains accomplish this remains, for now, poorly understood, hindering our understanding of animal and human cognition, as well as our own implementation of efficient algorithms for control of dynamical systems.A potential candidate for a robust mechanism of state estimation and action computation is the free energy principle, but existing implementations of this principle have largely relied on conventional, biologically implausible approaches without spikes. We propose a novel, efficient, and robust spiking control framework with realistic biological characteristics. The resulting networks function as free energy constrainers, in which neurons only fire if they reduce the free energy of their internal representation. The networks offer efficient operation through highly sparse activity while matching performance with other similar spiking frameworks, and have high resilience against both external (e.g. sensory noise or collisions) and internal perturbations (e.g. synaptic noise and delays or neuron silencing) that such a network would be faced with when deployed by either an organism or an engineer. Overall, our work provides a novel mathematical account for spiking control through constraining free energy, providing both better insight into how brain networks might leverage their spiking substrate and a new route for implementing efficient control algorithms in neuromorphic hardware.

摘要（中文）: 动物大脑在感知和行动方面表现出卓越的效率，同时对外部和内部扰动具有鲁棒性。大脑实现这一目标的方式目前仍知之甚少，这阻碍了我们对动物和人类认知的理解，以及我们自身对控制动力系统的有效算法的实现。自由能原理是状态估计和行动计算的一种潜在的鲁棒机制，但现有的该原理的实现主要依赖于传统的、在生物学上不可靠的方法，即不使用脉冲。我们提出了一种新颖、高效且鲁棒的脉冲控制框架，该框架具有现实的生物学特征。由此产生的网络作为自由能约束器发挥作用，其中神经元只有在减少其内部表征的自由能时才会放电。这些网络通过高度稀疏的活动提供高效的运作，同时与其他类似的脉冲框架的性能相匹配，并且对外部（例如，感觉噪声或碰撞）和内部扰动（例如，突触噪声和延迟或神经元沉默）具有高度的弹性，生物体或工程师在部署这些网络时会面临这些扰动。总而言之，我们的工作为通过约束自由能的脉冲控制提供了一种新的数学解释，从而更好地了解大脑网络如何利用其脉冲基质，并为在神经形态硬件中实现高效的控制算法提供了一条新途径。

TLDR: This paper introduces a novel spiking control framework based on the free energy principle, demonstrating efficient and robust control capabilities with biological plausibility and potential for neuromorphic hardware implementation.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种基于自由能原理的新型脉冲控制框架，展示了高效且稳健的控制能力，具有生物合理性并有望在神经形态硬件中实现。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (7/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (6/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: André Urbano, Pablo Lanillos, Sander Keemink

On the Cost of Evolving Task Specialization in Multi-Robot Systems

Abstract (English): Task specialization can lead to simpler robot behaviors and higher efficiency in multi-robot systems. Previous works have shown the emergence of task specialization during evolutionary optimization, focusing on feasibility rather than costs. In this study, we take first steps toward a cost-benefit analysis of task specialization in robot swarms using a foraging scenario. We evolve artificial neural networks as generalist behaviors for the entire task and as task-specialist behaviors for subtasks within a limited evaluation budget. We show that generalist behaviors can be successfully optimized while the evolved task-specialist controllers fail to cooperate efficiently, resulting in worse performance than the generalists. Consequently, task specialization does not necessarily improve efficiency when optimization budget is limited.

摘要（中文）: 在多机器人系统中，任务专业化能够带来更简单的机器人行为和更高的效率。以往研究表明，在进化优化过程中会出现任务专业化，但侧重于可行性而非成本。在本研究中，我们首次对机器人群体中的任务专业化进行成本效益分析，使用了一个觅食场景。我们进化人工神经网络，分别作为整个任务的通用行为，以及在有限的评估预算下，作为子任务的任务专业行为。我们表明通用行为可以成功优化，而进化的任务专业控制器未能有效合作，导致比通用行为更差的性能。因此，当优化预算有限时，任务专业化不一定会提高效率。

TLDR: This paper investigates the cost-benefit trade-offs of evolving task specialization in multi-robot foraging swarms, finding that under limited optimization budgets, generalist behaviors can outperform task-specialist behaviors. It highlights that task specialization does not guarantee improved efficiency with limited resources.

简要说明: 本文研究了多机器人觅食群体中进化任务专业化的成本效益权衡，发现在有限的优化预算下，通用行为的表现优于任务专业行为。这表明在资源有限的情况下，任务专业化并不能保证提高效率。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)
Overall: (6/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Paolo Leopardi, Heiko Hamann, Jonas Kuckling, Tanja Katharina Kaiser

Receptogenesis in a Vascularized Robotic Embodiment

Abstract (English): Equipping robotic systems with the capacity to generate $\textit{ex novo}$ hardware during operation extends control of physical adaptability. Unlike modular systems that rely on discrete component integration pre- or post-deployment, we envision the possibility that physical adaptation and development emerge from dynamic material restructuring to shape the body's intrinsic functions. Drawing inspiration from circulatory systems that redistribute mass and function in biological organisms, we utilize fluidics to restructure the material interface, a capability currently unpaired in robotics. Here, we realize this synthetic growth capability through a vascularized robotic composite designed for programmable material synthesis, demonstrated via receptogenesis - the on-demand construction of sensors from internal fluid reserves based on environmental cues. By coordinating the fluidic transport of precursors with external localized UV irradiation, we drive an $\textit{in situ}$ photopolymerization that chemically reconstructs the vasculature from the inside out. This reaction converts precursors with photolatent initiator into a solid dispersion of UV-sensitive polypyrrole, establishing a sensing modality validated by a characteristic decrease in electrical impedance. The newly synthesized sensor closed a control loop to regulate wing flapping in a moth-inspired robotic demonstrator. This physical update increased the robot's capability in real time. This work establishes a materials-based framework for constitutive evolution, enabling robots to physically grow the hardware needed to support emerging behaviors in a complex environment; for example, suggesting a pathway toward autonomous systems capable of generating specialized features, such as neurovascular systems in situated robotics.

摘要（中文）: 为机器人系统配备在运行过程中生成$\textit{ex novo}$硬件的能力扩展了对物理适应性的控制。与依赖于部署前后离散组件集成的模块化系统不同，我们设想物理适应和发展源于动态材料重构，从而塑造机体的内在功能的可能性。受在生物有机体内重新分配质量和功能的循环系统的启发，我们利用流体技术来重构材料界面，这是一种目前在机器人技术中尚未成对出现的能力。在此，我们通过血管化的机器人复合材料来实现这种合成生长能力，该复合材料设计用于可编程材料合成，并通过感受器生成——基于环境线索从内部流体储备中按需构建传感器——进行演示。通过协调前体的流体传输与外部局部紫外线照射，我们驱动$\textit{in situ}$光聚合，从而从内到外化学重构血管系统。该反应将具有光潜伏引发剂的前体转化为对紫外敏感的聚吡咯的固体分散体，从而建立一种通过电气阻抗的特征性降低而验证的传感模式。新合成的传感器构成了一个控制回路，用于调节模仿飞蛾的机器人演示器的翅膀拍动。这种物理更新实时提高了机器人的能力。这项工作建立了一个基于材料的本构演化框架，使机器人能够在复杂的环境中物理生长支持新兴行为所需的硬件；例如，为能够生成专门功能的自主系统提供了一条途径，例如位于特定环境中的机器人的神经血管系统。

TLDR: The paper presents a vascularized robotic system that can synthesize sensors on demand by using fluidics and UV irradiation to photopolymerize precursors into functional components, demonstrating a form of `in situ` hardware creation for physical adaptation.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一种血管化机器人系统，它可以通过流体和紫外线照射按需合成传感器，通过将前体光聚合为功能性组件，展示了一种用于物理适应的“原位”硬件创建形式。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (9/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (6/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Kadri-Ann Pankratov, Leonid Zinatullin, Hans Priks, Adele Metsniit, Urmas Johanson, Tarmo Tamm, Alvo Aabloo, Edoardo Sinibaldi, Indrek Must

Robust Spatiotemporal Motion Planning for Multi-Agent Autonomous Racing via Topological Gap Identification and Accelerated MPC

Abstract (English): High-speed multi-agent autonomous racing demands robust spatiotemporal planning and precise control under strict computational limits. Current methods often oversimplify interactions or abandon strict kinematic constraints. We resolve this by proposing a Topological Gap Identification and Accelerated MPC framework. By predicting opponent behaviors via SGPs, our method constructs dynamic occupancy corridors to robustly select optimal overtaking gaps. We ensure strict kinematic feasibility using a Linear Time-Varying MPC powered by a customized Pseudo-Transient Continuation (PTC) solver for high-frequency execution. Experimental results on the F1TENTH platform show that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines: it reduces total maneuver time by 51.6% in sequential scenarios, consistently maintains an overtaking success rate exceeding 81% in dense bottlenecks, and lowers average computational latency by 20.3%, pushing the boundaries of safe and high-speed autonomous racing.

摘要（中文）: 高速多智能体自主赛车需要在严格的计算限制下进行鲁棒的时空规划和精确控制。目前的方法通常会过度简化交互或放弃严格的运动学约束。我们通过提出拓扑间隙识别和加速MPC框架来解决这个问题。通过SGPs预测对手行为，我们的方法构建动态占用走廊，以稳健地选择最佳超车间隙。我们使用由定制伪瞬态延续（PTC）求解器驱动的线性时变MPC来确保严格的运动学可行性，以实现高频执行。在F1TENTH平台上的实验结果表明，我们的方法显著优于最先进的基线：在顺序场景中，总操纵时间减少了51.6%；在密集的瓶颈中，始终保持超过81%的超车成功率；并将平均计算延迟降低了20.3%，从而推动了安全和高速自主赛车的界限。

TLDR: This paper presents a novel framework for robust spatiotemporal motion planning in multi-agent autonomous racing, using topological gap identification and accelerated MPC to achieve significant performance improvements over state-of-the-art methods in terms of maneuver time, overtaking success rate, and computational latency.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种新的框架，用于多智能体自主赛车中稳健的时空运动规划，通过拓扑间隙识别和加速MPC，在机动时间、超车成功率和计算延迟方面，实现了比现有技术显著的性能提升。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (6/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Mingyi Zhang, Cheng Hu, Yiqin Wang, Haotong Qin, Hongye Su, Lei Xie

Walking on Rough Terrain with Any Number of Legs

Abstract (English): Robotics would gain by replicating the remarkable agility of arthropods in navigating complex environments. Here we consider the control of multi-legged systems which have 6 or more legs. Current multi-legged control strategies in robots include large black-box machine learning models, Central Pattern Generator (CPG) networks, and open-loop feed-forward control with stability arising from mechanics. Here we present a multi-legged control architecture for rough terrain using a segmental robot with 3 actuators for every 2 legs, which we validated in simulation for robots with 6 to 16 legs. Segments have identical state machines, and each segment also receives input from the segment in front of it. Our design bridges the gap between WalkNet-like event cascade controllers and CPG-based controllers: it tightly couples to the ground when contact is present, but produces fictive locomotion when ground contact is missing. The approach may be useful as an adaptive and computationally lightweight controller for multi-legged robots, and as a baseline capability for scaffolding the learning of machine learning controllers.

摘要（中文）: 机器人可以通过复制节肢动物在复杂环境中卓越的敏捷性来获得发展。本文考虑了对拥有6条或更多腿的多足系统的控制。目前机器人中多足控制策略包括大型黑盒机器学习模型、中央模式发生器（CPG）网络，以及通过机械结构实现稳定性的开环前馈控制。本文提出了一种用于崎岖地形的多足控制架构，该架构采用一种每两腿配有3个执行器的分段式机器人，并在仿真中验证了其对6腿至16腿机器人的适用性。各个分段具有相同的状态机，并且每个分段还接收来自前方分段的输入。我们的设计弥合了类似WalkNet的事件级联控制器与基于CPG的控制器之间的差距：当存在地面接触时，它与地面紧密耦合；当缺失地面接触时，它产生虚拟运动。该方法可能作为一种适用于多足机器人的自适应且计算量轻型的控制器，以及作为机器学习控制器学习的底层支撑能力而发挥作用。

TLDR: This paper presents a novel, computationally lightweight control architecture for multi-legged robots navigating rough terrain, combining aspects of WalkNet and CPG controllers and validated in simulation for 6-16 legged robots.

简要说明: 该论文提出了一种用于多足机器人通过崎岖地形的新颖且计算量轻的控制架构，结合了 WalkNet 和 CPG 控制器的优点，并在模拟中验证了其对于 6-16 条腿的机器人的有效性。

Relevance: (6/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)

Authors: Zhuoyang Chen, Xinyuan Wang, Shai Revzen

Cutting the Cord: System Architecture for Low-Cost, GPU-Accelerated Bimanual Mobile Manipulation

Abstract (English): We present a bimanual mobile manipulator built on the open-source XLeRobot with integrated onboard compute for less than \$1300. Key contributions include: (1) optimized mechanical design maximizing stiffness-to-weight ratio, (2) a Tri-Bus power topology isolating compute from motor-induced voltage transients, and (3) embedded autonomy using NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano for untethered operation. The platform enables teleoperation, autonomous SLAM navigation, and vision-based manipulation without external dependencies, providing a low-cost alternative for research and education in robotics and robot learning.

摘要（中文）: 我们提出了一款基于开源XLeRobot的双臂移动机械臂，集成了板载计算，成本低于1300美元。主要贡献包括：（1）优化的机械设计，最大限度地提高了刚度重量比；（2）一种Tri-Bus电源拓扑，将计算单元与电机引起的电压瞬变隔离;（3）使用NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano进行嵌入式自主，实现无束缚操作。该平台支持遥操作、自主SLAM导航和基于视觉的操纵，且无需外部依赖，为机器人和机器人学习领域的研究和教育提供了一种低成本的替代方案。

TLDR: This paper presents a low-cost bimanual mobile manipulator system with onboard computation for autonomous robotics research and education, emphasizing optimized mechanical design and power topology for improved robustness.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种低成本的双臂移动操作机器人系统，该系统具有用于自主机器人研究和教育的板载计算能力，并强调了优化的机械设计和电源拓扑以提高鲁棒性。

Relevance: (5/10)
Novelty: (6/10)
Clarity: (8/10)

Authors: Artemis Shaw, Chen Liu, Justin Costa, Rane Gray, Alina Skowronek, Kevin Diaz, Nam Bui, Nikolaus Correll

Predictive Control with Indirect Adaptive Laws for Payload Transportation by Quadrupedal Robots

Abstract (English): This paper formally develops a novel hierarchical planning and control framework for robust payload transportation by quadrupedal robots, integrating a model predictive control (MPC) algorithm with a gradient-descent-based adaptive updating law. At the framework's high level, an indirect adaptive law estimates the unknown parameters of the reduced-order (template) locomotion model under varying payloads. These estimated parameters feed into an MPC algorithm for real-time trajectory planning, incorporating a convex stability criterion within the MPC constraints to ensure the stability of the template model's estimation error. The optimal reduced-order trajectories generated by the high-level adaptive MPC (AMPC) are then passed to a low-level nonlinear whole-body controller (WBC) for tracking. Extensive numerical investigations validate the framework's capabilities, showcasing the robot's proficiency in transporting unmodeled, unknown static payloads up to 109% in experiments on flat terrains and 91% on rough experimental terrains. The robot also successfully manages dynamic payloads with 73% of its mass on rough terrains. Performance comparisons with a normal MPC and an L1 MPC indicate a significant improvement. Furthermore, comprehensive hardware experiments conducted in indoor and outdoor environments confirm the method's efficacy on rough terrains despite uncertainties such as payload variations, push disturbances, and obstacles.

摘要（中文）: 本文正式提出了一种新型的分层规划与控制框架，用于四足机器人的鲁棒负载运输，该框架集成了模型预测控制(MPC)算法和基于梯度下降的自适应更新律。 在框架的上层，一种间接自适应律估计简化阶次（模板）运动模型在不同负载下的未知参数。 这些估计参数被输入到MPC算法中进行实时轨迹规划，该算法在MPC约束中加入了凸稳定性准则，以确保模板模型估计误差的稳定性。 由上层自适应MPC (AMPC) 生成的最优降阶轨迹随后被传递到下层非线性全身控制器(WBC) 进行跟踪。 广泛的数值研究验证了该框架的性能，展示了机器人在平坦地形实验中运输高达其质量109%的未建模、未知静态负载的能力，以及在粗糙实验地形上达到91%的能力。 机器人还在粗糙地形上成功地管理了质量为其自身73%的动态负载。 与普通MPC和L1 MPC的性能比较表明，该框架具有显著的改进。 此外，在室内和室外环境中进行的全面硬件实验证实了该方法在粗糙地形上的有效性，尽管存在负载变化、推力扰动和障碍物等不确定性。

TLDR: This paper presents a hierarchical adaptive model predictive control (AMPC) framework for quadrupedal robots to robustly transport unknown payloads, validated through simulations and hardware experiments on various terrains.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种分层自适应模型预测控制（AMPC）框架，用于四足机器人稳健地运输未知载荷，并通过在各种地形上的仿真和硬件实验进行了验证。

Relevance: (4/10)

Authors: Leila Amanzadeh, Taizoon Chunawala, Randall T. Fawcett, Alexander Leonessa, Kaveh Akbari Hamed

Multi-model approach for autonomous driving: A comprehensive study on traffic sign-, vehicle- and lane detection and behavioral cloning

Abstract (English): Deep learning and computer vision techniques have become increasingly important in the development of self-driving cars. These techniques play a crucial role in enabling self-driving cars to perceive and understand their surroundings, allowing them to safely navigate and make decisions in real-time. Using Neural Networks self-driving cars can accurately identify and classify objects such as pedestrians, other vehicles, and traffic signals. Using deep learning and analyzing data from sensors such as cameras and radar, self-driving cars can predict the likely movement of other objects and plan their own actions accordingly. In this study, a novel approach to enhance the performance of selfdriving cars by using pre-trained and custom-made neural networks for key tasks, including traffic sign classification, vehicle detection, lane detection, and behavioral cloning is provided. The methodology integrates several innovative techniques, such as geometric and color transformations for data augmentation, image normalization, and transfer learning for feature extraction. These techniques are applied to diverse datasets,including the German Traffic Sign Recognition Benchmark (GTSRB), road and lane segmentation datasets, vehicle detection datasets, and data collected using the Udacity selfdriving car simulator to evaluate the model efficacy. The primary objective of the work is to review the state-of-the-art in deep learning and computer vision for self-driving cars. The findings of the work are effective in solving various challenges related to self-driving cars like traffic sign classification, lane prediction, vehicle detection, and behavioral cloning, and provide valuable insights into improving the robustness and reliability of autonomous systems, paving the way for future research and deployment of safer and more efficient self-driving technologies.

摘要（中文）: 深度学习和计算机视觉技术在自动驾驶汽车的开发中变得日益重要。这些技术在使自动驾驶汽车能够感知和理解周围环境方面发挥着关键作用，从而使其能够安全地导航并实时做出决策。借助神经网络，自动驾驶汽车能够准确地识别和分类诸如行人、其他车辆和交通信号等物体。通过使用深度学习并分析来自诸如摄像头和雷达等传感器的数据，自动驾驶汽车可以预测其他物体的可能运动，并据此规划自己的行动。本研究提出了一种新颖的方法，通过使用预训练和定制的神经网络来增强自动驾驶汽车的性能，用于关键任务，包括交通标志分类、车辆检测、车道检测和行为克隆。该方法整合了多种创新技术，例如用于数据增强的几何和颜色变换、图像归一化以及用于特征提取的迁移学习。这些技术应用于各种数据集，包括德国交通标志识别基准（GTSRB）、道路和车道分割数据集、车辆检测数据集以及使用Udacity自动驾驶汽车模拟器收集的数据，以评估模型的有效性。本工作的主要目的是综述自动驾驶汽车领域中深度学习和计算机视觉的最新进展。研究结果能够有效解决与自动驾驶汽车相关的各种挑战，如交通标志分类、车道预测、车辆检测和行为克隆，并为提高自主系统的鲁棒性和可靠性提供有价值的见解，从而为未来更安全、更高效的自动驾驶技术的研究和部署铺平道路。

TLDR: This paper explores a multi-model deep learning approach for autonomous driving, focusing on traffic sign, vehicle, and lane detection, along with behavioral cloning, utilizing techniques like data augmentation and transfer learning. It aims to improve the robustness of self-driving systems.

简要说明: 本文探讨了一种用于自动驾驶的多模型深度学习方法，重点关注交通标志、车辆和车道检测以及行为克隆，利用数据增强和迁移学习等技术。旨在提高自动驾驶系统的鲁棒性。

Relevance: (6/10)

Authors: Kanishkha Jaisankar, Pranav M. Pawar, Diana Susane Joseph, Raja Muthalagu, Mithun Mukherjee

ReCoSplat: Autoregressive Feed-Forward Gaussian Splatting Using Render-and-Compare

Abstract (English): Online novel view synthesis remains challenging, requiring robust scene reconstruction from sequential, often unposed, observations. We present ReCoSplat, an autoregressive feed-forward Gaussian Splatting model supporting posed or unposed inputs, with or without camera intrinsics. While assembling local Gaussians using camera poses scales better than canonical-space prediction, it creates a dilemma during training: using ground-truth poses ensures stability but causes a distribution mismatch when predicted poses are used at inference. To address this, we introduce a Render-and-Compare (ReCo) module. ReCo renders the current reconstruction from the predicted viewpoint and compares it with the incoming observation, providing a stable conditioning signal that compensates for pose errors. To support long sequences, we propose a hybrid KV cache compression strategy combining early-layer truncation with chunk-level selective retention, reducing the KV cache size by over 90% for 100+ frames. ReCoSplat achieves state-of-the-art performance across different input settings on both in- and out-of-distribution benchmarks. Code and pretrained models will be released. Our project page is at https://freemancheng.com/ReCoSplat .

摘要（中文）: 在线新视角合成仍然具有挑战性，它需要从连续的、通常未提供位姿的观测中进行稳健的场景重建。我们提出了ReCoSplat，一个自回归前馈高斯溅射模型，支持带有或不带有相机内参的，有位姿或无位姿的输入。虽然使用相机位姿组装局部高斯分布相比于使用规范空间预测具有更好的可扩展性，但它在训练过程中产生了一个难题：使用真实位姿可以确保稳定性，但在推理时使用预测位姿会导致分布不匹配。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一个渲染-比较（ReCo）模块。ReCo从预测的视角渲染当前的重建结果，并将其与输入的观测进行比较，从而提供一个稳定的条件信号，以补偿位姿误差。为了支持长序列，我们提出了一种混合KV缓存压缩策略，将早期层截断与块级选择性保留相结合，从而将100多帧的KV缓存大小减少超过90%。ReCoSplat在不同输入设置下，在分布内和分布外基准测试上都实现了最先进的性能。代码和预训练模型将会发布。我们的项目页面位于https://freemancheng.com/ReCoSplat 。

TLDR: ReCoSplat introduces a novel Gaussian Splatting method for online novel view synthesis that addresses pose estimation errors and long sequence processing using a Render-and-Compare module and a hybrid KV cache compression strategy, achieving state-of-the-art results.

简要说明: ReCoSplat提出了一种新颖的Gaussian Splatting方法，用于在线新视角合成，解决姿态估计误差和长序列处理问题，采用Render-and-Compare模块和混合 KV 缓存压缩策略，实现了最先进的结果。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)

Authors: Freeman Cheng, Botao Ye, Xueting Li, Junqi You, Fangneng Zhan, Ming-Hsuan Yang

FetalAgents: A Multi-Agent System for Fetal Ultrasound Image and Video Analysis

Abstract (English): Fetal ultrasound (US) is the primary imaging modality for prenatal screening, yet its interpretation relies heavily on the expertise of the clinician. Despite advances in deep learning and foundation models, existing automated tools for fetal US analysis struggle to balance task-specific accuracy with the whole-process versatility required to support end-to-end clinical workflows. To address these limitations, we propose FetalAgents, the first multi-agent system for comprehensive fetal US analysis. Through a lightweight, agentic coordination framework, FetalAgents dynamically orchestrates specialized vision experts to maximize performance across diagnosis, measurement, and segmentation. Furthermore, FetalAgents advances beyond static image analysis by supporting end-to-end video stream summarization, where keyframes are automatically identified across multiple anatomical planes, analyzed by coordinated experts, and synthesized with patient metadata into a structured clinical report. Extensive multi-center external evaluations across eight clinical tasks demonstrate that FetalAgents consistently delivers the most robust and accurate performance when compared against specialized models and multimodal large language models (MLLMs), ultimately providing an auditable, workflow-aligned solution for fetal ultrasound analysis and reporting.

摘要（中文）: 胎儿超声（US）是产前筛查的主要影像学方式，但其解读很大程度上依赖于临床医生的专业知识。尽管深度学习和基础模型取得了进展，但现有的胎儿超声分析自动化工具难以在任务特定准确性和支持端到端临床工作流程所需的整个流程的通用性之间取得平衡。为了解决这些局限性，我们提出了FetalAgents，这是第一个用于全面胎儿超声分析的多智能体系统。通过轻量级的智能体协调框架，FetalAgents动态地协调专门的视觉专家，以最大限度地提高诊断、测量和分割的性能。此外，FetalAgents超越了静态图像分析，支持端到端视频流摘要，其中关键帧在多个解剖平面上被自动识别，并由协调的专家进行分析，并与患者元数据合成到结构化的临床报告中。在八个临床任务中进行的多中心外部评估表明，与专门模型和多模态大型语言模型（MLLMs）相比，FetalAgents始终提供最稳健和准确的性能，最终为胎儿超声分析和报告提供了一个可审计、与工作流程对齐的解决方案。

TLDR: The paper introduces FetalAgents, a multi-agent system for fetal ultrasound image and video analysis, which dynamically orchestrates specialized vision experts to improve accuracy and versatility in clinical workflows, outperforming existing models.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了FetalAgents，一个用于胎儿超声图像和视频分析的多智能体系统。该系统动态地协调专业的视觉专家，以提高临床工作流程中的准确性和通用性，并优于现有模型。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (6/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Xiaotian Hu, Junwei Huang, Mingxuan Liu, Kasidit Anmahapong, Yifei Chen, Yitong Luo, Yiming Huang, Xuguang Bai, Zihan Li, Yi Liao, Haibo Qu, Qiyuan Tian

DiffWind: Physics-Informed Differentiable Modeling of Wind-Driven Object Dynamics

Abstract (English): Modeling wind-driven object dynamics from video observations is highly challenging due to the invisibility and spatio-temporal variability of wind, as well as the complex deformations of objects. We present DiffWind, a physics-informed differentiable framework that unifies wind-object interaction modeling, video-based reconstruction, and forward simulation. Specifically, we represent wind as a grid-based physical field and objects as particle systems derived from 3D Gaussian Splatting, with their interaction modeled by the Material Point Method (MPM). To recover wind-driven object dynamics, we introduce a reconstruction framework that jointly optimizes the spatio-temporal wind force field and object motion through differentiable rendering and simulation. To ensure physical validity, we incorporate the Lattice Boltzmann Method (LBM) as a physics-informed constraint, enforcing compliance with fluid dynamics laws. Beyond reconstruction, our method naturally supports forward simulation under novel wind conditions and enables new applications such as wind retargeting. We further introduce WD-Objects, a dataset of synthetic and real-world wind-driven scenes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms prior dynamic scene modeling approaches in both reconstruction accuracy and simulation fidelity, opening a new avenue for video-based wind-object interaction modeling.

摘要（中文）: 由于风的不可见性、时空变异性以及物体的复杂形变，从视频观测中建模风驱动物体动力学极具挑战性。我们提出DiffWind，一个物理信息可微框架，它统一了风-物体交互建模、基于视频的重建和前向模拟。具体而言，我们用基于网格的物理场表示风，并使用源自3D高斯溅射的粒子系统表示物体，并通过物质点方法（MPM）建模它们的相互作用。为了恢复风驱动的物体动力学，我们引入了一个重建框架，通过可微渲染和模拟联合优化时空风力场和物体运动。为了确保物理有效性，我们将格子玻尔兹曼方法（LBM）作为物理信息约束加入，强制符合流体动力学定律。除了重建，我们的方法自然地支持在新风况下的前向模拟，并支持诸如风重定向等新应用。我们进一步引入WD-Objects，一个包含合成和真实世界风驱动场景的数据集。大量实验表明，我们的方法在重建精度和模拟保真度方面均显著优于先前的动态场景建模方法，为基于视频的风-物体交互建模开辟了一条新途径。

TLDR: DiffWind introduces a physics-informed differentiable framework for modeling wind-driven object dynamics from video, enabling reconstruction and forward simulation with novel applications like wind retargeting.

简要说明: DiffWind 提出了一种基于物理信息的微分框架，用于从视频中建模风驱动物体的动力学，从而实现重建和前向模拟，并具有风向重定向等新应用。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (6/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Yuanhang Lei, Boming Zhao, Zesong Yang, Xingxuan Li, Tao Cheng, Haocheng Peng, Ru Zhang, Yang Yang, Siyuan Huang, Yujun Shen, Ruizhen Hu, Hujun Bao, Zhaopeng Cui

EventVGGT: Exploring Cross-Modal Distillation for Consistent Event-based Depth Estimation

Abstract (English): Event cameras offer superior sensitivity to high-speed motion and extreme lighting, making event-based monocular depth estimation a promising approach for robust 3D perception in challenging conditions. However, progress is severely hindered by the scarcity of dense depth annotations. While recent annotation-free approaches mitigate this by distilling knowledge from Vision Foundation Models (VFMs), a critical limitation persists: they process event streams as independent frames. By neglecting the inherent temporal continuity of event data, these methods fail to leverage the rich temporal priors encoded in VFMs, ultimately yielding temporally inconsistent and less accurate depth predictions. To address this, we introduce EventVGGT, a novel framework that explicitly models the event stream as a coherent video sequence. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to distill spatio-temporal and multi-view geometric priors from the Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer (VGGT) into the event domain. We achieve this via a comprehensive tri-level distillation strategy: (i) Cross-Modal Feature Mixture (CMFM) bridges the modality gap at the output level by fusing RGB and event features to generate auxiliary depth predictions; (ii) Spatio-Temporal Feature Distillation (STFD) distills VGGT's powerful spatio-temporal representations at the feature level; and (iii) Temporal Consistency Distillation (TCD) enforces cross-frame coherence at the temporal level by aligning inter-frame depth changes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EventVGGT consistently outperforms existing methods -- reducing the absolute mean depth error at 30m by over 53\% on EventScape (from 2.30 to 1.06) -- while exhibiting robust zero-shot generalization on the unseen DENSE and MVSEC datasets.

摘要（中文）: 事件相机对高速运动和极端光照具有卓越的灵敏度，使得基于事件的单目深度估计成为在具有挑战性的条件下实现鲁棒3D感知的一种很有前景的方法。然而，稠密深度标注的稀缺严重阻碍了这一进展。虽然最近的无标注方法通过从视觉基础模型（VFMs）中提取知识来缓解这个问题，但仍然存在一个关键限制：它们将事件流处理为独立的帧。由于忽略了事件数据固有的时间连续性，这些方法未能利用VFMs中编码的丰富时间先验，最终产生了时间上不一致且精度较低的深度预测。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了EventVGGT，这是一个新颖的框架，它将事件流显式地建模为一个连贯的视频序列。据我们所知，我们是第一个将视觉几何接地元转换器（VGGT）的时空和多视角几何先验提取到事件域中的。我们通过一个全面的三级蒸馏策略来实现这一点：（i）跨模态特征混合（CMFM）通过融合RGB和事件特征来生成辅助深度预测，从而在输出层弥合模态差距；（ii）时空特征蒸馏（STFD）在特征层蒸馏VGGT强大的时空表示；（iii）时间一致性蒸馏（TCD）通过对齐帧间深度变化，在时间层强制执行跨帧一致性。大量的实验表明，EventVGGT始终优于现有方法——在EventScape上将30米处的绝对平均深度误差降低了53\%以上（从2.30降至1.06）——同时在未见过的DENSE和MVSEC数据集上表现出强大的零样本泛化能力。

TLDR: EventVGGT introduces a novel framework for event-based monocular depth estimation that leverages cross-modal distillation from a Vision Foundation Model and explicitly models the temporal continuity of event streams, achieving significant performance improvements and zero-shot generalization.

简要说明: EventVGGT 提出了一种新颖的基于事件的单目深度估计框架，该框架利用视觉基础模型的跨模态蒸馏并显式地对事件流的时间连续性进行建模，从而显着提高了性能和零样本泛化能力。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)

Authors: Yinrui Ren, Jinjing Zhu, Kanghao Chen, Zhuoxiao Li, Jing Ou, Zidong Cao, Tongyan Hua, Peilun Shi, Yingchun Fu, Wufan Zhao, Hui Xiong

Exploring Modality-Aware Fusion and Decoupled Temporal Propagation for Multi-Modal Object Tracking

Abstract (English): Most existing multimodal trackers adopt uniform fusion strategies, overlooking the inherent differences between modalities. Moreover, they propagate temporal information through mixed tokens, leading to entangled and less discriminative temporal representations. To address these limitations, we propose MDTrack, a novel framework for modality aware fusion and decoupled temporal propagation in multimodal object tracking. Specifically, for modality aware fusion, we allocate dedicated experts to each modality, including infrared, event, depth, and RGB, to process their respective representations. The gating mechanism within the Mixture of Experts dynamically selects the optimal experts based on the input features, enabling adaptive and modality specific fusion. For decoupled temporal propagation, we introduce two separate State Space Model structures to independently store and update the hidden states of the RGB and X modal streams, effectively capturing their distinct temporal information. To ensure synergy between the two temporal representations, we incorporate a set of cross attention modules between the input features of the two SSMs, facilitating implicit information exchange. The resulting temporally enriched features are then integrated into the backbone through another set of cross attention modules, enhancing MDTrack's ability to leverage temporal information. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method. Both MDTrack S and MDTrack U achieve state of the art performance across five multimodal tracking benchmarks.

摘要（中文）: 大多数现有的多模态跟踪器采用统一的融合策略，忽略了模态之间的内在差异。此外，它们通过混合令牌传播时间信息，导致时间表示纠缠不清且区分度较低。为了解决这些局限性，我们提出MDTrack，一种用于多模态对象跟踪中模态感知融合和解耦时间传播的新型框架。具体来说，对于模态感知融合，我们为每种模态（包括红外、事件、深度和RGB）分配专门的专家，以处理它们各自的表示。专家混合模型中的门控机制根据输入特征动态选择最佳专家，从而实现自适应和模态特定的融合。对于解耦时间传播，我们引入了两个独立的State Space Model（SSM）结构，分别存储和更新RGB和X模态流的隐藏状态，从而有效地捕获它们不同的时间信息。为了确保两个时间表示之间的协同作用，我们在两个SSM的输入特征之间加入一组交叉注意力模块，促进隐式信息交换。然后，通过另一组交叉注意力模块将最终的时间增强特征集成到主干网络中，从而增强MDTrack利用时间信息的能力。大量实验证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。MDTrack S和MDTrack U均在五个多模态跟踪基准测试中取得了最先进的性能。

TLDR: The paper introduces MDTrack, a novel multimodal object tracker that uses modality-aware fusion with Mixture of Experts and decoupled temporal propagation with separate State Space Models for RGB and other modalities, achieving state-of-the-art results on multiple benchmarks.

简要说明: 这篇论文介绍了MDTrack，一种新颖的多模态目标跟踪器，它使用具有专家混合体的模态感知融合，以及具有用于RGB和其他模态的独立状态空间模型的解耦时间传播，在多个基准测试中实现了最先进的结果。

Novelty: (8/10)

Authors: Shilei Wang, Pujian Lai, Dong Gao, Jifeng Ning, Gong Cheng

HelixTrack: Event-Based Tracking and RPM Estimation of Propeller-like Objects

Abstract (English): Safety-critical perception for unmanned aerial vehicles and rotating machinery requires microsecond-latency tracking of fast, periodic motion under egomotion and strong distractors. Frame-based and event-based trackers drift or break on propellers because periodic signatures violate their smooth-motion assumptions. We tackle this gap with HelixTrack, a fully event-driven method that jointly tracks propeller-like objects and estimates their rotations per minute (RPM). Incoming events are back-warped from the image plane into the rotor plane via a homography estimated on the fly. A Kalman Filter maintains instantaneous estimates of phase. Batched iterative updates refine the object pose by coupling phase residuals to geometry. To our knowledge, no public dataset targets joint tracking and RPM estimation of propeller-like objects. We therefore introduce the Timestamped Quadcopter with Egomotion (TQE) dataset with 13 high-resolution event sequences, containing 52 rotating objects in total, captured at distances of 2 m / 4 m, with increasing egomotion and microsecond RPM ground truth. On TQE, HelixTrack processes full-rate events (approx. 11.8x real time) faster than real time and microsecond latency. It consistently outperforms per-event and aggregation-based baselines adapted for RPM estimation.

摘要（中文）: 无人飞行器和旋转机械的安全攸关感知需要以微秒级延迟追踪在自运动和强干扰下的快速、周期性运动。基于帧和基于事件的追踪器在螺旋桨上容易漂移或失效，因为周期性特征违反了它们的平滑运动假设。 我们提出了HelixTrack来解决这个缺口，这是一个完全由事件驱动的方法，可以联合追踪类螺旋桨物体并估计它们的转速（RPM）。传入的事件通过实时估计的单应性变换从图像平面反向扭曲到旋翼平面。卡尔曼滤波器维护相位的瞬时估计。批处理迭代更新通过将相位残差耦合到几何结构来优化物体位姿。据我们所知，目前没有公开的数据集针对类螺旋桨物体的联合追踪和RPM估计。 因此，我们引入了带有自运动的时间戳四轴飞行器（TQE）数据集，该数据集包含13个高分辨率事件序列，总共包含52个旋转物体，在2米/4米的距离处捕获，具有不断增加的自运动和微秒级RPM真值。在TQE上，HelixTrack可以实时（约11.8倍于实时）且微秒级延迟地处理全速率事件，并且始终优于为RPM估计而改编的基于每个事件和基于聚合的基线方法。

TLDR: The paper introduces HelixTrack, a novel event-driven method for jointly tracking propeller-like objects and estimating their RPM, along with a new dataset (TQE) for this task. It addresses limitations of existing trackers under fast, periodic motion.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一种新的事件驱动方法 HelixTrack，用于联合跟踪螺旋桨状物体并估计其 RPM，同时还发布了一个新的数据集 (TQE)。 它解决了现有跟踪器在快速周期性运动下的局限性。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (9/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)

Authors: Radim Spetlik, Michal Pliska, Vojtěch Vrba, Jiri Matas

RTFDNet: Fusion-Decoupling for Robust RGB-T Segmentation

Abstract (English): RGB-Thermal (RGB-T) semantic segmentation is essential for robotic systems operating in low-light or dark environments. However, traditional approaches often overemphasize modality balance, resulting in limited robustness and severe performance degradation when sensor signals are partially missing. Recent advances such as cross-modal knowledge distillation and modality-adaptive fine-tuning attempt to enhance cross-modal interaction, but they typically decouple modality fusion and modality adaptation, requiring multi-stage training with frozen models or teacher-student frameworks. We present RTFDNet, a three-branch encoder-decoder that unifies fusion and decoupling for robust RGB-T segmentation. Synergistic Feature Fusion (SFF) performs channel-wise gated exchange and lightweight spatial attention to inject complementary cues. Cross-Modal Decouple Regularization (CMDR) isolates modality-specific components from the fused representation and supervises unimodal decoders via stop-gradient targets. Region Decouple Regularization (RDR) enforces class-selective prediction consistency in confident regions while blocking gradients to the fusion branch. This feedback loop strengthens unimodal paths without degrading the fused stream, enabling efficient standalone inference at test time. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of RTFDNet, showing consistent performance across varying modality conditions. Our implementation will be released to facilitate further research. Our source code are publicly available at https://github.com/curapima/RTFDNet.

摘要（中文）: RGB-热成像(RGB-T)语义分割对于在弱光或黑暗环境中运行的机器人系统至关重要。然而，传统方法通常过度强调模态平衡，导致鲁棒性有限，并在传感器信号部分缺失时性能严重下降。最近，诸如跨模态知识蒸馏和模态自适应微调等技术试图增强跨模态交互，但它们通常将模态融合和模态适应解耦，需要使用冻结模型或师生框架进行多阶段训练。我们提出了RTFDNet，一个用于稳健RGB-T分割的三分支编码器-解码器，它统一了融合和解耦。协同特征融合(SFF)执行通道式门控交换和轻量级空间注意力，以注入互补线索。跨模态解耦正则化(CMDR)将模态特定成分从融合表示中隔离出来，并通过停止梯度目标监督单模态解码器。区域解耦正则化(RDR)在置信区域内强制执行类选择性预测一致性，同时阻断梯度流向融合分支。这种反馈循环加强了单模态路径，而不会降低融合流的性能，从而在测试时实现高效的独立推断。大量实验证明了RTFDNet的有效性，并在不同的模态条件下显示出一致的性能。我们的实现将被发布，以促进进一步的研究。我们的源代码已在https://github.com/curapima/RTFDNet上公开提供。

TLDR: The paper presents RTFDNet, a novel RGB-T semantic segmentation network with fusion-decoupling mechanisms, enabling robust performance under varying modality conditions and efficient standalone inference.

简要说明: 该论文提出了 RTFDNet，一种新型的 RGB-T 语义分割网络，具有融合-解耦机制，能够在不同的模态条件下实现鲁棒的性能，并进行高效的独立推理。

Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)

Authors: Kunyu Tan, Mingjian Liang

Information Theoretic Bayesian Optimization over the Probability Simplex

Abstract (English): Bayesian optimization is a data-efficient technique that has been shown to be extremely powerful to optimize expensive, black-box, and possibly noisy objective functions. Many applications involve optimizing probabilities and mixtures which naturally belong to the probability simplex, a constrained non-Euclidean domain defined by non-negative entries summing to one. This paper introduces $α$-GaBO, a novel family of Bayesian optimization algorithms over the probability simplex. Our approach is grounded in information geometry, a branch of Riemannian geometry which endows the simplex with a Riemannian metric and a class of connections. Based on information geometry theory, we construct Matérn kernels that reflect the geometry of the probability simplex, as well as a one-parameter family of geometric optimizers for the acquisition function. We validate our method on benchmark functions and on a variety of real-world applications including mixtures of components, mixtures of classifiers, and a robotic control task, showing its increased performance compared to constrained Euclidean approaches.

摘要（中文）: 贝叶斯优化是一种数据高效的技术，已被证明在优化昂贵、黑盒且可能存在噪声的目标函数方面非常强大。许多应用涉及优化概率和混合，它们自然属于概率单纯形，这是一个由非负项之和为一所定义的约束非欧几里得域。本文介绍了一种新的贝叶斯优化算法族$α$-GaBO，用于在概率单纯形上进行优化。我们的方法基于信息几何，它是黎曼几何的一个分支，赋予单纯形以黎曼度量和一类联络。基于信息几何理论，我们构建了反映概率单纯形几何结构的Matérn核，以及用于采集函数的一个单参数几何优化器族。我们在benchmark函数和各种真实世界应用中验证了我们的方法，包括成分混合、分类器混合和一个机器人控制任务，结果表明与约束欧几里得方法相比，我们的方法性能有所提升。

TLDR: The paper introduces α-GaBO, a novel Bayesian optimization algorithm for optimizing functions over the probability simplex, using information geometry to construct kernels and optimizers that respect the simplex's geometry; it demonstrates improved performance in several real-world applications.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一种新的贝叶斯优化算法α-GaBO，用于优化概率单纯形上的函数。该算法利用信息几何构建核函数和优化器，从而更好地适应单纯形的几何特性，并在多个实际应用中展示了其性能提升。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Federico Pavesi, Antonio Candelieri, Noémie Jaquier

Stochastic Port-Hamiltonian Neural Networks: Universal Approximation with Passivity Guarantees

Abstract (English): Stochastic port-Hamiltonian systems represent open dynamical systems with dissipation, inputs, and stochastic forcing in an energy based form. We introduce stochastic port-Hamiltonian neural networks, SPH-NNs, which parameterize the Hamiltonian with a feedforward network and enforce skew symmetry of the interconnection matrix and positive semidefiniteness of the dissipation matrix. For Itô dynamics we establish a weak passivity inequality in expectation under an explicit generator condition, stated for a stopped process on a compact set. We also prove a universal approximation result showing that, on any compact set and finite horizon, SPH-NNs approximate the coefficients of a target stochastic port-Hamiltonian system with $C^2$ accuracy of the Hamiltonian and yield coupled solutions that remain close in mean square up to the exit time. Experiments on noisy mass spring, Duffing, and Van der Pol oscillators show improved long horizon rollouts and reduced energy error relative to a multilayer perceptron baseline.

摘要（中文）: 随机端口哈密顿系统以基于能量的形式表达了具有耗散、输入和随机驱动的开放动力系统。我们引入了随机端口哈密顿神经网络，SPH-NNs，其利用前馈网络参数化哈密顿函数，并强制互联矩阵的斜对称性和耗散矩阵的半正定性。对于Itô动力学，我们在显式生成器条件下，为紧集上的停时过程建立了一个期望意义下的弱无源不等式。我们还证明了一个通用逼近结果，表明在任何紧集和有限时间范围内，SPH-NNs能够以哈密顿函数的$C^2$精度逼近目标随机端口哈密顿系统的系数，并产生耦合解，使其在均方意义上保持接近，直到出口时间。在噪声质量弹簧、Duffing和Van der Pol振荡器上的实验表明，相对于多层感知器基线，SPH-NNs具有改进的长时程滚动预测和减少的能量误差。

TLDR: The paper introduces stochastic port-Hamiltonian neural networks (SPH-NNs) that learn stochastic port-Hamiltonian systems with passivity guarantees and provides universal approximation results, demonstrating improved performance on noisy oscillators. This could potentially be useful for building robust and energy-aware models for dynamics prediction.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了随机port-Hamiltonian神经网络(SPH-NNs)，它学习具有被动性保证的随机port-Hamiltonian系统，并提供了通用逼近结果，在噪声振荡器上表现出改进的性能。 这可能有助于构建用于动力学预测的稳健且节能的模型。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (8/10)

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Luca Di Persio, Matthias Ehrhardt, Youness Outaleb

Robust Cooperative Localization in Featureless Environments: A Comparative Study of DCL, StCL, CCL, CI, and Standard-CL

Abstract (English): Cooperative localization (CL) enables accurate position estimation in multi-robot systems operating in GPS-denied environments. This paper presents a comparative study of five CL approaches: Centralized Cooperative Localization (CCL), Decentralized Cooperative Localization (DCL), Sequential Cooperative Localization (StCL), Covariance Intersection (CI), and Standard Cooperative Localization (Standard-CL). All methods are implemented in ROS and evaluated through Monte Carlo simulations under two conditions: weak data association and robust detection. Our analysis reveals fundamental trade-offs among the methods. StCL and Standard-CL achieve the lowest position errors but exhibit severe filter inconsistency, making them unsuitable for safety-critical applications. DCL demonstrates remarkable stability under challenging conditions due to its measurement stride mechanism, which provides implicit regularization against outliers. CI emerges as the most balanced approach, achieving near-optimal consistency while maintaining competitive accuracy. CCL provides theoretically optimal estimation but shows sensitivity to measurement outliers. These findings offer practical guidance for selecting CL algorithms based on application requirements.

摘要（中文）: 协作定位（CL）使得在GPS拒止环境中运行的多机器人系统能够实现精确的位置估计。 本文对五种协作定位方法进行了比较研究：集中式协作定位（CCL）、分散式协作定位（DCL）、序列式协作定位（StCL）、协方差交叉（CI）和标准协作定位（Standard-CL）。 所有方法均在ROS中实现，并通过蒙特卡洛模拟在两种条件下进行评估：弱数据关联和稳健检测。 我们的分析揭示了这些方法之间的根本权衡。 StCL和Standard-CL实现了最低的位置误差，但表现出严重的滤波器不一致性，使其不适用于安全关键应用。 DCL由于其测量步幅机制 (为异常值提供隐式正则化)，在具有挑战性的条件下表现出卓越的稳定性。 CI成为最平衡的方法，在保持竞争性能的同时，实现了接近最佳的均方误差一致性。 CCL提供了理论上的最佳估计，但对测量异常值表现出敏感性。 这些发现为基于应用需求选择CL算法提供了实用指导。

TLDR: This paper comparatively analyzes five Cooperative Localization (CL) approaches in GPS-denied environments using ROS and Monte Carlo simulations, highlighting trade-offs between accuracy, consistency, and robustness to outliers for different application requirements.

简要说明: 本文通过ROS和蒙特卡洛模拟，比较分析了五种在无GPS环境下使用的协同定位 (CL) 方法，重点介绍了不同应用需求下，这些方法在精度、一致性和抗异常值能力之间的权衡。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (5/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)
Overall: (5/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Nivand Khosravi, Rodrigo Ventura, Meysam Basiri

DRIFT: Dual-Representation Inter-Fusion Transformer for Automated Driving Perception with 4D Radar Point Clouds

Abstract (English): 4D radars, which provide 3D point cloud data along with Doppler velocity, are attractive components of modern automated driving systems due to their low cost and robustness under adverse weather conditions. However, they provide a significantly lower point cloud density than LiDAR sensors. This makes it important to exploit not only local but also global contextual scene information. This paper proposes DRIFT, a model that effectively captures and fuses both local and global contexts through a dual-path architecture. The model incorporates a point path to aggregate fine-grained local features and a pillar path to encode coarse-grained global features. These two parallel paths are intertwined via novel feature-sharing layers at multiple stages, enabling full utilization of both representations. DRIFT is evaluated on the widely used View-of-Delft (VoD) dataset and a proprietary internal dataset. It outperforms the baselines on the tasks of object detection and/or free road estimation. For example, DRIFT achieves a mean average precision (mAP) of 52.6\% (compared to, say, 45.4\% of CenterPoint) on the VoD dataset.

摘要（中文）: 提供包含多普勒速度的3D点云数据的4D雷达，由于其低成本和在恶劣天气条件下的鲁棒性，已成为现代自动驾驶系统颇具吸引力的组件。然而，与激光雷达传感器相比，它们提供的点云密度显著较低。因此，利用局部和全局上下文场景信息至关重要。本文提出了一种名为DRIFT的模型，该模型通过双路径架构有效地捕获并融合局部和全局上下文。该模型包含一个点路径，用于聚合细粒度的局部特征，以及一个柱路径，用于编码粗粒度的全局特征。这两个并行路径通过新型的特征共享层在多个阶段相互交织，从而能够充分利用两种表示。DRIFT在广泛使用的View-of-Delft (VoD)数据集和专有的内部数据集上进行了评估。在目标检测和/或自由道路估计任务中，它优于基线模型。例如，在VoD数据集上，DRIFT实现了52.6%的平均精度均值(mAP)，而CenterPoint的mAP为45.4%。

TLDR: The paper introduces DRIFT, a dual-path transformer network using point and pillar representations to improve 4D radar point cloud perception for automated driving, achieving state-of-the-art results on object detection and free road estimation.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了DRIFT，一个双路径Transformer网络，它使用点和柱状表示来改进用于自动驾驶的4D雷达点云感知，在目标检测和自由道路估计方面取得了最先进的结果。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)

Authors: Siqi Pei, Andras Palffy, Dariu M. Gavrila

OTPL-VIO: Robust Visual-Inertial Odometry with Optimal Transport Line Association and Adaptive Uncertainty

Abstract (English): Robust stereo visual-inertial odometry (VIO) remains challenging in low-texture scenes and under abrupt illumination changes, where point features become sparse and unstable, leading to ambiguous association and under-constrained estimation. Line structures offer complementary geometric cues, yet many efficient point-line systems still rely on point-guided line association, which can break down when point support is weak and may lead to biased constraints. We present a stereo point-line VIO system in which line segments are equipped with dedicated deep descriptors and matched using an entropy-regularized optimal transport formulation, enabling globally consistent correspondences under ambiguity, outliers, and partial observations. The proposed descriptor is training-free and is computed by sampling and pooling network feature maps. To improve estimation stability, we analyze the impact of line measurement noise and introduce reliability-adaptive weighting to regulate the influence of line constraints during optimization. Experiments on EuRoC and UMA-VI, together with real-world deployments in low-texture and illumination-challenging environments, demonstrate improved accuracy and robustness over representative baselines while maintaining real-time performance.

摘要（中文）: 在低纹理场景和突发光照变化下，鲁棒的立体视觉惯性里程计（VIO）仍然面临挑战，此时点特征变得稀疏且不稳定，导致模糊的关联和欠约束估计。线结构提供了互补的几何线索，但许多高效的点线系统仍然依赖于点引导的线关联，这会在点支撑薄弱时失效，并可能导致有偏的约束。我们提出了一种立体点线VIO系统，其中线段配备了专门的深度描述符，并使用熵正则化的最优传输公式进行匹配，从而能够在模糊、离群值和部分观测下实现全局一致的对应关系。所提出的描述符是免训练的，通过采样和池化网络特征图计算得出。为了提高估计稳定性，我们分析了线测量噪声的影响，并引入了可靠性自适应加权来调节优化过程中线约束的影响。在EuRoC和UMA-VI数据集上的实验，以及在低纹理和光照挑战环境中的实际部署，表明与代表性基线相比，我们的系统在保持实时性能的同时，提高了精度和鲁棒性。

TLDR: This paper introduces a robust stereo visual-inertial odometry (VIO) system that uses optimal transport for line association and adaptive uncertainty weighting to improve accuracy and robustness in challenging environments, especially where point features are unreliable.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一种鲁棒的立体视觉惯性里程计（VIO）系统，该系统使用最优传输进行线关联和自适应不确定性加权，以提高在具有挑战性环境中的准确性和鲁棒性，尤其是在点特征不可靠的情况下。

Authors: Zikun Chen, Wentao Zhao, Yihe Niu, Tianchen Deng, Jingchuan Wang

Towards Terrain-Aware Safe Locomotion for Quadrupedal Robots Using Proprioceptive Sensing

Abstract (English): Achieving safe quadrupedal locomotion in real-world environments has attracted much attention in recent years. When walking over uneven terrain, achieving reliable estimation and realising safety-critical control based on the obtained information is still an open question. To address this challenge, especially for low-cost robots equipped solely with proprioceptive sensors (e.g., IMUs, joint encoders, and contact force sensors), this work first presents an estimation framework that generates a 2.5-D terrain map and extracts support plane parameters, which are then integrated into contact and state estimation. Then, we integrate this estimation framework into a safety-critical control pipeline by formulating control barrier functions that provide rigorous safety guarantees. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed terrain estimation method provides smooth terrain representations. Moreover, the coupled estimation framework of terrain, state, and contact reduces the mean absolute error of base position estimation by 64.8%, decreases the estimation variance by 47.2%, and improves the robustness of contact estimation compared to a decoupled framework. The terrain-informed CBFs integrate historical terrain information and current proprioceptive measurements to ensure global safety by keeping the robot out of hazardous areas and local safety by preventing body-terrain collision, relying solely on proprioceptive sensing.

摘要（中文）: 近年来，在真实环境中实现安全的四足运动引起了广泛关注。 当在不平坦地形上行走时，实现可靠的估计以及基于所获得信息实现安全关键控制仍然是一个开放性问题。 为了应对这一挑战，特别是对于仅配备本体感受传感器（例如，IMU、关节编码器和接触力传感器）的低成本机器人，本工作首先提出了一种估计框架，该框架生成 2.5 维地形图并提取支撑平面参数，然后将其集成到接触和状态估计中。 其次，我们将此估计框架集成到安全关键控制流程中，通过制定控制屏障函数来提供严格的安全保证。 实验表明，所提出的地形估计方法提供了平滑的地形表示。 此外，地形、状态和接触的耦合估计框架将基座位置估计的平均绝对误差降低了 64.8%，将估计方差降低了 47.2%，并且与解耦框架相比，提高了接触估计的鲁棒性。 知悉地形的控制屏障函数集成了历史地形信息和当前的本体感受测量值，仅依靠本体感受，通过使机器人远离危险区域来确保全局安全，并通过防止身体与地形碰撞来确保局部安全。

TLDR: This paper presents a terrain-aware estimation and control framework for quadrupedal robots using only proprioceptive sensors, integrating a 2.5D terrain map into a safety-critical control pipeline using control barrier functions to improve estimation accuracy and ensure safety.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种仅使用本体感受传感器的四足机器人的地形感知估计和控制框架，将2.5D地形图集成到使用控制屏障函数的安全关键控制管道中，以提高估计精度并确保安全。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)

Authors: Peiyu Yang, Jiatao Ding, Wei Pan, Claudio Semini, Cosimo Della Santina

Trajectory Optimization for Self-Wrap-Aware Cable-Towed Planar Object Manipulation under Implicit Tension Constraints

Abstract (English): Cable/rope elements are pervasive in deformable-object manipulation, often serving as a deformable force-transmission medium whose routing and contact determine how wrenches are delivered. In cable-towed manipulation, transmission is unilateral and hybrid: the tether can pull only when taut and becomes force-free when slack; in practice, the tether may also contact the object boundary and self-wrap around edges, which is not merely collision avoidance but a change of the wrench transmission channel by shifting the effective application point and moment arm, thereby coupling routing geometry with rigid-body motion and tensioning. We formulate self-wrap towing as a routing-aware, tensioning-implicit trajectory optimization (TITO) problem that couples (i) a tensioning-implicit taut/slack constraint and (ii) routing-conditioned transmission maps for effective length and wrench, and we build a relaxation hierarchy from a strict mode-conditioned reference to three tractable relaxations: Full-Mode Relaxation (FMR), Binary-Mode Relaxation (BMR), and Implicit-Mode Relaxation (IMR). Across planar towing tasks, we find that making routing an explicit decision often yields conservative solutions that stay near switching boundaries, whereas IMR induces self-wrap through state evolution and exploits the redirected torque channel whenever turning requires it.

摘要（中文）: 缆索/绳索单元在可变形物体的操作中普遍存在，通常作为一种可变形的力传输介质，其路径和接触决定了力如何传递。在缆绳拖曳操作中，传输是单向且混合的：系绳只能在绷紧时拉动，松弛时则无力；在实践中，系绳也可能接触物体边界并自缠绕边缘，这不仅仅是避障，而且是通过改变有效作用点和力臂来改变力传递通道，从而将路径几何与刚体运动和张紧耦合起来。我们将自缠绕拖曳表述为一个路径感知、张紧隐式的轨迹优化（TITO）问题，该问题耦合了（i）一个张紧隐式的绷紧/松弛约束和（ii）路径条件化的有效长度和力的传输图，并从一个严格的模式条件参考构建了一个可追踪松弛等级：全模式松弛（FMR）、二元模式松弛（BMR）和隐式模式松弛（IMR）。在平面拖曳任务中，我们发现将路径作为一个显式决策通常会产生保守的解决方案，这些解决方案停留在切换边界附近，而IMR通过状态演化诱导自缠绕，并在转弯需要时利用重定向的扭矩通道。

TLDR: This paper presents a trajectory optimization framework for manipulating planar objects with cable-towing, explicitly considering self-wrapping of the cable and its impact on wrench transmission, using different relaxation methods to solve the tension-implicit problem.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种轨迹优化框架，用于通过缆索牵引操作平面物体，明确考虑了缆索的自缠绕及其对力矩传递的影响，并使用不同的松弛方法来解决张力隐式问题。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)
Overall: (5/10)

Authors: Yu Li, Amin Fakhari, Hamid Sadeghian

NLiPsCalib: An Efficient Calibration Framework for High-Fidelity 3D Reconstruction of Curved Visuotactile Sensors

Abstract (English): Recent advances in visuotactile sensors increasingly employ biomimetic curved surfaces to enhance sensorimotor capabilities. Although such curved visuotactile sensors enable more conformal object contact, their perceptual quality is often degraded by non-uniform illumination, which reduces reconstruction accuracy and typically necessitates calibration. Existing calibration methods commonly rely on customized indenters and specialized devices to collect large-scale photometric data, but these processes are expensive and labor-intensive. To overcome these calibration challenges, we present NLiPsCalib, a physics-consistent and efficient calibration framework for curved visuotactile sensors. NLiPsCalib integrates controllable near-field light sources and leverages Near-Light Photometric Stereo (NLiPs) to estimate contact geometry, simplifying calibration to just a few simple contacts with everyday objects. We further introduce NLiPsTac, a controllable-light-source tactile sensor developed to validate our framework. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach enables high-fidelity 3D reconstruction across diverse curved form factors with a simple calibration procedure. We emphasize that our approach lowers the barrier to developing customized visuotactile sensors of diverse geometries, thereby making visuotactile sensing more accessible to the broader community.

摘要（中文）: 近年来，在视觉触觉传感器中，采用仿生曲面来增强感知运动能力已变得越来越普遍。虽然这种曲面视觉触觉传感器能够实现更贴合物体的接触，但它们的感知质量常常会因不均匀照明而降低，从而降低重建精度，并且通常需要进行校准。现有的校准方法通常依赖于定制压头和专用设备来收集大规模的光度数据，但这些过程既昂贵又费力。为了克服这些校准挑战，我们提出了一种物理一致且高效的曲面视觉触觉传感器校准框架NLiPsCalib。NLiPsCalib集成了可控的近场光源，并利用近光光度立体法(NLiPs)来估计接触几何形状，从而将校准简化为仅需要与日常物体的几个简单接触。 我们进一步介绍了NLiPsTac，一种为验证我们的框架而开发的可控光源触觉传感器。实验结果表明，我们的方法能够通过一个简单的校准程序，在各种曲面外形尺寸上实现高保真 3D 重建。我们强调，我们的方法降低了开发各种几何形状的定制视觉触觉传感器的门槛，从而使视觉触觉传感对更广泛的社群更加容易获得。

TLDR: The paper introduces NLiPsCalib, a new efficient calibration framework for curved visuotactile sensors using controllable near-field light sources and Near-Light Photometric Stereo, simplifying the calibration process with everyday objects and improving 3D reconstruction accuracy.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一种名为NLiPsCalib的新型高效校准框架，用于曲面视觉触觉传感器，通过利用可控的近场光源和近光度立体视觉技术，简化了使用日常物体的校准过程，并提高了3D重建的准确性。

Novelty: (8/10)

Authors: Xuhao Qin, Feiyu Zhao, Yatao Leng, Runze Hu, Chenxi Xiao

High-Slip-Ratio Control for Peak Tire-Road Friction Estimation Using Automated Vehicles

Abstract (English): Accurate estimation of the tire-road friction coefficient (TRFC) is critical for ensuring safe vehicle control, especially under adverse road conditions. However, most existing methods rely on naturalistic driving data from regular vehicles, which typically operate under mild acceleration and braking. As a result, the data provide insufficient slip excitation and offer limited observability of the peak TRFC. This paper presents a high-slip-ratio control framework that enables automated vehicles (AVs) to actively excite the peak friction region during empty-haul operations while maintaining operational safety. A simplified Magic Formula tire model is adopted to represent nonlinear slip-force dynamics and is locally fitted using repeated high-slip measurements. To support safe execution in car-following scenarios, we formulate a constrained optimal control strategy that balances slip excitation, trajectory tracking, and collision avoidance. In parallel, a binning-based statistical projection method is introduced to robustly estimate peak TRFC under noise and local sparsity. The framework is validated through both closed-loop simulations and real-vehicle experiments, demonstrating its accuracy, safety, and feasibility for scalable, cost-effective roadway friction screening.

摘要（中文）: 轮胎-路面摩擦系数（TRFC）的准确估计对于确保车辆安全控制至关重要，尤其是在恶劣路况下。然而，大多数现有方法依赖于来自普通车辆的自然驾驶数据，这些车辆通常在轻微加速和制动下运行。因此，这些数据提供的滑移激励不足，并且对峰值TRFC的可观测性有限。本文提出了一种高滑移率控制框架，使自动驾驶汽车（AVs）能够在空载运行期间主动激发峰值摩擦区域，同时保持运行安全。采用简化的Magic Formula轮胎模型来表示非线性滑移-力动力学，并使用重复的高滑移测量值进行局部拟合。为了支持在跟车场景中的安全执行，我们制定了一种约束优化控制策略，以平衡滑移激励、轨迹跟踪和避撞。与此同时，引入了一种基于分箱的统计投影方法，以在噪声和局部稀疏性下稳健地估计峰值TRFC。通过闭环仿真和真实车辆实验验证了该框架，证明了其准确性、安全性以及可扩展、具有成本效益的路面摩擦筛选的可行性。

TLDR: This paper introduces a high-slip-ratio control framework for automated vehicles to estimate peak tire-road friction during empty-haul operations, using constrained optimal control and statistical projection. It's validated with simulations and real-world experiments.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一种高滑移率控制框架，用于自动驾驶车辆在空载作业期间估算峰值轮胎-路面摩擦系数，使用约束优化控制和统计投影。该方法通过仿真和实际实验进行了验证。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)

Authors: Zhaohui Liang, Hang Zhou, Heye Huanh, Xiaopeng Li

Beyond Amplitude: Channel State Information Phase-Aware Deep Fusion for Robotic Activity Recognition

Abstract (English): Wi-Fi Channel State Information (CSI) has emerged as a promising non-line-of-sight sensing modality for human and robotic activity recognition. However, prior work has predominantly relied on CSI amplitude while underutilizing phase information, particularly in robotic arm activity recognition. In this paper, we present GateFusion-Bidirectional Long Short-Term Memory network (GF-BiLSTM) for WiFi sensing in robotic activity recognition. GF-BiLSTM is a two-stream gated fusion network that encodes amplitude and phase separately and adaptively integrates per-time features through a learned gating mechanism. We systematically evaluate state-of-the-art deep learning models under a Leave-One-Velocity-Out (LOVO) protocol across four input configurations: amplitude only, phase only, amplitude + unwrapped phase, and amplitude + sanitized phase. Experimental results demonstrate that incorporating phase alongside amplitude consistently improves recognition accuracy and cross-speed robustness, with GF-BiLSTM achieving the best performance. To the best of our knowledge, this work provides the first systematic exploration of CSI phase for robotic activity recognition, establishing its critical role in Wi-Fi-based sensing.

摘要（中文）: Wi-Fi信道状态信息(CSI)已成为一种有前景的非视距传感方式，用于人类和机器人活动识别。然而，先前的工作主要依赖于CSI幅度，而未能充分利用相位信息，尤其是在机械臂活动识别中。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于机器人活动识别中Wi-Fi感知的GateFusion-双向长短期记忆网络(GF-BiLSTM)。GF-BiLSTM是一个双流门控融合网络，它分别编码幅度和相位，并通过学习到的门控机制自适应地集成每个时间步的特征。我们通过留一速度法(LOVO)协议，在四种输入配置下系统地评估了最先进的深度学习模型：仅幅度、仅相位、幅度+展开相位以及幅度+净化相位。实验结果表明，将相位与幅度结合使用能持续提高识别精度和跨速度鲁棒性，其中GF-BiLSTM表现出最佳性能。据我们所知，这项工作首次系统地探索了CSI相位在机器人活动识别中的作用，确立了其在基于Wi-Fi的感知中的关键作用。

TLDR: The paper introduces GF-BiLSTM, a novel deep learning architecture, to improve robotic activity recognition by effectively fusing WiFi Channel State Information (CSI) amplitude and phase data, demonstrating improved accuracy and robustness compared to using amplitude alone.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了GF-BiLSTM，一种新型深度学习架构，通过有效地融合WiFi信道状态信息（CSI）的幅度和相位数据，从而提高机器人活动识别的准确性和鲁棒性，优于仅使用幅度的方法。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)

Overall: (5/10)

Authors: Rojin Zandi, Hojjat Salehinejad, Milad Siami

Why Channel-Centric Models are not Enough to Predict End-to-End Performance in Private 5G: A Measurement Campaign and Case Study

Abstract (English): Communication-aware robot planning requires accurate predictions of wireless network performance. Current approaches rely on channel-level metrics such as received signal strength and signal-to-noise ratio, assuming these translate reliably into end-to-end throughput. We challenge this assumption through a measurement campaign in a private 5G industrial environment. We evaluate throughput predictions from a commercial ray-tracing simulator as well as data-driven Gaussian process regression models against measurements collected using a mobile robot. The study uses off-the-shelf user equipment in an underground, radio-shielded facility with detailed 3D modeling, representing a best-case scenario for prediction accuracy. The ray-tracing simulator captures the spatial structure of indoor propagation and predicts channel-level metrics with reasonable fidelity. However, it systematically over-predicts throughput, even in line-of-sight regions. The dominant error source is shown to be over-estimation of sustainable MIMO spatial layers: the simulator assumes near-uniform four-layer transmission while measurements reveal substantial adaptation between one and three layers. This mismatch inflates predicted throughput even when channel metrics appear accurate. In contrast, a Gaussian process model with a rational quadratic kernel achieves approximately two-thirds reduction in prediction error with near-zero bias by learning end-to-end throughput directly from measurements. These findings demonstrate that favorable channel conditions do not guarantee high throughput; communication-aware planners relying solely on channel-centric predictions risk overly optimistic trajectories that violate reliability requirements. Accurate throughput prediction for 5G systems requires either extensive calibration of link-layer models or data-driven approaches that capture real system behavior.

摘要（中文）: 通信感知机器人规划需要对无线网络性能进行精确预测。现有方法依赖于信道层指标，例如接收信号强度和信噪比，并假设这些指标能够可靠地转化为端到端吞吐量。我们通过在私有 5G 工业环境中进行的测量活动，对这一假设提出了挑战。我们利用移动机器人采集的数据，评估了来自商业射线追踪模拟器的吞吐量预测以及数据驱动的高斯过程回归模型。该研究使用现成的用户设备，在一个具有详细 3D 建模的地下、无线电屏蔽设施中进行，这代表了预测精度的最佳场景。射线追踪模拟器捕捉了室内传播的空间结构，并以合理的保真度预测了信道层指标。然而，即使在视距区域，它也系统性地高估了吞吐量。研究表明，主要误差来源是对可持续 MIMO 空间层的过度估计：模拟器假定接近均匀的四层传输，而测量结果显示在一到三层之间存在显著的自适应调整。即使信道指标看起来准确，这种不匹配也会夸大预测的吞吐量。相比之下，具有有理二次核的高斯过程模型通过直接从测量数据中学习端到端吞吐量，实现了大约三分之二的预测误差降低，并且偏差接近于零。这些发现表明，有利的信道条件并不能保证高吞吐量；仅依赖于以信道为中心的预测的通信感知规划器，可能面临过于乐观的轨迹，从而违反可靠性要求。对于 5G 系统，准确的吞吐量预测需要对链路层模型进行广泛的校准，或者采用能够捕捉真实系统行为的数据驱动方法。

TLDR: This paper demonstrates that channel-centric models are insufficient for accurate end-to-end throughput prediction in private 5G networks, advocating for data-driven approaches or link-layer model calibration.

简要说明: 该论文表明，以信道为中心的模型不足以准确预测私有5G网络中的端到端吞吐量，并提倡使用数据驱动的方法或链路层模型校准。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (6/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)
Overall: (5/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Nils Jörgensen

Adaptive SINDy: Residual Force System Identification Based UAV Disturbance Rejection

Abstract (English): The stability and control of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) in a turbulent environment is a matter of great concern. Devising a robust control algorithm to reject disturbances is challenging due to the highly nonlinear nature of wind dynamics, and modeling the dynamics using analytical techniques is not straightforward. While traditional techniques using disturbance observers and classical adaptive control have shown some progress, they are mostly limited to relatively non-complex environments. On the other hand, learning based approaches are increasingly being used for modeling of residual forces and disturbance rejection; however, their generalization and interpretability is a factor of concern. To this end, we propose a novel integration of data-driven system identification using Sparse Identification of Non-Linear Dynamics (SINDy) with a Recursive Least Square (RLS) adaptive control to adapt and reject wind disturbances in a turbulent environment. We tested and validated our approach on Gazebo harmonic environment and on real flights with wind speeds of up to 2 m/s from four directions, creating a highly dynamic and turbulent environment. Adaptive SINDy outperformed the baseline PID and INDI controllers on several trajectory tracking error metrics without crashing. A root mean square error (RMSE) of up to 12.2 cm and 17.6 cm, and a mean absolute error (MAE) of 13.7 cm and 10.5 cm were achieved on circular and lemniscate trajectories, respectively. The validation was performed on a very lightweight Crazyflie drone under a highly dynamic environment for complex trajectory tracking.

摘要（中文）: 在湍流环境下，无人机（UAV）的稳定性和控制是一个备受关注的问题。由于风动力学的高度非线性，以及使用分析技术对动力学进行建模并不直接，因此设计一种能够抑制扰动的鲁棒控制算法极具挑战性。虽然使用扰动观测器和经典自适应控制等传统技术已取得了一些进展，但它们主要局限于相对简单的环境。另一方面，基于学习的方法正越来越多地用于残余力和扰动抑制的建模；然而，它们的泛化性和可解释性是一个令人担忧的因素。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的集成方案，将使用非线性动力学稀疏辨识（SINDy）的数据驱动系统辨识与递归最小二乘（RLS）自适应控制相结合，以适应和抑制湍流环境中的风扰动。我们在Gazebo谐波环境中以及真实飞行中对我们的方法进行了测试和验证，风速高达2米/秒，来自四个方向，创造了一个高度动态和湍流的环境。自适应SINDy在多个轨迹跟踪误差指标上都优于基线PID和INDI控制器，且未发生坠毁。在圆形和8字形轨迹上，分别实现了高达12.2厘米和17.6厘米的均方根误差（RMSE），以及13.7厘米和10.5厘米的平均绝对误差（MAE）。验证是在非常轻型的 Crazyflie 无人机上，在高度动态的环境下，针对复杂轨迹跟踪进行的。

TLDR: This paper introduces Adaptive SINDy, a novel control approach combining SINDy with RLS adaptive control for UAV disturbance rejection in turbulent environments, demonstrating superior trajectory tracking performance compared to PID and INDI controllers on a Crazyflie drone.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种名为Adaptive SINDy的新型控制方法，该方法将SINDy与RLS自适应控制相结合，用于无人机在湍流环境中的扰动抑制。实验表明，与PID和INDI控制器相比，该方法在Crazyflie无人机上表现出更优越的轨迹跟踪性能。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)

Authors: Fawad Mehboob, Amir Atef Habel, Roohan Ahmed Khan, Mikhail Derevianchenko, Clement Fortin, Dzmitry Tsetserukou

SEP-NMPC: Safety Enhanced Passivity-Based Nonlinear Model Predictive Control for a UAV Slung Payload System

Abstract (English): Model Predictive Control (MPC) is widely adopted for agile multirotor vehicles, yet achieving both stability and obstacle-free flight is particularly challenging when a payload is suspended beneath the airframe. This paper introduces a Safety Enhanced Passivity-Based Nonlinear MPC (SEP-NMPC) that provides formal guarantees of stability and safety for a quadrotor transporting a slung payload through cluttered environments. Stability is enforced by embedding a strict passivity inequality, which is derived from a shaped energy storage function with adaptive damping, directly into the NMPC. This formulation dissipates excess energy and ensures asymptotic convergence despite payload swings. Safety is guaranteed through high-order control barrier functions (HOCBFs) that render user-defined clearance sets forward-invariant, obliging both the quadrotor and the swinging payload to maintain separation while interacting with static and dynamic obstacles. The optimization remains quadratic-program compatible and is solved online at each sampling time without gain scheduling or heuristic switching. Extensive simulations and real-world experiments confirm stable payload transport, collision-free trajectories, and real-time feasibility across all tested scenarios. The SEP-NMPC framework therefore unifies passivity-based closed-loop stability with HOCBF-based safety guarantees for UAV slung-payload transportation.

摘要（中文）: 模型预测控制（MPC）被广泛应用于敏捷多旋翼飞行器，然而，当有效载荷悬挂在机身下方时，同时实现稳定性和无障碍飞行尤其具有挑战性。本文提出了一种安全增强的基于无源性的非线性MPC（SEP-NMPC），为四旋翼飞行器在复杂环境中运输悬挂有效载荷提供了形式化的稳定性和安全性保证。通过将从具有自适应阻尼的塑造储能函数导出的严格无源性不等式直接嵌入到NMPC中，来确保稳定性。该公式消散多余的能量，并确保即使在有效载荷摆动的情况下也能实现渐近收敛。通过高阶控制障碍函数（HOCBFs）来保证安全性，这些函数使用户定义的间隙集合具有前向不变性，强制要求四旋翼飞行器和摆动的有效载荷在与静态和动态障碍物交互时保持分离。该优化问题保持与二次规划兼容，并在每个采样时间在线求解，无需增益调度或启发式切换。广泛的仿真和真实世界实验证实了稳定的有效载荷运输、无碰撞轨迹以及在所有测试场景中的实时可行性。因此，SEP-NMPC框架统一了基于无源性的闭环稳定性与基于HOCBF的安全保证，用于无人机悬挂有效载荷运输。

TLDR: This paper presents a Safety Enhanced Passivity-Based Nonlinear MPC (SEP-NMPC) for UAV slung-payload systems, guaranteeing stability and safety in cluttered environments by integrating passivity and high-order control barrier functions.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种用于无人机悬挂载荷系统的安全增强型基于被动性的非线性模型预测控制（SEP-NMPC），通过结合被动性和高阶控制障碍函数，保证了在复杂环境中的稳定性和安全性。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Seyedreza Rezaei, Junjie Kang, Amaldev Haridevan, Jinjun Shan

Impact of Different Failures on a Robot's Perceived Reliability

Abstract (English): Robots fail, potentially leading to a loss in the robot's perceived reliability (PR), a measure correlated with trustworthiness. In this study we examine how various kinds of failures affect the PR of the robot differently, and how this measure recovers without explicit social repair actions by the robot. In a preregistered and controlled online video study, participants were asked to predict a robot's success in a pick-and-place task. We examined manipulation failures (slips), freezing (lapses), and three types of incorrect picked objects or place goals (mistakes). Participants were shown one of 11 videos -- one of five types of failure, one of five types of failure followed by a successful execution in the same video, or a successful execution video. This was followed by two additional successful execution videos. Participants bet money either on the robot or on a coin toss after each video. People's betting patterns along with a qualitative analysis of their survey responses highlight that mistakes are less damaging to PR than slips or lapses, and some mistakes are even perceived as successes. We also see that successes immediately following a failure have the same effect on PR as successes without a preceding failure. Finally, we show that successful executions recover PR after a failure. Our findings highlight which robot failures are in higher need of repair in a human-robot interaction, and how trust could be recovered by robot successes.

摘要（中文）: 机器人可能会发生故障，这可能导致机器人感知可靠性(PR)的下降，PR是与可信度相关的指标。在本研究中，我们考察了不同类型的故障如何以不同的方式影响机器人的PR，以及在没有机器人采取明确的社会修复行为的情况下，该指标如何恢复。在一项预先注册和控制的在线视频研究中，参与者被要求预测机器人在抓取与放置任务中的成功率。我们研究了操作失败（滑动）、冻结（停顿）以及三种类型的错误抓取对象或放置目标（错误）。参与者观看了11个视频中的一个——包含五种类型的故障中的一种，由五种类型的故障中的一种后紧跟同一个视频中的一次成功执行，或者一次成功的执行视频。紧随其后是额外的两次成功执行视频。在每个视频之后，参与者选择押注于机器人或抛硬币。人们的押注模式以及对调查回复的定性分析表明，错误对PR的损害小于滑动或停顿，某些错误甚至被认为是成功。我们还发现，紧随失败之后的成功，对PR的影响与没有先前失败的成功相同。最后，我们证明了成功的执行可以恢复故障后的PR。我们的研究结果突出了在人机交互中哪些机器人故障更需要修复，以及如何通过机器人的成功来恢复信任。

TLDR: This paper investigates how different types of robot failures (slips, lapses, mistakes) impact perceived reliability and how subsequent successes can recover it, finding that mistakes are less damaging than other failures. They measured user trust through betting patterns in an online study.

简要说明: 本文研究了不同类型的机器人故障（滑倒、失误、错误）如何影响人们对机器人可靠性的感知，以及后续的成功如何恢复这种可靠性。研究发现，错误比其他故障造成的损害更小。作者通过在线研究中的投注模式来衡量用户的信任度。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (6/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (5/10)
Overall: (5/10)
