Authors: Andrew Violette, Zhanxin Wu, Haruki Nishimura, Masha Itkina, Leticia Priebe Rocha, Mark Zolotas, Guy Hoffman, Hadas Kress-Gazit

Understanding the Use of a Large Language Model-Powered Guide to Make Virtual Reality Accessible for Blind and Low Vision People

Abstract (English): As social virtual reality (VR) grows more popular, addressing accessibility for blind and low vision (BLV) users is increasingly critical. Researchers have proposed an AI "sighted guide" to help users navigate VR and answer their questions, but it has not been studied with users. To address this gap, we developed a large language model (LLM)-powered guide and studied its use with 16 BLV participants in virtual environments with confederates posing as other users. We found that when alone, participants treated the guide as a tool, but treated it companionably around others, giving it nicknames, rationalizing its mistakes with its appearance, and encouraging confederate-guide interaction. Our work furthers understanding of guides as a versatile method for VR accessibility and presents design recommendations for future guides.

摘要（中文）: 随着社交虚拟现实（VR）越来越普及，解决盲人和低视力（BLV）用户的可访问性问题变得日益关键。研究人员已经提出了一种AI“视觉引导”来帮助用户在VR中导航和回答问题，但尚未与用户进行实际研究。为了弥补这一差距，我们开发了一种基于大型语言模型（LLM）的引导系统，并在虚拟环境中与16名BLV参与者一起研究了其使用情况，环境中包含扮演其他用户的同谋者。我们发现，当独自一人时，参与者将该引导系统视为一种工具，但在周围有其他人时，他们则以更加友好的方式对待引导系统，给它起昵称，用它的外观来为其错误辩解，并鼓励同谋者与引导系统互动。我们的工作加深了对引导系统作为VR可访问性通用方法的理解，并为未来的引导系统设计提出了建议。

TLDR: This paper explores the use of an LLM-powered guide for making VR accessible to blind and low-vision users, finding that users treat the guide differently depending on their social context.

简要说明: 本文探讨了使用大型语言模型驱动的VR辅助工具，以提高盲人和低视力用户的VR体验。研究发现，用户在不同社交环境中使用该工具的方式有所不同。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (6/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (5/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Jazmin Collins, Sharon Y Lin, Tianqi Liu, Andrea Stevenson Won, Shiri Azenkot

Execution Is the New Attack Surface: Survivability-Aware Agentic Crypto Trading with OpenClaw-Style Local Executors

Abstract (English): OpenClaw-style agent stacks turn language into privileged execution: LLM intents flow through tool interception, policy gates, and a local executor. In parallel, skill marketplaces such as skills.sh make capability acquisition as easy as installing skills and CLIs, creating a growing capability supply chain. Together, these trends shift the dominant safety failure mode from "wrong answers" to execution-induced loss, where untrusted prompts, compromised skills, or narrative manipulation can trigger real trades and irreversible side effects. We propose Survivability-Aware Execution (SAE), an execution-layer survivability standard for OpenClaw-style systems and skill-enabled agents. SAE sits as middleware between a strategy engine (LLM or non-LLM) and the exchange executor. It defines an explicit execution contract (ExecutionRequest, ExecutionContext, ExecutionDecision) and enforces non-bypassable last-mile invariants: projection-based exposure budgets, cooldown and order-rate limits, slippage bounds, staged execution, and tool/venue allowlists. To make delegated execution testable under supply-chain risk, we operationalize the Delegation Gap (DG) via a logged Intended Policy Spec that enables deterministic out-of-scope labeling and reproducible DG metrics. On an offline replay using official Binance USD-M BTCUSDT/ETHUSDT perpetual data (15m; 2025-09-01--2025-12-01, incl. funding), SAE improves survivability: MDD drops from 0.4643 to 0.0319 (Full; 93.1%), |CVaR_0.99| shrinks from 4.025e-3 to ~1.02e-4 (~97.5%), and DG loss proxy falls from 0.647 to 0.019 (~97.0%). AttackSuccess decreases from 1.00 to 0.728 with zero FalseBlock in this run. Block bootstrap, paired Wilcoxon, and two-proportion tests confirm the shifts. SAE reframes agentic trading safety for the OpenClaw+skills era: treat upstream intent and skills as untrusted, and enforce survivability where actions become side effects.

摘要（中文）: 类似于OpenClaw的代理堆栈将语言转化为特权执行：LLM意图流经工具拦截、策略门和本地执行器。同时，像skills.sh这样的技能市场使能力获取像安装技能和CLI一样容易，从而创建了一个不断增长的能力供应链。这些趋势共同将主要的安全性失效模式从“错误答案”转变为执行诱导的损失，其中不受信任的提示、受损的技能或叙事操纵可能触发真实的交易和不可逆的副作用。我们提出生存性感知执行（SAE），一种针对OpenClaw式系统和技能使能代理的执行层生存性标准。SAE作为中间件位于策略引擎（LLM或非LLM）和交易所执行器之间。它定义了一个显式的执行合约（ExecutionRequest、ExecutionContext、ExecutionDecision），并强制执行不可绕过的最后一公里不变性：基于投影的暴露预算、冷却和订单速率限制、滑点边界、分阶段执行和工具/场所白名单。为了使供应链风险下的委托执行可测试，我们通过记录的意图策略规范将委托差距(DG)操作化，该规范支持确定性的超范围标记和可重现的DG指标。在使用官方Binance USD-M BTCUSDT/ETHUSDT永续合约数据（15分钟；2025-09-01至2025-12-01，包括资金费率）的离线回放中，SAE提高了生存性：最大回撤(MDD)从0.4643降至0.0319（全部；93.1%），|0.99置信水平下的条件风险价值|(|CVaR_0.99|)从4.025e-3缩小到~1.02e-4（~97.5%），DG损失代理从0.647降至0.019（~97.0%）。在此运行中，攻击成功率从1.00降至0.728，且无误封锁。块引导、配对Wilcoxon检验和双比例检验证实了这些变化。SAE为OpenClaw+技能时代重新定义了代理交易安全：将上游意图和技能视为不受信任的，并在行动产生副作用的地方强制执行生存性。

TLDR: The paper introduces Survivability-Aware Execution (SAE) to mitigate execution-induced losses in agentic crypto trading systems, treating upstream intents and skills as untrusted and enforcing last-mile invariants. Experimental results on Binance data show significant improvements in survivability metrics.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了生存感知执行（SAE），旨在减轻代理加密货币交易系统中因执行而造成的损失。SAE 将上游意图和技能视为不受信任，并执行最后一英里的不变性。在币安数据上的实验结果表明，生存指标有显著改善。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)
Overall: (5/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Ailiya Borjigin, Igor Stadnyk, Ben Bilski, Serhii Hovorov, Sofiia Pidturkina

Declarative Scenario-based Testing with RoadLogic

Abstract (English): Scenario-based testing is a key method for cost-effective and safe validation of autonomous vehicles (AVs). Existing approaches rely on imperative scenario definitions, requiring developers to manually enumerate numerous variants to achieve coverage. Declarative languages, such as OpenSCENARIO DSL (OS2), raise the abstraction level but lack systematic methods for instantiating concrete, specification-compliant scenarios as simulations. To our knowledge, currently, no open-source solution provides this capability. We present RoadLogic that bridges declarative OS2 specifications and executable simulations. It uses Answer Set Programming to generate abstract plans satisfying scenario constraints, motion planning to refine the plans into feasible trajectories, and specification-based monitoring to verify correctness. We evaluate RoadLogic on instantiating representative OS2 scenarios as simulations in the CommonRoad framework. Results show that RoadLogic consistently produces realistic, specification-satisfying simulations within minutes and captures diverse behavioral variants through parameter sampling, thus opening the door to systematic scenario-based testing for autonomous driving systems.

摘要（中文）: 基于场景的测试是自动驾驶车辆（AVs）进行经济高效且安全验证的关键方法。现有方法依赖于命令式场景定义，需要开发人员手动枚举大量变体以实现覆盖。声明式语言（如OpenSCENARIO DSL (OS2)）提高了抽象层次，但缺乏将符合规范的具体场景实例化为仿真的系统方法。据我们所知，目前没有开源解决方案提供此功能。 我们提出了RoadLogic，它连接了声明式OS2规范和可执行仿真。它使用答案集编程来生成满足场景约束的抽象计划，使用运动规划将计划细化为可行的轨迹，并使用基于规范的监控来验证正确性。 我们在CommonRoad框架中实例化代表性的OS2场景作为仿真，以此评估RoadLogic。结果表明，RoadLogic能够在几分钟内持续生成逼真、符合规范的仿真，并通过参数采样捕获不同的行为变体，从而为自动驾驶系统的系统化、基于场景的测试打开了大门。

TLDR: The paper introduces RoadLogic, an open-source system that bridges declarative OpenSCENARIO specifications with executable simulations for autonomous vehicle testing by using Answer Set Programming and motion planning to generate specification-satisfying simulations.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了RoadLogic，一个开源系统，它通过使用答案集编程和运动规划来生成满足规范的模拟，从而将声明式OpenSCENARIO规范与自动驾驶汽车测试的可执行模拟联系起来。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)
Overall: (5/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Ezio Bartocci, Alessio Gambi, Felix Gigler, Cristinel Mateis, Dejan Ničković

Reading the Mood Behind Words: Integrating Prosody-Derived Emotional Context into Socially Responsive VR Agents

Abstract (English): In VR interactions with embodied conversational agents, users' emotional intent is often conveyed more by how something is said than by what is said. However, most VR agent pipelines rely on speech-to-text processing, discarding prosodic cues and often producing emotionally incongruent responses despite correct semantics. We propose an emotion-context-aware VR interaction pipeline that treats vocal emotion as explicit dialogue context in an LLM-based conversational agent. A real-time speech emotion recognition model infers users' emotional states from prosody, and the resulting emotion labels are injected into the agent's dialogue context to shape response tone and style. Results from a within-subjects VR study (N=30) show significant improvements in dialogue quality, naturalness, engagement, rapport, and human-likeness, with 93.3% of participants preferring the emotion-aware agent.

摘要（中文）: 在与具身对话代理的VR交互中，用户的情绪意图通常更多地通过说话方式而非说话内容来传达。然而，大多数VR代理管线依赖于语音转文本处理，丢弃了韵律线索，并且即使语义正确，也经常产生情绪不协调的响应。我们提出了一种情绪上下文感知的VR交互管线，该管线将语音情绪作为基于LLM的对话代理中的显式对话上下文。一个实时语音情绪识别模型从韵律中推断出用户的情绪状态，并将产生的情绪标签注入到代理的对话上下文中，以塑造响应的语调和风格。一项被试内VR研究（N=30）的结果表明，在对话质量、自然度、参与度、融洽度和类人程度方面都得到了显著改善，93.3%的参与者更喜欢情绪感知的代理。

TLDR: This paper introduces an emotion-context-aware VR interaction pipeline integrating speech emotion recognition into an LLM-based conversational agent, demonstrating significant improvements in user experience metrics compared to agents without emotional awareness.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了一种情感语境感知的VR交互流程，将语音情感识别集成到基于LLM的对话代理中，与没有情感意识的代理相比，用户体验指标有了显著改善。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: SangYeop Jeong, Yeongseo Na, Seung Gyu Jeong, Jin-Woo Jeong, Seong-Eun Kim

DenoiseSplat: Feed-Forward Gaussian Splatting for Noisy 3D Scene Reconstruction

Abstract (English): 3D scene reconstruction and novel-view synthesis are fundamental for VR, robotics, and content creation. However, most NeRF and 3D Gaussian Splatting pipelines assume clean inputs and degrade under real noise and artifacts. We therefore propose DenoiseSplat, a feed-forward 3D Gaussian splatting method for noisy multi-view images. We build a large-scale, scene-consistent noisy--clean benchmark on RE10K by injecting Gaussian, Poisson, speckle, and salt-and-pepper noise with controlled intensities. With a lightweight MVSplat-style feed-forward backbone, we train end-to-end using only clean 2D renderings as supervision and no 3D ground truth. On noisy RE10K, DenoiseSplat outperforms vanilla MVSplat and a strong two-stage baseline (IDF + MVSplat) in PSNR/SSIM and LPIPS across noise types and levels.

摘要（中文）: 3D场景重建和新视角合成是VR、机器人技术和内容创作的基础。 然而，大多数NeRF和3D高斯溅射流程都假设输入干净，并在真实噪声和伪影下性能下降。 因此，我们提出DenoiseSplat，一种用于处理带噪多视角图像的前馈3D高斯溅射方法。 我们通过注入具有可控强度的 Gaussian、Poisson、speckle 和 salt-and-pepper 噪声，在 RE10K 上构建了一个大规模、场景一致的带噪-干净基准数据集。 凭借轻量级的MVSplat风格前馈骨干网络，我们仅使用干净的2D渲染作为监督，无需3D真值进行端到端训练。 在带噪RE10K上，DenoiseSplat在PSNR/SSIM和LPIPS指标上，优于原生MVSplat和一个强大的两阶段基线方法（IDF + MVSplat）， 且在各种噪声类型和噪声强度下都表现更优。

TLDR: DenoiseSplat is a Gaussian Splatting method that reconstructs 3D scenes from noisy multi-view images using a feed-forward architecture trained on clean renderings, outperforming existing methods on a new noisy benchmark.

简要说明: DenoiseSplat 是一种高斯溅射方法，它使用前馈架构从嘈杂的多视图图像中重建 3D 场景，并通过仅在干净渲染上训练，在新噪音基准测试中优于现有方法。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Fuzhen Jiang, Zhuoran Li, Yinlin Zhang

TASER: Task-Aware Spectral Energy Refine for Backdoor Suppression in UAV Swarms Decentralized Federated Learning

Abstract (English): As backdoor attacks in UAV-based decentralized federated learning (DFL) grow increasingly stealthy and sophisticated, existing defenses have likewise escalated in complexity. Yet these defenses, which rely heavily on outlier detection, remain vulnerable to carefully crafted backdoors. In UAV-DFL, the lack of global coordination and limited resources further render outlier-based defenses impractical. Against this backdrop, gradient spectral analysis offers a promising alternative. While prior work primarily leverages low-frequency coefficients for pairwise comparisons, it neglects to analyze the intrinsic spectral characteristics of backdoor gradients. Through empirical analysis of existing stealthy attacks, we reveal a key insight: the more effort attackers invest in mimicking benign behaviors, the more distinct the spectral concentration becomes. Motivated by this, we propose Task-Aware Spectral Energy Refine (TASER) -- a decentralized defense framework. To our knowledge, this is the first efficient backdoor defense that utilizes spectral concentration instead of complex outlier detection, enabling mitigation of stealthy attacks by structurally disrupting the backdoor task. To suppress the backdoor task, TASER preserves main-task-relevant frequency coefficients and discards others. We provide theoretical guarantees and demonstrate through experiments that TASER remains effective against stealthy backdoor attacks that bypass outlier-based defenses, achieving attack success rate below 20% and accuracy loss under 5%.

摘要（中文）: 随着基于无人机去中心化联邦学习(DFL)中的后门攻击变得越来越隐蔽和复杂，现有的防御措施也同样变得复杂。然而，这些严重依赖异常检测的防御措施仍然容易受到精心设计的后门的影响。在无人机-DFL中，缺乏全局协调和有限的资源进一步使基于异常值的防御变得不切实际。在此背景下，梯度谱分析提供了一个有希望的替代方案。虽然先前的工作主要利用低频系数进行两两比较，但它忽略了分析后门梯度的内在光谱特征。通过对现有隐蔽攻击的实证分析，我们揭示了一个关键的见解：攻击者在模仿良性行为上投入的精力越多，光谱集中度就越明显。受此启发，我们提出了任务感知谱能量精炼(TASER)——一个去中心化的防御框架。据我们所知，这是第一个利用谱集中度而非复杂异常值检测的有效后门防御方法，它通过结构性地破坏后门任务来实现对隐蔽攻击的缓解。为了抑制后门任务，TASER保留与主要任务相关的频率系数并丢弃其他系数。我们提供了理论保证，并通过实验证明，TASER对于绕过基于异常值防御的隐蔽后门攻击仍然有效，攻击成功率低于20%，精度损失低于5%。

TLDR: The paper proposes TASER, a novel decentralized defense framework against backdoor attacks in UAV-based federated learning by leveraging spectral concentration to disrupt backdoor tasks. It claims to be more efficient than outlier detection-based methods and effective against stealthy attacks.

简要说明: 该论文提出了一种名为TASER的新型去中心化防御框架，通过利用频谱集中来破坏后门任务，从而防御基于无人机的联邦学习中的后门攻击。它声称比基于异常值检测的方法更有效，并且可以有效防御隐蔽攻击。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)
Overall: (5/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Sizhe Huang, Shujie Yang

BridgeDiff: Bridging Human Observations and Flat-Garment Synthesis for Virtual Try-Off

Abstract (English): Virtual try-off (VTOFF) aims to recover canonical flat-garment representations from images of dressed persons for standardized display and downstream virtual try-on. Prior methods often treat VTOFF as direct image translation driven by local masks or text-only prompts, overlooking the gap between on-body appearances and flat layouts. This gap frequently leads to inconsistent completion in unobserved regions and unstable garment structure. We propose BridgeDiff, a diffusion-based framework that explicitly bridges human-centric observations and flat-garment synthesis through two complementary components. First, the Garment Condition Bridge Module (GCBM) builds a garment-cue representation that captures global appearance and semantic identity, enabling robust inference of continuous details under partial visibility. Second, the Flat Structure Constraint Module (FSCM) injects explicit flat-garment structural priors via Flat-Constraint Attention (FC-Attention) at selected denoising stages, improving structural stability beyond text-only conditioning. Extensive experiments on standard VTOFF benchmarks show that BridgeDiff achieves state-of-the-art performance, producing higher-quality flat-garment reconstructions while preserving fine-grained appearance and structural integrity.

摘要（中文）: 虚拟试衣推断（VTOFF）旨在从穿着人员的图像中恢复规范的平面服装表示，以便进行标准化展示和下游虚拟试穿。先前的方法通常将VTOFF视为由局部掩码或纯文本提示驱动的直接图像翻译，忽略了人体穿着外观与平面布局之间的差距。这种差距经常导致未观察区域的不一致性补全和不稳定的服装结构。我们提出了BridgeDiff，一种基于扩散的框架，通过两个互补的组件显式地桥接以人为中心的观察和平面服装合成。首先，服装条件桥接模块（GCBM）构建一个服装提示表示，捕捉全局外观和语义身份，从而能够在部分可见的情况下鲁棒地推断连续细节。其次，平面结构约束模块（FSCM）通过平面约束注意（FC-Attention）在选定的去噪阶段注入显式的平面服装结构先验，从而提高超出纯文本条件约束的结构稳定性。在标准VTOFF基准上的大量实验表明，BridgeDiff实现了最先进的性能，产生了更高质量的平面服装重建，同时保留了细粒度的外观和结构完整性。

TLDR: The paper introduces BridgeDiff, a diffusion-based framework for virtual try-off that bridges human observations and flat-garment synthesis using a Garment Condition Bridge Module and a Flat Structure Constraint Module to improve garment reconstruction quality and structural integrity.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了BridgeDiff，一个基于扩散的虚拟试穿框架，它通过服装条件桥接模块和平面结构约束模块来桥接人体观察和平面服装合成，从而提高服装重建质量和结构完整性。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Shuang Liu, Ao Yu, Linkang Cheng, Xiwen Huang, Li Zhao, Junhui Liu, Zhiting Lin, Yu Liu

Security Considerations for Multi-agent Systems

Abstract (English): Multi-agent artificial intelligence systems or MAS are systems of autonomous agents that exercise delegated tool authority, share persistent memory, and coordinate via inter-agent communication. MAS introduces qualitatively distinct security vulnerabilities from those documented for singular AI models. Existing security and governance frameworks were not designed for these emerging attack surfaces. This study systematically characterizes the threat landscape of MAS and quantitatively evaluates 16 security frameworks for AI against it. A four-phase methodology is proposed: constructing a deep technical knowledge base of production multi-agent architectures; conducting generative AI-assisted threat modeling scoped to MAS cybersecurity risks and validated by domain experts; structuring survey plans at individual-threat granularity; and scoring each framework on a three-point scale against the cybersecurity risks. The risks were organized into 193 distinct main threat items across nine risk categories. The expected minimal average score is 2. No reviewed framework achieves majority coverage of any single category. Non-Determinism (mean score 1.231 across all 16 frameworks) and Data Leakage (1.340) are the most under-addressed domains. The OWASP Agentic Security Initiative leads overall at 65.3\% coverage and in the design phase; the CDAO Generative AI Responsible AI Toolkit leads in development and operational coverage. These results provide the first empirical cross-framework comparison for MAS security and offer evidence-based guidance for framework selection.

摘要（中文）: 多智能体人工智能系统（MAS）是由自主智能体组成的系统，这些智能体行使委托的工具权限，共享持久性内存，并通过智能体间通信进行协调。MAS引入了与针对单一AI模型记录的漏洞在性质上截然不同的安全漏洞。现有的安全和治理框架并非为应对这些新兴攻击面而设计。本研究系统地描述了MAS的威胁态势，并针对该态势定量评估了16个AI安全框架。提出了一种四阶段方法：构建生产多智能体架构的深入技术知识库；进行生成式AI辅助的威胁建模，范围限定于MAS网络安全风险，并由领域专家验证；在个体威胁粒度上构建调研计划；以及根据网络安全风险，以三点尺度对每个框架进行评分。风险被组织成九个风险类别中的193个不同的主要威胁条目。预期最低平均分数为2。没有一个接受审查的框架能够覆盖任何单个类别的大部分内容。非确定性（所有16个框架的平均分为1.231）和数据泄漏（1.340）是解决最不足之处的领域。OWASP Agentic安全倡议以65.3%的总体覆盖率和设计阶段的领先地位位居榜首；CDAO生成式AI负责任AI工具包在开发和运营覆盖率方面领先。这些结果提供了针对MAS安全的首次实证跨框架比较，并为框架选择提供了基于证据的指导。

TLDR: This paper identifies security vulnerabilities unique to multi-agent systems (MAS), evaluates the coverage of existing AI security frameworks, and finds that current frameworks inadequately address these risks, particularly regarding non-determinism and data leakage.

简要说明: 本文旨在识别多智能体系统（MAS）独有的安全漏洞，评估现有AI安全框架的覆盖范围，并发现当前的框架未能充分解决这些风险，尤其是在非确定性和数据泄露方面。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)
Overall: (5/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Tam Nguyen, Moses Ndebugre, Dheeraj Arremsetty

The FABRIC Strategy for Verifying Neural Feedback Systems

Abstract (English): Forward reachability analysis is a dominant approach for verifying reach-avoid specifications in neural feedback systems, i.e., dynamical systems controlled by neural networks, and a number of directions have been proposed and studied. In contrast, far less attention has been given to backward reachability analysis for these systems, in part because of the limited scalability of known techniques. In this work, we begin to address this gap by introducing new algorithms for computing both over- and underapproximations of backward reachable sets for nonlinear neural feedback systems. We also describe and implement an integration of these backward reachability techniques with existing ones for forward analysis. We call the resulting algorithm Forward and Backward Reachability Integration for Certification (FaBRIC). We evaluate our algorithms on a representative set of benchmarks and show that they significantly outperform the prior state of the art.

摘要（中文）: 前向可达性分析是验证神经反馈系统（即由神经网络控制的动力系统）中可达-规避规范的主要方法，并且已经提出了许多方向并进行了研究。相比之下，针对这些系统的后向可达性分析却鲜少受到关注，部分原因是已知技术的可扩展性有限。在这项工作中，我们开始弥补这一差距，提出了计算非线性神经反馈系统后向可达集过度逼近和次度逼近的新算法。我们还描述并实现了一种将这些后向可达性技术与现有前向分析技术相结合的集成方法。我们将由此产生的算法称为用于认证的前向和后向可达性集成（FaBRIC）。我们在具有代表性的一组基准上评估了我们的算法，并表明它们明显优于先前的最先进技术。

TLDR: This paper introduces a new algorithm, FaBRIC, for verifying neural feedback systems by integrating backward and forward reachability analysis, demonstrating significant improvements over existing methods.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种名为FaBRIC 的新算法，通过整合后向和前向可达性分析来验证神经反馈系统，并证明其性能明显优于现有方法。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (7/10)

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: I. Samuel Akinwande, Sydney M. Katz, Mykel J. Kochenderfer, Clark Barrett

GSStream: 3D Gaussian Splatting based Volumetric Scene Streaming System

Abstract (English): Recently, the 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS) technique for real-time radiance field rendering has revolutionized the field of volumetric scene representation, providing users with an immersive experience. But in return, it also poses a large amount of data volume, which is extremely bandwidth-intensive. Cutting-edge researchers have tried to introduce different approaches and construct multiple variants for 3DGS to obtain a more compact scene representation, but it is still challenging for real-time distribution. In this paper, we propose GSStream, a novel volumetric scene streaming system to support 3DGS data format. Specifically, GSStream integrates a collaborative viewport prediction module to better predict users' future behaviors by learning collaborative priors and historical priors from multiple users and users' viewport sequences and a deep reinforcement learning (DRL)-based bitrate adaptation module to tackle the state and action space variability challenge of the bitrate adaptation problem, achieving efficient volumetric scene delivery. Besides, we first build a user viewport trajectory dataset for volumetric scenes to support the training and streaming simulation. Extensive experiments prove that our proposed GSStream system outperforms existing representative volumetric scene streaming systems in visual quality and network usage. Demo video: https://youtu.be/3WEe8PN8yvA.

摘要（中文）: 近年来，用于实时辐射场渲染的3D高斯溅射（3DGS）技术彻底改变了体绘制场景表示领域，为用户提供了沉浸式体验。但反过来，它也带来了庞大的数据量，对带宽提出了极高的要求。前沿研究人员尝试引入不同的方法并构建多个3DGS变体，以获得更紧凑的场景表示，但实时分发仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新型的体绘制场景流系统GSStream，以支持3DGS数据格式。具体而言，GSStream集成了协同视口预测模块，通过学习来自多个用户的协同先验和历史先验以及用户的视口序列，从而更好地预测用户未来的行为；以及基于深度强化学习（DRL）的码率自适应模块，以应对码率自适应问题中状态和动作空间的可变性挑战，从而实现高效的体绘制场景传输。此外，我们率先构建了一个用于体绘制场景的用户视口轨迹数据集，以支持训练和流媒体模拟。大量的实验证明，我们提出的GSStream系统在视觉质量和网络使用方面均优于现有的代表性体绘制场景流系统。演示视频：https://youtu.be/3WEe8PN8yvA。

TLDR: The paper introduces GSStream, a 3D Gaussian Splatting streaming system using viewport prediction and DRL-based bitrate adaptation to efficiently deliver volumetric scenes, demonstrating improved visual quality and network usage.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种名为GSStream的3D高斯溅射流式传输系统，该系统采用视口预测和基于DRL的码率自适应方法，以高效地传输体积场景，并展示了更好的视觉质量和网络使用率。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)
Overall: (5/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Zhiye Tang, Qiudan Zhang, Lei Zhang, Junhui Hou, You Yang, Xu Wang

SinGeo: Unlock Single Model's Potential for Robust Cross-View Geo-Localization

Abstract (English): Robust cross-view geo-localization (CVGL) remains challenging despite the surge in recent progress. Existing methods still rely on field-of-view (FoV)-specific training paradigms, where models are optimized under a fixed FoV but collapse when tested on unseen FoVs and unknown orientations. This limitation necessitates deploying multiple models to cover diverse variations. Although studies have explored dynamic FoV training by simply randomizing FoVs, they failed to achieve robustness across diverse conditions -- implicitly assuming all FoVs are equally difficult. To address this gap, we present SinGeo, a simple yet powerful framework that enables a single model to realize robust cross-view geo-localization without additional modules or explicit transformations. SinGeo employs a dual discriminative learning architecture that enhances intra-view discriminability within both ground and satellite branches, and is the first to introduce a curriculum learning strategy to achieve robust CVGL. Extensive evaluations on four benchmark datasets reveal that SinGeo sets state-of-the-art (SOTA) results under diverse conditions, and notably outperforms methods specifically trained for extreme FoVs. Beyond superior performance, SinGeo also exhibits cross-architecture transferability. Furthermore, we propose a consistency evaluation method to quantitatively assess model stability under varying views, providing an explainable perspective for understanding and advancing robustness in future CVGL research. Codes will be available upon acceptance.

摘要（中文）: 尽管近年来取得了长足的进展，但鲁棒的跨视角地理定位(CVGL)仍然具有挑战性。现有方法仍然依赖于视场(FoV)特定的训练范式，即模型在固定的FoV下进行优化，但在未见过的FoV和未知方向上测试时会失效。这种限制使得需要部署多个模型才能覆盖各种变化。虽然一些研究已经探索了通过简单地随机化FoV来实现动态FoV训练，但它们未能实现跨多样化条件的鲁棒性——隐含地假设所有FoV都具有相同的难度。为了解决这一差距，我们提出了SinGeo，一个简单而强大的框架，能够使单个模型实现鲁棒的跨视角地理定位，而无需额外的模块或显式变换。SinGeo采用了一种双重判别学习架构，增强了地面和卫星分支内的内视角判别能力，并且首次引入课程学习策略来实现鲁棒的CVGL。在四个基准数据集上的大量评估表明，SinGeo在各种条件下都实现了最先进(SOTA)的结果，并且显著优于专门针对极端FoV训练的方法。除了卓越的性能之外，SinGeo还表现出跨架构的可迁移性。此外，我们提出了一种一致性评估方法，用于定量评估模型在不同视角下的稳定性，为理解和推进未来CVGL研究中的鲁棒性提供了一个可解释的视角。代码将在接收后发布。

TLDR: The paper introduces SinGeo, a framework using dual discriminative learning and curriculum learning to improve the robustness of cross-view geo-localization with a single model, achieving state-of-the-art results on benchmark datasets.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了SinGeo，一个利用双判别学习和课程学习的框架，旨在提高单模型跨视角地理定位的鲁棒性，并在基准数据集上取得了最先进的结果。

Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Yang Chen, Xieyuanli Chen, Junxiang Li, Jie Tang, Tao Wu

Learning Convex Decomposition via Feature Fields

Abstract (English): This work proposes a new formulation to the long-standing problem of convex decomposition through learning feature fields, enabling the first feed-forward model for open-world convex decomposition. Our method produces high-quality decompositions of 3D shapes into a union of convex bodies, which are essential to accelerate collision detection in physical simulation, amongst many other applications. The key insight is to adopt a feature learning approach and learn a continuous feature field that can later be clustered to yield a good convex decomposition via our self-supervised, purely-geometric objective derived from the classical definition of convexity. Our formulation can be used for single shape optimization, but more importantly, feature prediction unlocks scalable, self-supervised learning on large datasets resulting in the first learned open-world model for convex decomposition. Experiments show that our decompositions are higher-quality than alternatives and generalize across open-world objects as well as across representations to meshes, CAD models, and even Gaussian splats. https://research.nvidia.com/labs/sil/projects/learning-convex-decomp/

摘要（中文）: 本工作提出了一种新的凸分解公式，通过学习特征场来解决这一长期存在的问题，从而实现了首个用于开放世界凸分解的前馈模型。我们的方法能够将三维形状高质量地分解为凸体的并集，这对于加速物理模拟中的碰撞检测至关重要，也适用于许多其他应用。其核心思想是采用特征学习方法，学习一个连续特征场，该特征场随后可以被聚类，通过我们从经典凸性定义中导出的自监督、纯几何目标函数，产生良好的凸分解。我们的公式可用于单形状优化，但更重要的是，特征预测能够在大数据集上进行可扩展的自监督学习，从而产生首个学习到的开放世界凸分解模型。实验表明，我们的分解比其他方法质量更高，并且能够在开放世界对象以及网格、CAD模型，甚至高斯溅射等表示形式中进行泛化。

TLDR: This paper introduces a novel feed-forward model for open-world convex decomposition by learning feature fields, enabling high-quality decomposition of 3D shapes for applications like collision detection.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种新的前馈模型，通过学习特征场来实现开放世界的凸分解，从而能够对3D形状进行高质量的分解，应用于碰撞检测等领域。

Authors: Yuezhi Yang, Qixing Huang, Mikaela Angelina Uy, Nicholas Sharp

Can You Hear, Localize, and Segment Continually? An Exemplar-Free Continual Learning Benchmark for Audio-Visual Segmentation

Abstract (English): Audio-Visual Segmentation (AVS) aims to produce pixel-level masks of sound producing objects in videos, by jointly learning from audio and visual signals. However, real-world environments are inherently dynamic, causing audio and visual distributions to evolve over time, which challenge existing AVS systems that assume static training settings. To address this gap, we introduce the first exemplar-free continual learning benchmark for Audio-Visual Segmentation, comprising four learning protocols across single-source and multi-source AVS datasets. We further propose a strong baseline, ATLAS, which uses audio-guided pre-fusion conditioning to modulate visual feature channels via projected audio context before cross-modal attention. Finally, we mitigate catastrophic forgetting by introducing Low-Rank Anchoring (LRA), which stabilizes adapted weights based on loss sensitivity. Extensive experiments demonstrate competitive performance across diverse continual scenarios, establishing a foundation for lifelong audio-visual perception. Code is available at${}^{*}$\footnote{Paper under review} - \hyperlink{https://gitlab.com/viper-purdue/atlas}{https://gitlab.com/viper-purdue/atlas} \keywords{Continual Learning \and Audio-Visual Segmentation \and Multi-Modal Learning}

摘要（中文）: 视听分割 (AVS) 旨在通过联合学习音频和视觉信号，生成视频中发声物体的像素级掩膜。然而，真实世界的环境本质上是动态的，导致音频和视觉分布随时间演变，这对假设静态训练设置的现有 AVS 系统提出了挑战。为了解决这一差距，我们引入了第一个用于视听分割的无范例持续学习基准，该基准包括跨单源和多源 AVS 数据集的四个学习协议。我们进一步提出了一个强大的基线模型，ATLAS，它使用音频引导的预融合调节，在跨模态注意力之前通过投影的音频上下文来调制视觉特征通道。最后，我们通过引入低秩锚定 (LRA) 来缓解灾难性遗忘，该方法基于损失敏感性来稳定调整后的权重。广泛的实验证明了在各种持续场景中的竞争性能，为终身视听感知奠定了基础。代码可在${}^{*}$\footnote{论文正在审核中} - \hyperlink{https://gitlab.com/viper-purdue/atlas}{https://gitlab.com/viper-purdue/atlas} 获取。 关键词：持续学习 \and 视听分割 \and 多模态学习

TLDR: This paper introduces a continual learning benchmark for audio-visual segmentation and proposes a novel approach (ATLAS with Low-Rank Anchoring) to address catastrophic forgetting in this context.

简要说明: 本文提出了一个音视频分割的持续学习基准，并提出了一种新方法（ATLAS与低秩锚定）来解决该领域中的灾难性遗忘问题。

Authors: Siddeshwar Raghavan, Gautham Vinod, Bruce Coburn, Fengqing Zhu

PPO-Based Hybrid Optimization for RIS-Assisted Semantic Vehicular Edge Computing

Abstract (English): To support latency-sensitive Internet of Vehicles (IoV) applications amidst dynamic environments and intermittent links, this paper proposes a Reconfigurable Intelligent Surface (RIS)-aided semantic-aware Vehicle Edge Computing (VEC) framework. This approach integrates RIS to optimize wireless connectivity and semantic communication to minimize latency by transmitting semantic features. We formulate a comprehensive joint optimization problem by optimizing offloading ratios, the number of semantic symbols, and RIS phase shifts. Considering the problem's high dimensionality and non-convexity, we propose a two-tier hybrid scheme that employs Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) for discrete decision-making and Linear Programming (LP) for offloading optimization. {The simulation results have validated the proposed framework's superiority over existing methods. Specifically, the proposed PPO-based hybrid optimization scheme reduces the average end-to-end latency by approximately 40% to 50% compared to Genetic Algorithm (GA) and Quantum-behaved Particle Swarm Optimization (QPSO). Moreover, the system demonstrates strong scalability by maintaining low latency even in congested scenarios with up to 30 vehicles.

摘要（中文）: 为支持动态环境和间歇性链路下的时延敏感型车联网(IoV)应用，本文提出了一种重构智能表面(RIS)辅助的语义感知车辆边缘计算(VEC)框架。该方法集成RIS以优化无线连接，并采用语义通信通过传输语义特征来最小化时延。我们通过优化卸载比例、语义符号数量和RIS相移，构建了一个综合性的联合优化问题。考虑到问题的高维度和非凸性，我们提出了一种两层混合方案，该方案采用近端策略优化(PPO)进行离散决策，并采用线性规划(LP)进行卸载优化。仿真结果验证了所提出的框架优于现有方法。具体而言，与遗传算法(GA)和量子行为粒子群优化(QPSO)相比，所提出的基于PPO的混合优化方案将平均端到端时延降低了约40%到50%。此外，该系统展现出强大的可扩展性，即使在高达30辆车的拥堵场景下也能保持低时延。

TLDR: This paper presents a PPO-based hybrid optimization scheme for RIS-assisted semantic vehicular edge computing to minimize latency in IoV applications, demonstrating significant latency reduction compared to GA and QPSO.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种基于PPO的混合优化方案，用于RIS辅助的语义车辆边缘计算，以最大限度地减少IoV应用中的延迟，并展示了与遗传算法和量子行为粒子群优化相比，显著的延迟降低。

Relevance: (4/10)

Authors: Wei Feng, Jingbo Zhang, Qiong Wu, Pingyi Fan, Qiang Fan

Data-driven robust Markov decision processes on Borel spaces: performance guarantees via an axiomatic approach

Abstract (English): We consider Markov decision processes (MDPs) with unknown disturbance distribution and address this problem using the robust Markov decision process (RMDP) approach. We construct the empirical distribution of the unknown disturbance distribution and characterize our ambiguity set of distributions as the sublevel set of a nonnegative distance function from the empirical distribution. By connecting the weak convergence of distributions to convergence with respect to the distance function, we prove that the robust optimal value function and the out-of-sample value function converge to the true optimal value function with increasing sample-sizes. We establish that, for finite sample-sizes, the robust optimal value function serves as a high probability upper bound on the out-of-sample value function. We also obtain probabilistic convergence rates, sample complexity bounds, and out-of-distribution performance bounds. The finite sample performance guarantees rely on the distance function satisfying a certain concentration type inequality. Several well-studied distances in the literature meet the requirements imposed on the distance function. We also analyze the data-driven properties of empirical MDPs and demonstrate that, unlike our data-driven RMDPs, empirical MDPs fail to satisfy some of the finite sample performance guarantees.

摘要（中文）: 我们考虑具有未知扰动分布的马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），并采用鲁棒马尔可夫决策过程（RMDP）方法来解决此问题。我们构建未知扰动分布的经验分布，并将分布的模糊集表征为从经验分布导出的非负距离函数的次水平集。通过将分布的弱收敛与距离函数相关的收敛联系起来，我们证明了鲁棒最优值函数和样本外值函数随着样本量的增加收敛于真实最优值函数。我们确定，对于有限样本量，鲁棒最优值函数充当样本外值函数的高概率上界。我们还获得了概率收敛速率、样本复杂度界限和分布外性能界限。有限样本性能保证依赖于满足特定集中不等式类型要求的距离函数。文献中研究的几种距离函数满足对该距离函数施加的要求。我们还分析了经验MDP的数据驱动特性，并证明与我们的数据驱动RMDP不同，经验MDP无法满足某些有限样本性能保证。

TLDR: This paper addresses robust Markov Decision Processes (MDPs) with unknown disturbance distributions using an axiomatic approach, providing finite sample performance guarantees and out-of-distribution performance bounds by characterizing an ambiguity set of distributions defined by a distance function.

简要说明: 本文采用公理化方法解决了具有未知扰动分布的鲁棒马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）问题，通过表征由距离函数定义的分布模糊集，提供了有限样本性能保证和超出分布的性能界限。

Authors: Sivaramakrishnan Ramani

Optimizing Reinforcement Learning Training over Digital Twin Enabled Multi-fidelity Networks

Abstract (English): In this paper, we investigate a novel digital network twin (DNT) assisted deep learning (DL) model training framework. In particular, we consider a physical network where a base station (BS) uses several antennas to serve multiple mobile users, and a DNT that is a virtual representation of the physical network. The BS must adjust its antenna tilt angles to optimize the data rates of all users. Due to user mobility, the BS may not be able to accurately track network dynamics such as wireless channels and user mobilities. Hence, a reinforcement learning (RL) approach is used to dynamically adjust the antenna tilt angles. To train the RL, we can use data collected from the physical network and the DNT. The data collected from the physical network is more accurate but incurs more communication overhead compared to the data collected from the DNT. Therefore, it is necessary to determine the ratio of data collected from the physical network and the DNT to improve the training of the RL model. We formulate this problem as an optimization problem whose goal is to jointly optimize the tilt angle adjustment policy and the data collection strategy, aiming to maximize the data rates of all users while constraining the time delay introduced by collecting data from the physical network. To solve this problem, we propose a hierarchical RL framework that integrates robust adversarial loss and proximal policy optimization (PPO). Simulation results show that our proposed method reduces the physical network data collection delay by up to 28.01% and 1x compared to a hierarchical RL that uses vanilla PPO as the first level RL, and the baseline that uses robust-RL at the first level and selects the data collection ratio randomly.

摘要（中文）: 本文研究了一种基于数字网络孪生（DNT）辅助的深度学习（DL）模型训练新框架。具体而言，我们考虑一个物理网络，其中基站（BS）使用多个天线为多个移动用户提供服务，以及一个DNT，它是物理网络的虚拟表示。基站必须调整其天线下倾角以优化所有用户的数据速率。由于用户移动性，基站可能无法准确跟踪网络动态，例如无线信道和用户移动性。因此，采用强化学习（RL）方法来动态调整天线下倾角。为了训练RL，我们可以使用从物理网络和DNT收集的数据。与从DNT收集的数据相比，从物理网络收集的数据更准确，但会产生更高的通信开销。因此，有必要确定从物理网络和从DNT收集的数据比例，以改善RL模型的训练。我们将此问题表述为一个优化问题，其目标是联合优化倾角调整策略和数据收集策略，旨在最大化所有用户的数据速率，同时约束从物理网络收集数据所引入的时延。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种分层RL框架，该框架集成了鲁棒对抗损失和近端策略优化（PPO）。仿真结果表明，与使用 vanilla PPO 作为第一层 RL 的分层 RL 以及第一层使用鲁棒-RL 并随机选择数据收集比例的基线相比，我们提出的方法最多可将物理网络数据收集延迟降低 28.01% 和 1 倍。

TLDR: The paper proposes a hierarchical reinforcement learning framework to optimize antenna tilt angles and data collection strategies in a digital network twin (DNT) assisted environment, aiming to maximize data rates while minimizing delays. Simulation results show improved data collection delay compared to baselines.

简要说明: 该论文提出了一种分层强化学习框架，用于优化数字网络孪生 (DNT) 辅助环境中的天线倾斜角度和数据收集策略，旨在最大化数据速率并最小化延迟。仿真结果表明，与基线相比，数据收集延迟有所改善。

Relevance: (4/10)
Novelty: (6/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (5/10)
Overall: (5/10)

Authors: Hanzhi Yu, Hasan Farooq, Julien Forgeat, Shruti Bothe, Kristijonas Cyras, Md Moin Uddin Chowdhury, Mingzhe Chen

Lightweight 3D LiDAR-Based UAV Tracking: An Adaptive Extended Kalman Filtering Approach

Abstract (English): Accurate relative positioning is crucial for swarm aerial robotics, enabling coordinated flight and collision avoidance. Although vision-based tracking has been extensively studied, 3D LiDAR-based methods remain underutilized despite their robustness under varying lighting conditions. Existing systems often rely on bulky, power-intensive sensors, making them impractical for small UAVs with strict payload and energy constraints. This paper presents a lightweight LiDAR-based UAV tracking system incorporating an Adaptive Extended Kalman Filter (AEKF) framework. Our approach effectively addresses the challenges posed by sparse, noisy, and nonuniform point cloud data generated by non-repetitive scanning 3D LiDARs, ensuring reliable tracking while remaining suitable for small drones with strict payload constraints. Unlike conventional filtering techniques, the proposed method dynamically adjusts the noise covariance matrices using innovation and residual statistics, thereby enhancing tracking accuracy under real-world conditions. Additionally, a recovery mechanism ensures continuity of tracking during temporary detection failures caused by scattered LiDAR returns or occlusions. Experimental validation was performed using a Livox Mid-360 LiDAR mounted on a DJI F550 UAV in real-world flight scenarios. The proposed method demonstrated robust UAV tracking performance under sparse LiDAR returns and intermittent detections, consistently outperforming both standard Kalman filtering and particle filtering approaches during aggressive maneuvers. These results confirm that the framework enables reliable relative positioning in GPS-denied environments without the need for multi-sensor arrays or external infrastructure.

摘要（中文）: 准确的相对定位对于集群式空中机器人至关重要，它能够实现协同飞行和避碰。尽管基于视觉的跟踪已经得到了广泛研究，但基于 3D 激光雷达的方法，尽管在多变的光照条件下具有鲁棒性，却仍然未被充分利用。现有的系统通常依赖于体积大、功耗高的传感器，这使得它们对于具有严格载荷和能量限制的小型无人机来说不切实际。本文提出了一种基于轻量级激光雷达的无人机跟踪系统，该系统结合了自适应扩展卡尔曼滤波器（AEKF）框架。我们的方法有效地解决了非重复扫描 3D 激光雷达生成的稀疏、噪声大且非均匀点云数据所带来的挑战，确保了可靠的跟踪，同时仍然适用于具有严格载荷限制的小型无人机。与传统的滤波技术不同，所提出的方法使用创新和残差统计量动态调整噪声协方差矩阵，从而提高了在真实世界条件下跟踪的准确性。此外，一种恢复机制确保了在由散射激光雷达返回或遮挡导致的临时检测失败期间跟踪的连续性。使用安装在 DJI F550 无人机上的 Livox Mid-360 激光雷达，在真实飞行场景中进行了实验验证。所提出的方法在稀疏激光雷达返回和间歇性检测的情况下，展示了强大的无人机跟踪性能，在激烈的机动过程中始终优于标准卡尔曼滤波和粒子滤波方法。这些结果证实，该框架能够在无需多传感器阵列或外部基础设施的情况下，在 GPS 受限环境中实现可靠的相对定位。

TLDR: This paper presents a lightweight LiDAR-based UAV tracking system using an adaptive extended Kalman filter (AEKF) on a small drone, demonstrating robust tracking performance in real-world flight scenarios with sparse LiDAR data and outperforming standard Kalman and particle filters.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种基于轻量级激光雷达的无人机跟踪系统，该系统在小型无人机上使用自适应扩展卡尔曼滤波器（AEKF），并在真实飞行场景中展示了在稀疏激光雷达数据下的强大跟踪性能，优于标准卡尔曼滤波器和粒子滤波器。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (6/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (5/10)
Overall: (4/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Nivand Khosravi, Meysam Basiri, Rodrigo Ventura

A Generalized Voronoi Graph based Coverage Control Approach for Non-Convex Environment

Abstract (English): To address the challenge of efficient coverage by multi-robot systems in non-convex regions with multiple obstacles, this paper proposes a coverage control method based on the Generalized Voronoi Graph (GVG), which has two phases: Load-Balancing Algorithm phase and Collaborative Coverage phase. In Load-Balancing Algorithm phase, the non-convex region is partitioned into multiple sub-regions based on GVG. Besides, a weighted load-balancing algorithm is developed, which considers the quality differences among sub-regions. By iteratively optimizing the robot allocation ratio, the number of robots in each sub-region is matched with the sub-region quality to achieve load balance. In Collaborative Coverage phase, each robot is controlled by a new controller to effectively coverage the region. The convergence of the method is proved and its performance is evaluated through simulations.

摘要（中文）: 为解决多机器人系统在具有多个障碍物的非凸区域内高效覆盖的问题，本文提出一种基于广义Voronoi图（GVG）的覆盖控制方法，该方法包含两个阶段：负载均衡算法阶段和协同覆盖阶段。在负载均衡算法阶段，非凸区域基于 GVG 被划分为多个子区域。此外，还开发了一种加权负载均衡算法，该算法考虑了子区域之间的质量差异。通过迭代优化机器人分配比例，使得每个子区域中的机器人数量与子区域质量相匹配，从而实现负载均衡。在协同覆盖阶段，每个机器人由一个新的控制器控制，以有效地覆盖所在区域。证明了该方法的收敛性，并通过仿真验证了其性能。

TLDR: This paper proposes a two-phase coverage control method for multi-robot systems in non-convex environments using Generalized Voronoi Graphs for load balancing and collaborative coverage, with convergence proven and performance evaluated via simulations.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种两阶段覆盖控制方法，用于在非凸环境中通过多机器人系统实现覆盖。该方法使用广义Voronoi图进行负载平衡和协同覆盖，并通过仿真验证了收敛性和性能。

Relevance: (3/10)

Authors: Zuyi Guo, Ronghao Zheng, Meiqin Liu, Senlin Zhang

Age-Related Differences in the Perception of Eye-Gaze from a Social Robot

Abstract (English): There is an increasing interest in social robots assisting older adults during daily life tasks. In this context, non-verbal cues such as deictic gaze are important in natural communication in human-robot interaction. However, the sensibility to deictic-gaze declines naturally with age and results in a reduction in social perception. Therefore, this work explores the benefits of deictic gaze from social robots assisting older adults during daily life tasks, and how age-related differences may influence their social perception in contrast to younger populations. This may help on the design of adaptive age-related non-verbal cues in the Human-Robot Interaction context.

摘要（中文）: 摘要： 在社交机器人辅助老年人完成日常生活任务方面，人们的兴趣日益浓厚。在这种背景下，诸如指示性视线等非语言线索在人机交互的自然交流中至关重要。然而，对指示性视线的敏感度会随着年龄的增长而自然下降，并导致社会知觉的降低。因此，本研究探讨了社交机器人利用指示性视线辅助老年人完成日常生活任务的益处，以及与年轻群体相比，年龄相关的差异如何影响他们的社会知觉。这可能有助于设计人机交互环境中适应年龄相关的非语言线索。

TLDR: This paper investigates how age affects the perception of a robot's eye gaze in social interaction, particularly for older adults assisted by robots in daily tasks, aiming to inform the design of age-adaptive non-verbal cues.

简要说明: 本文研究了年龄如何影响社交互动中对机器人眼神的感知，特别是对老年人日常任务中使用机器人辅助的情况，旨在为设计适应年龄的非语言提示提供信息。

Novelty: (4/10)

Authors: Lucas Morillo-Mendez, Martien G. S. Schrooten, Oscar Martinez Mozos

Decoder-Free Distillation for Quantized Image Restoration

Abstract (English): Quantization-Aware Training (QAT), combined with Knowledge Distillation (KD), holds immense promise for compressing models for edge deployment. However, joint optimization for precision-sensitive image restoration (IR) to recover visual quality from degraded images remains largely underexplored. Directly adapting QAT-KD to low-level vision reveals three critical bottlenecks: teacher-student capacity mismatch, spatial error amplification during decoder distillation, and an optimization "tug-of-war" between reconstruction and distillation losses caused by quantization noise. To tackle these, we introduce Quantization-aware Distilled Restoration (QDR), a framework for edge-deployed IR. QDR eliminates capacity mismatch via FP32 self-distillation and prevents error amplification through Decoder-Free Distillation (DFD), which corrects quantization errors strictly at the network bottleneck. To stabilize the optimization tug-of-war, we propose a Learnable Magnitude Reweighting (LMR) that dynamically balances competing gradients. Finally, we design an Edge-Friendly Model (EFM) featuring a lightweight Learnable Degradation Gating (LDG) to dynamically modulate spatial degradation localization. Extensive experiments across four IR tasks demonstrate that our Int8 model recovers 96.5% of FP32 performance, achieves 442 frames per second (FPS) on an NVIDIA Jetson Orin, and boosts downstream object detection by 16.3 mAP

摘要（中文）: 知识蒸馏（KD）与量化感知训练（QAT）相结合，为边缘部署模型的压缩带来了巨大的希望。然而，针对精细度敏感型图像复原（IR）任务，通过恢复退化图像的视觉质量来进行联合优化，在很大程度上仍未被探索。直接将QAT-KD应用于底层视觉会暴露出三个关键瓶颈：教师-学生模型容量失配、解码器蒸馏过程中的空间误差放大，以及由量化噪声引起的重建损失和蒸馏损失之间的优化“拉锯战”。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了量化感知蒸馏复原（QDR），这是一个用于边缘部署IR的框架。QDR通过FP32自蒸馏消除了容量失配，并通过无解码器蒸馏（DFD）来防止误差放大，该方法严格在网络瓶颈处校正量化误差。为了稳定优化拉锯战，我们提出了一种可学习幅度重加权（LMR），以动态平衡竞争梯度。最后，我们设计了一种边缘友好模型（EFM），该模型具有轻量级的可学习退化门控（LDG），可以动态调制空间退化定位。在四个IR任务上的大量实验表明，我们的Int8模型恢复了96.5%的FP32性能，在NVIDIA Jetson Orin上实现了每秒442帧（FPS），并将下游目标检测的mAP提高了16.3。

TLDR: This paper introduces a quantization-aware training framework (QDR) with decoder-free distillation and learnable magnitude reweighting for efficient Int8 image restoration on edge devices, achieving near FP32 performance with significant speedups and improved downstream task accuracy.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种量化感知训练框架 (QDR)，该框架利用无解码器蒸馏和可学习幅度重加权，可在边缘设备上实现高效的 Int8 图像恢复，在显着提高速度的同时，性能接近 FP32 并提高了下游任务的准确性。

Relevance: (2/10)
Novelty: (8/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (7/10)

Authors: S. M. A. Sharif, Abdur Rehman, Seongwan Kim, Jaeho Lee

Geometry-Aware Metric Learning for Cross-Lingual Few-Shot Sign Language Recognition on Static Hand Keypoints

Abstract (English): Sign language recognition (SLR) systems typically require large labeled corpora for each language, yet the majority of the world's 300+ sign languages lack sufficient annotated data. Cross-lingual few-shot transfer, pretraining on a data-rich source language and adapting with only a handful of target-language examples, offers a scalable alternative, but conventional coordinate-based keypoint representations are susceptible to domain shift arising from differences in camera viewpoint, hand scale, and recording conditions. This shift is particularly detrimental in the few-shot regime, where class prototypes estimated from only K examples are highly sensitive to extrinsic variance. We propose a geometry-aware metric-learning framework centered on a compact 20-dimensional inter-joint angle descriptor derived from MediaPipe static hand keypoints. These angles are invariant to SO(3) rotation, translation, and isotropic scaling, eliminating the dominant sources of cross-dataset shift and yielding tighter, more stable class prototypes. Evaluated on four fingerspelling alphabets spanning typologically diverse sign languages, ASL, LIBRAS, Arabic Sign Language, and Thai Sign Language, the proposed angle features improve over normalized-coordinate baselines by up to 25 percentage points within-domain and enable frozen cross-lingual transfer that frequently exceeds within-domain accuracy, using a lightweight MLP encoder with about 10^5 parameters. These findings demonstrate that invariant hand-geometry descriptors provide a portable and effective foundation for cross-lingual few-shot SLR in low-resource settings.

摘要（中文）: 手语识别（SLR）系统通常需要每个语种的大量标注语料库，然而世界上300多种手语中的大多数都缺乏足够的标注数据。跨语种小样本迁移提供了一种可扩展的替代方案，即在数据丰富的源语种上进行预训练，然后仅用少量的目标语种样本进行适配，但传统的基于坐标的关键点表示容易受到由摄像头视角、手部尺度和录制条件差异引起的领域偏移影响。这种偏移在小样本情况下尤为不利，因为仅从K个例子估计的类原型对外部方差高度敏感。我们提出了一种几何感知度量学习框架，其核心是从MediaPipe静态手部关键点导出的紧凑型20维关节间角度描述符。这些角度对SO(3)旋转、平移和各向同性缩放是不变的，消除了跨数据集偏移的主要来源，并产生更紧密、更稳定的类原型。在涵盖类型学上不同的手语，即ASL、LIBRAS、阿拉伯手语和泰国手语的四个手指拼写字母表上进行了评估，所提出的角度特征在域内比归一化坐标基线提高了高达25个百分点，并实现了经常超过域内准确性的冻结跨语种迁移，使用的轻量级MLP编码器参数约为10^5。这些发现表明，不变的手部几何描述符为低资源环境下的跨语种小样本SLR提供了可移植且有效的基础。

TLDR: This paper proposes a geometry-aware metric learning framework using inter-joint angles to improve cross-lingual few-shot sign language recognition, showing significant improvements over coordinate-based methods, especially in cross-lingual transfer scenarios. The approach uses a lightweight MLP encoder with about 10^5 parameters and achieves state-of-the-art results on four different sign languages.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种几何感知度量学习框架，使用关节间角度来改进跨语言少样本手语识别，与基于坐标的方法相比，尤其是在跨语言迁移场景中，表现出显著的改进。该方法使用了一个约有 10^5 参数的轻量级 MLP 编码器，并在四种不同的手语上取得了最先进的结果。

Relevance: (2/10)
Novelty: (7/10)

Authors: Chayanin Chamachot, Kanokphan Lertniponphan

SkipGS: Post-Densification Backward Skipping for Efficient 3DGS Training

Abstract (English): 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) achieves real-time novel-view synthesis by optimizing millions of anisotropic Gaussians, yet its training remains expensive, with the backward pass dominating runtime in the post-densification refinement phase. We observe substantial update redundancy in this phase: many sampled views have near-plateaued losses and provide diminishing gradient benefits, but standard training still runs full backpropagation. We propose SkipGS with a novel view-adaptive backward gating mechanism for efficient post-densification training. SkipGS always performs the forward pass to update per-view loss statistics, and selectively skips backward passes when the sampled view's loss is consistent with its recent per-view baseline, while enforcing a minimum backward budget for stable optimization. On Mip-NeRF 360, compared to 3DGS, SkipGS reduces end-to-end training time by 23.1%, driven by a 42.0% reduction in post-densification time, with comparable reconstruction quality. Because it only changes when to backpropagate -- without modifying the renderer, representation, or loss -- SkipGS is plug-and-play and compatible with other complementary efficiency strategies for additive speedups.

摘要（中文）: 3D高斯溅射(3DGS)通过优化数百万个各向异性高斯分布来实现实时的新视角合成，但其训练成本仍然很高，后致密化精炼阶段的反向传播主导了运行时间。我们观察到该阶段存在大量的更新冗余：许多采样的视角具有近乎平稳的损失，并提供了递减的梯度收益，但标准训练仍然执行完整的反向传播。我们提出SkipGS，它采用一种新颖的视角自适应反向门控机制，用于高效的后致密化训练。SkipGS始终执行前向传播以更新每个视角的损失统计信息，当采样的视角的损失与其最近的每个视角的基线一致时，有选择地跳过反向传播，同时强制执行最小反向预算以实现稳定的优化。在Mip-NeRF 360上，与3DGS相比，SkipGS端到端训练时间减少了23.1%，这主要得益于后致密化时间减少了42.0%，同时保持了相当的重建质量。由于它只改变何时进行反向传播——而不修改渲染器、表示或损失——SkipGS是即插即用的，并且与其他互补的效率策略兼容，可以实现额外的加速。

TLDR: The paper introduces SkipGS, a method for accelerating 3D Gaussian Splatting training by selectively skipping backward passes on views with plateaued losses during the post-densification phase, achieving significant speedups with comparable quality.

简要说明: 该论文介绍了SkipGS，一种加速3D高斯溅射训练的方法，通过在后致密化阶段有选择地跳过损失平稳的视图的反向传播，从而在保持相近质量的前提下显著提升训练速度。

Relevance: (2/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)

Authors: Jingxing Li, Yongjae Leeand, Deliang Fan

Computer Vision-Based Vehicle Allotment System using Perspective Mapping

Abstract (English): Smart city research envisions a future in which data-driven solutions and sustainable infrastructure work together to define urban living at the crossroads of urbanization and technology. Within this framework, smart parking systems play an important role in reducing urban congestion and supporting sustainable transportation. Automating parking solutions have considerable benefits, such as increased efficiency and less reliance on human involvement, but obstacles such as sensor limitations and integration complications remain. To overcome them, a more sophisticated car allotment system is required, particularly in heavily populated urban areas. Computer vision, with its higher accuracy and adaptability, outperforms traditional sensor-based systems for recognizing vehicles and vacant parking spaces. Unlike fixed sensor technologies, computer vision can dynamically assess a wide range of visual inputs while adjusting to changing parking layouts. This research presents a cost-effective, easy-to-implement smart parking system utilizing computer vision and object detection models like YOLOv8. Using inverse perspective mapping (IPM) to merge images from four camera views, we extract data on vacant spaces. The system simulates a 3D parking environment, representing available spots with a 3D Cartesian plot to guide users.

摘要（中文）: 智慧城市研究设想了一个数据驱动的解决方案和可持续基础设施协同作用的未来，从而在城镇化和技术的交叉路口定义城市生活。在这个框架内，智能停车系统在减少城市拥堵和支持可持续交通方面发挥着重要作用。自动化停车解决方案具有显著的优势，例如提高效率和减少对人为干预的依赖，但传感器局限性和集成复杂度等障碍仍然存在。为了克服这些障碍，需要一种更复杂的车辆分配系统，尤其是在人口稠密的城市地区。计算机视觉凭借其更高的准确性和适应性，在识别车辆和空闲停车位方面优于传统的基于传感器的系统。与固定传感器技术不同，计算机视觉可以动态评估各种视觉输入，同时适应不断变化的停车布局。本研究提出了一种经济高效、易于实施的智能停车系统，该系统利用计算机视觉和诸如YOLOv8等目标检测模型。通过使用逆透视映射 (IPM) 合并来自四个摄像机视角的图像，我们提取了关于空闲车位的数据。该系统模拟了一个 3D 停车环境，用一个 3D 笛卡尔图表示可用的停车位，以引导用户。

TLDR: This paper proposes a computer vision-based smart parking system using YOLOv8 and inverse perspective mapping to create a 3D parking environment, aiming to improve parking efficiency in urban areas.

简要说明: 本文提出了一种基于计算机视觉的智能停车系统，该系统使用 YOLOv8 和逆透视映射来创建 3D 停车环境，旨在提高城市地区的停车效率。

Relevance: (3/10)
Novelty: (5/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)

Authors: Prachi Nandi, Sonakshi Satapathy, Suchismita Chinara

Interactive 3D visualization of surface roughness predictions in additive manufacturing: A data-driven framework

Abstract (English): Surface roughness in Material Extrusion Additive Manufacturing varies across a part and is difficult to anticipate during process planning because it depends on both printing parameters and local surface inclination, which governs the staircase effect. A data-driven framework is presented to predict the arithmetic mean roughness (Ra) prior to fabrication using process parameters and surface angle. A structured experimental dataset was created using a three-level Box-Behnken design: 87 specimens were printed, each with multiple planar faces spanning different inclination angles, yielding 1566 Ra measurements acquired with a contact profilometer. A multilayer perceptron regressor was trained to capture nonlinear relationships between manufacturing conditions, inclination, and Ra. To mitigate limited experimental data, a conditional generative adversarial network was used to generate additional condition-specific tabular samples, thereby improving predictive performance. Model performance was assessed on a hold-out test set. A web-based decision-support interface was also developed to enable interactive process planning by loading a 3D model, specifying printing parameters, and adjusting the part's orientation. The system computes face-wise inclination from the model geometry and visualizes predicted Ra as an interactive colormap over the surface, enabling rapid identification of regions prone to high roughness and immediate comparison of parameter and orientation choices.

摘要（中文）: 材料挤出增材制造中的表面粗糙度在零件各处变化，并且在工艺规划期间难以预测，因为它取决于打印参数和局部表面倾角，而后者决定了阶梯效应。本文提出了一种数据驱动框架，用于在制造之前，利用工艺参数和表面角度预测算术平均粗糙度（Ra）。使用三水平 Box-Behnken 设计创建了一个结构化的实验数据集：打印了 87 个试样，每个试样具有多个跨越不同倾斜角度的平面，从而获得了使用接触式轮廓仪采集的 1566 个 Ra 测量值。训练了一个多层感知器回归模型，以捕捉制造条件、倾斜度和 Ra 之间的非线性关系。为了缓解有限的实验数据问题，使用条件生成对抗网络生成额外的特定条件表格样本，从而提高预测性能。在预留测试集上评估了模型性能。此外，还开发了一个基于 Web 的决策支持界面，通过加载 3D 模型、指定打印参数和调整零件方向来实现交互式工艺规划。该系统从模型几何形状计算各个面的倾斜度，并将预测的 Ra 可视化为表面上的交互式颜色图，从而能够快速识别易于产生高粗糙度的区域，并立即比较参数和方向选择。

TLDR: This paper presents a data-driven framework using a multilayer perceptron and conditional GAN to predict surface roughness in additive manufacturing, visualized in an interactive 3D interface to aid process planning.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一个数据驱动的框架，使用多层感知器和条件GAN来预测增材制造中的表面粗糙度，并在一个交互式3D界面中进行可视化，以辅助工艺规划。

Relevance: (2/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (9/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)

Authors: Engin Deniz Erkan, Elif Surer, Ulas Yaman

Two Teachers Better Than One: Hardware-Physics Co-Guided Distributed Scientific Machine Learning

Abstract (English): Scientific machine learning (SciML) is increasingly applied to in-field processing, controlling, and monitoring; however, wide-area sensing, real-time demands, and strict energy and reliability constraints make centralized SciML implementation impractical. Most SciML models assume raw data aggregation at a central node, incurring prohibitively high communication latency and energy costs; yet, distributing models developed for general-purpose ML often breaks essential physical principles, resulting in degraded performance. To address these challenges, we introduce EPIC, a hardware- and physics-co-guided distributed SciML framework, using full-waveform inversion (FWI) as a representative task. EPIC performs lightweight local encoding on end devices and physics-aware decoding at a central node. By transmitting compact latent features rather than high-volume raw data and by using cross-attention to capture inter-receiver wavefield coupling, EPIC significantly reduces communication cost while preserving physical fidelity. Evaluated on a distributed testbed with five end devices and one central node, and across 10 datasets from OpenFWI, EPIC reduces latency by 8.9$\times$ and communication energy by 33.8$\times$, while even improving reconstruction fidelity on 8 out of 10 datasets.

摘要（中文）: 科学机器学习（SciML）正越来越多地应用于现场处理、控制和监控；然而，广域传感、实时需求以及严格的能量和可靠性约束使得集中式 SciML 实现变得不切实际。大多数 SciML 模型假设原始数据在中心节点聚合，导致极高的通信延迟和能量成本；而且，为通用 ML 开发的分布式模型通常会破坏基本的物理原理，导致性能下降。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出 EPIC，一个硬件和物理协同引导的分布式 SciML 框架，以全波形反演（FWI）作为代表性任务。EPIC 在终端设备上执行轻量级本地编码，并在中心节点执行物理感知解码。通过传输紧凑的潜在特征而不是高容量的原始数据，并通过使用交叉注意力来捕获接收器间的波场耦合，EPIC 显著降低了通信成本，同时保持了物理保真度。在包含五个终端设备和一个中心节点的分布式测试平台上，以及来自 OpenFWI 的 10 个数据集上进行评估，EPIC 将延迟降低了 8.9 倍，通信能量降低了 33.8 倍，甚至在 10 个数据集中的 8 个上提高了重建保真度。

TLDR: This paper introduces EPIC, a hardware- and physics-co-guided distributed SciML framework for full-waveform inversion, which reduces communication costs and latency while maintaining or improving reconstruction fidelity by performing lightweight encoding on end devices and physics-aware decoding at a central node.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种硬件和物理协同引导的分布式科学机器学习框架 EPIC，用于全波形反演。通过在终端设备上执行轻量级编码，并在中央节点进行物理感知解码，该框架降低了通信成本和延迟，同时保持或提高了重建保真度。

Relevance: (2/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)
Overall: (4/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Yuchen Yuan, Junhuan Yang, Hao Wan, Yipei Liu, Hanhan Wu, Youzuo Lin, Lei Yang

Improving 3D Foot Motion Reconstruction in Markerless Monocular Human Motion Capture

Abstract (English): State-of-the-art methods can recover accurate overall 3D human body motion from in-the-wild videos. However, they often fail to capture fine-grained articulations, especially in the feet, which are critical for applications such as gait analysis and animation. This limitation results from training datasets with inaccurate foot annotations and limited foot motion diversity. We address this gap with FootMR, a Foot Motion Refinement method that refines foot motion estimated by an existing human recovery model through lifting 2D foot keypoint sequences to 3D. By avoiding direct image input, FootMR circumvents inaccurate image-3D annotation pairs and can instead leverage large-scale motion capture data. To resolve ambiguities of 2D-to-3D lifting, FootMR incorporates knee and foot motion as context and predicts only residual foot motion. Generalization to extreme foot poses is further improved by representing joints in global rather than parent-relative rotations and applying extensive data augmentation. To support evaluation of foot motion reconstruction, we introduce MOOF, a 2D dataset of complex foot movements. Experiments on MOOF, MOYO, and RICH show that FootMR outperforms state-of-the-art methods, reducing ankle joint angle error on MOYO by up to 30% over the best video-based approach.

摘要（中文）: 最先进的方法可以从真实场景视频中恢复准确的整体3D人体运动。然而，它们通常无法捕捉到细粒度的关节运动，尤其是在足部，这对于步态分析和动画等应用至关重要。这种局限性源于训练数据集存在不准确的足部标注以及有限的足部运动多样性。我们通过FootMR来解决这一问题，这是一种足部运动精细化方法，它通过将2D足部关键点序列提升到3D来精细化现有的人体恢复模型估计的足部运动。通过避免直接的图像输入，FootMR规避了不准确的图像-3D标注对，并可以利用大规模的动作捕捉数据。为了解决2D到3D提升的模糊性，FootMR将膝盖和足部运动作为上下文信息，并且只预测残差足部运动。通过以全局而非父相对旋转的方式表示关节，以及应用广泛的数据增强，进一步提高了对极端足部姿势的泛化能力。为了支持足部运动重建的评估，我们引入了MOOF，一个包含复杂足部运动的2D数据集。在MOOF、MOYO和RICH上的实验表明，FootMR优于最先进的方法，在MOYO上，踝关节角度误差比最佳的基于视频的方法降低了高达30%。

TLDR: This paper introduces FootMR, a method for refining 3D foot motion reconstruction from 2D keypoints, addressing inaccuracies in existing human motion capture systems, and presents a new foot motion dataset (MOOF) for evaluation.

简要说明: 本文介绍了一种名为FootMR的方法，用于从2D关键点优化3D足部运动重建，解决了现有的人体运动捕捉系统中的足部运动不准确问题，并提出了一个新的足部运动数据集(MOOF)用于评估。

Relevance: (2/10)
Novelty: (7/10)
Clarity: (8/10)
Potential Impact: (6/10)
Overall: (3/10)
Read Paper (PDF)

Authors: Tom Wehrbein, Bodo Rosenhahn
